# Maison Abstract (https://maison-abstract.com)

> Maison Abstract is an online art store that offers curated wall art designed to enhance modern homes and office interiors. The site focuses primarily on abstract and contemporary styles, featuring a range of prints and canvas artworks inspired by well-known artists, mid-century European abstraction, and modern creative movements. Its collections include works influenced by artists such as Wassily Kandinsky and Piet Mondrian, as well as contemporary creators and themed series that highlight expressive colour, geometry, and layered composition.

The platform allows customers to browse different artist collections, explore framed canvas options, and select pieces suited to various interior design aesthetics. Maison Abstract promotes the idea of turning everyday spaces into personal galleries, offering artwork that reflects individual taste while bringing visual impact to a room. Overall, the website positions itself as a destination for stylish, gallery-inspired wall art that blends classic abstract influences with contemporary decorative design.

## Products

- [Union Jack is back! by Norman Barrett Framed Matte Canvas Print Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/union-jack-is-back-by-norman-barrett-framed-matte-canvas-print-wall-art): “Union Jack is Back!” by Norman Barrett captures a bold fusion of patriotism and modern abstract expression. Barrett, a British contemporary artist known for his vibrant textural compositions, reimagines the iconic flag with layers of energetic color and movement. His use of acrylic and palette-knife technique creates a powerful, tactile surface that radiates energy and pride. This piece symbolizes the enduring spirit of Britain, bridging heritage with modern artistic vision. Perfect for collectors who appreciate contemporary reinterpretations of national symbols, Barrett’s work reflects both strength and individuality through color, texture, and emotional resonance. This canvas is made from a durable cotton/poly blend with a proprietary coating that holds rich, crisp color printed with non-toxic latex inks  by Greenguard Gold. The frame is crafted from sustainably sourced pine, echoing the print’s tactile, handcrafted vibe while keeping the production environmentally thoughtful.Product features- Greenguard Gold  latex inks for vibrant, non-toxic color- Cotton/poly canvas composite with a proprietary coating for image clarity- Sustainably sourced radial pine frame with multiple color and size options- Available horizontal, vertical, and square orientations with sawtooth hanging hardware- Matte finish reduces glare and highlights painterly textureCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Union Jack is back! by Norman Barrett Framed Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/union-jack-is-back-by-norman-barrett-framed-wall-art-print): “Union Jack is Back!” by Norman Barrett captures a bold fusion of patriotism and modern abstract expression. Barrett, a British contemporary artist known for his vibrant textural compositions, reimagines the iconic flag with layers of energetic color and movement. His use of acrylic and palette-knife technique creates a powerful, tactile surface that radiates energy and pride. This piece symbolizes the enduring spirit of Britain, bridging heritage with modern artistic vision. Perfect for collectors who appreciate contemporary reinterpretations of national symbols, Barrett’s work reflects both strength and individuality through color, texture, and emotional resonance. Product features- Two paper choices: textured 310gsm fine art or bright 260gsm semi-gloss- Matte black 100% pinewood frame with brown paper backing and shatter-proof plexiglass- Pre-installed top-hanging hardware plus rubber bumpers for straight, protected mounting- Available in 10 sizes and horizontal or vertical orientations- Vibrant, long-lasting printing using modern color techniques; assembled in the USACare instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Union Jack is back! by Norman Barrett Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/union-jack-is-back-by-norman-barrett-wall-art-print): “Union Jack is Back!” by Norman Barrett captures a bold fusion of patriotism and modern abstract expression. Barrett, a British contemporary artist known for his vibrant textural compositions, reimagines the iconic flag with layers of energetic color and movement. His use of acrylic and palette-knife technique creates a powerful, tactile surface that radiates energy and pride. This piece symbolizes the enduring spirit of Britain, bridging heritage with modern artistic vision. Perfect for collectors who appreciate contemporary reinterpretations of national symbols, Barrett’s work reflects both strength and individuality through color, texture, and emotional resonance. Product features- Three paper options: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (satin photo finish), Matte (subtle, low-reflective)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting color fidelity- Multiple sizes available with horizontal and vertical orientations- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Ships rolled; blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) — adults onlyCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Union Jack is back! by Norman Barrett Matte Canvas Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/union-jack-is-back-by-norman-barrett-matte-canvas-wall-art): “Union Jack is Back!” by Norman Barrett captures a bold fusion of patriotism and modern abstract expression. Barrett, a British contemporary artist known for his vibrant textural compositions, reimagines the iconic flag with layers of energetic color and movement. His use of acrylic and palette-knife technique creates a powerful, tactile surface that radiates energy and pride. This piece symbolizes the enduring spirit of Britain, bridging heritage with modern artistic vision. Perfect for collectors who appreciate contemporary reinterpretations of national symbols, Barrett’s work reflects both strength and individuality through color, texture, and emotional resonance. Product features- Stretched matte canvas on a 1.25" pine frame for a gallery look- Printed with non-toxic latex inks and UL Greenguard Gold- inks- Soft rubber dots on back corners plus included back hanger for secure display- Sustainably sourced radiata pine frame and cotton/poly canvas blend- Available in multiple orientations and 60 size options; slight size tolerance +/- 1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Colours Of The Soul Reflecting On Water by Ariel Chavarro Avila Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/colours-of-the-soul-reflecting-on-water-by-ariel-chavarro-avila-wall-art-print): Colours Of The Soul Reflecting On Water by Colombian-born artist Ariel Chavarro Avila captures his signature fusion of emotional depth and lyrical colour. Known for his expressive contemporary style, Avila draws on his multicultural experiences and deep spiritual connection to nature. This artwork transforms shifting reflections on water into a rich symphony of colour, movement and inner stillness. Each brushstroke embodies Avila’s commitment to conveying the invisible layers of the human soul. Ideal for modern interiors, this piece brings serenity, vibrancy and a sense of personal awakening to any space. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright satin finish), Matte (smooth, low-glare)- Giclée printing for vivid, fade-resistant color- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation options- Rolled packaging for safe transport and simple framing- Paper weights vary by supplier: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Colours Of The Soul Reflecting On Water by Ariel Chavarro Avila Framed Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/colours-of-the-soul-reflecting-on-water-by-ariel-chavarro-avila-framed-wall-art-print): Colours Of The Soul Reflecting On Water by Colombian-born artist Ariel Chavarro Avila captures his signature fusion of emotional depth and lyrical colour. Known for his expressive contemporary style, Avila draws on his multicultural experiences and deep spiritual connection to nature. This artwork transforms shifting reflections on water into a rich symphony of colour, movement and inner stillness. Each brushstroke embodies Avila’s commitment to conveying the invisible layers of the human soul. Ideal for modern interiors, this piece brings serenity, vibrancy and a sense of personal awakening to any space. Product features- Two paper choices: textured fine art (310 gsm) or bright semi-gloss (260 gsm)- Matte black 100% pinewood frame with brown paper backing and shatter-proof plexiglass- Pre-installed hanging hardware and rubber bumpers for easy, damage-free mounting- Available in 10 sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation options- Vibrant, high-fidelity color reproduction using advanced printing techniquesCare instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Colours Of The Soul Reflecting On Water by Ariel Chavarro Avila Matte Canvas Framed Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/colours-of-the-soul-reflecting-on-water-by-ariel-chavarro-avila-matte-canvas-framed-art): Colours Of The Soul Reflecting On Water by Colombian-born artist Ariel Chavarro Avila captures his signature fusion of emotional depth and lyrical colour. Known for his expressive contemporary style, Avila draws on his multicultural experiences and deep spiritual connection to nature. This artwork transforms shifting reflections on water into a rich symphony of colour, movement and inner stillness. Each brushstroke embodies Avila’s commitment to conveying the invisible layers of the human soul. Ideal for modern interiors, this piece brings serenity, vibrancy and a sense of personal awakening to any space. The build is sustainably minded: a cotton/poly canvas composite with a proprietary coating reproduces saturated color and fine detail, printed with non-toxic latex inks. Stretched over a profile pine frame from responsibly managed forests and fitted with sawtooth hardware, it’s ready to hang straight out of the box. Choose orientation and frame color to match your arrangement or to create a bold contrast against painted walls.Product features- Unique JONDO coating for high-quality image reproduction with Greenguard Gold inks- Sustainable radial pine frame from FSC- renewable forests- Vibrant, bright colors produced by advanced printing techniques- Non-hazardous latex inks on a cotton/polyester canvas composite- Multiple sizes, frame colors, orientations and included sawtooth hanging hardwareCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Colours Of The Soul Reflecting On Water by Ariel Chavarro Avila Matte Canvas Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/colours-of-the-soul-reflecting-on-water-by-ariel-chavarro-avila-matte-canvas-wall-art): Colours Of The Soul Reflecting On Water by Colombian-born artist Ariel Chavarro Avila captures his signature fusion of emotional depth and lyrical colour. Known for his expressive contemporary style, Avila draws on his multicultural experiences and deep spiritual connection to nature. This artwork transforms shifting reflections on water into a rich symphony of colour, movement and inner stillness. Each brushstroke embodies Avila’s commitment to conveying the invisible layers of the human soul. Ideal for modern interiors, this piece brings serenity, vibrancy and a sense of personal awakening to any space. Product features- Matte, stretched canvas with 1.25" gallery edge for a framed look- Printed with non-toxic, durable latex inks and UL Greenguard Gold- inks- Stretched on radiata pine from FSC- renewable forests- Soft rubber dots on the back corners to keep the canvas steady when hung- Available in 60 sizes and multiple orientations; back hanging hardware includedCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Composition (No. 1) by Piet Mondrian Abstract  Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/composition-no-1-by-piet-mondrian-abstract-wall-art-print): “Composition (No. 1) Gray-Red” by Piet Mondrian represents the height of early modern abstraction. Painted in the 1920s, this masterpiece reflects Mondrian’s De Stijl philosophy—harmony through balance, geometry, and simplicity. Using clean black lines and subtle red and gray tones, he created a universal visual language. Mondrian, a Dutch visionary, transformed art with his pursuit of order and purity. This museum-quality print brings minimalist elegance to any modern or contemporary interior.Product features- Three paper options: Fine art (textured, archival), Semi-glossy (bright satin finish), Matte (low-glare, art-optimized)- Giclée printing for bright, fade-resistant color and sharp detail- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation choices- Paper weights specified: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Ships rolled for safe delivery; blank product sourced from USA and Japan; age 18+Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [On the Bridge (Thielska) by Edvard Munch Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/on-the-bridge-thielska-by-edvard-munch-wall-art-print): Created by Norwegian Expressionist Edvard Munch in 1903, On the Bridge (Thielska) illustrates the artist’s ongoing exploration of emotion, isolation, and social tension. Munch’s works often draw from personal trauma and psychological turmoil, transforming them into vivid, symbolic imagery. In this composition, the bridge serves as both a literal and metaphorical crossing—between connection and distance, presence and absence. The stark contrasts and swirling lines reflect Munch’s innovative use of color to convey mood. Housed in Stockholm’s Thielska Galleriet, this painting remains a poignant testament to Munch’s emotional insight and modernist vision. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright, satin finish), Matte (soft, low-reflective)- Giclée printing for bright, fade-resistant colors- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation options- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Rolled for shipping; blanks sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice)Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Blue Ballerina by Edgar Degas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/blue-ballerina-by-edgar-degas-wall-art-print): Blue Ballerina by Edgar Degas beautifully captures the grace and discipline of the Parisian ballet scene. Degas, a French Impressionist born in 1834, was fascinated by dancers, often portraying them in rehearsal moments rather than on stage. His keen eye for movement and composition reveals both the elegance and effort behind performance. Painted with soft pastels and delicate tones of blue, Blue Ballerina reflects Degas’s mastery of light, color, and anatomy. This artwork embodies his lifelong exploration of fleeting gestures, making it a timeless study of beauty, balance, and human perseverance within the performing arts. Product features- Three paper options: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Glossy (satin photo finish), Matte (low-reflective art paper)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting colors and sharp detail- Multiple sizes available with horizontal and vertical orientations- Paper weights from 180–285 g/m² depending on paper and supplier- Rolled for secure shipping; blanks sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice)Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Razor Edged by Rajasekharan Parameswaran Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/razor-edged-by-rajasekharan-parameswaran-wall-art-print): “Razor Edged by Rajasekharan Parameswaran is a striking contemporary oil painting that captures the artist’s mastery of emotion and movement through layered texture and dynamic composition. Rajasekharan, an acclaimed Indian painter known for his bold use of color and symbolism, explores the tension between balance and chaos in modern life. This artwork reflects his deep engagement with realism and abstraction, where every brushstroke conveys strength and vulnerability. Perfect for collectors and art enthusiasts, Razor Edged brings a sophisticated statement of creativity and depth to any modern interior.” Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Glossy (satin photo finish), Matte (lighter, low-reflective)- Giclée print quality for bright, long-lasting color- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation options- Paper weights vary by option (Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²)- Rolled for secure shipping; blank product sourced from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Separate Skies by Carroll N. Jones III Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/separate-skies-by-carroll-n-jones-iii-wall-art-print): Carroll N. Jones III’s Separate Skies embodies the artist’s lifelong devotion to realism infused with emotion. Trained under his father, Carroll Jones II, and inspired by classic American realists, Jones developed a unique ability to translate light into feeling. This piece reflects his meditative approach—capturing the tranquil balance between earth and sky. Through delicate tonal transitions and serene composition, Jones evokes the mystery of existence and the fleeting nature of perception. Separate Skies is not just a landscape—it’s a moment of quiet transcendence, masterfully rendered by one of America’s most soulful realist painters. Product features- Giclée printing delivers bright, long-lasting color and sharp detail.- Three paper options: Fine art (textured archival), Semi-glossy (satin photo finish), and Matte (low-reflective art paper).- Paper weights vary by source: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m².- Available in multiple sizes and both horizontal and vertical layouts.- Blank sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice); for adults (age restriction).Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Modern Conveniences by Charles Demuth Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/modern-conveniences-by-charles-demuth-wall-art-print): Charles Demuth’s Modern Conveniences celebrates the harmony between technology and design, a recurring theme in his Precisionist works. Painted during America’s industrial boom, Demuth distilled the essence of modern life into sharp lines and luminous colors. As one of the early modernists who shaped American art, his style merges cubist abstraction with architectural clarity. This reproduction captures every meticulous detail, allowing collectors to own a piece of early modern history. A striking tribute to progress and artistic vision, it’s ideal for those who appreciate the intersection of art, design, and the machine age.Product features- Three paper finishes: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright white, satin finish), Matte (low-sheen, artwork-optimized)- Giclée print process for bright, long-lasting colors- Multiple sizes and horizontal/vertical orientation options- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m², Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m², Matte 189–200 g/m² depending on source- Sourced blanks from USA (JONDO) and Japan; adults onlyCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Portrait of the painter's sons by António Carneiro Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/portrait-of-the-painters-sons-by-antonio-carneiro-wall-art-print): António Carneiro’s Portrait of the Painter’s Sons reveals the artist’s Symbolist vision through tenderness and introspection. Renowned for his expressive use of light and atmosphere, Carneiro imbued his portraits with soul and serenity. This touching depiction of his children goes beyond realism, offering a glimpse into the artist’s heart and the quiet beauty of family life. Painted with delicate tones and poetic sensitivity, the work reflects Carneiro’s mastery of emotional expression. Ideal for collectors who value art with personal meaning, this print brings the elegance and sentiment of Portuguese Symbolism into contemporary interiors. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured), Semi-Glossy (satin photo finish), Matte (low-reflective)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting color and superior fidelity- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation options- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Shipped rolled for easy framing; sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice)Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Tiny Buddha by Todd Williamson Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/tiny-buddha-by-todd-williamson-wall-art-print): Tiny Buddha by Todd Williamson reflects the artist’s signature blend of abstraction, balance, and meditative calm. Known for his minimalist compositions and rhythmic brushwork, Williamson explores silence and spiritual stillness through layered color fields. A celebrated contemporary American painter, his works have been exhibited internationally, including the Venice Biennale. In Tiny Buddha, soft tonal shifts and structured lines evoke contemplation and inner peace. This piece embodies Williamson’s philosophy that art should move beyond form to emotion. Perfect for modern interiors, it brings harmony, mindfulness, and a subtle spiritual presence to any living or creative space. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Gloss (bright photo finish), Matte (gallery-style, low sheen)- High-quality giclée printing for bright, long-lasting color- Multiple sizes available with horizontal and vertical orientation options- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Gloss 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Sourced blanks from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice); adults-only artworkCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Misty morning by Norman Barrett Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/misty-morning-by-norman-barrett-wall-art-print): Norman Barrett’s Misty Morning explores the peaceful tension between light and shadow, rendered in fluid horizontal strokes of red, grey, and gold. Barrett, an abstract artist celebrated for his meditative use of color, channels the essence of a day’s awakening rather than a literal landscape. The work invites stillness, reflection, and emotional clarity. Its flowing gradients evoke calm and balance, ideal for contemporary interiors seeking warmth and serenity. A refined statement piece that captures the harmony between nature and abstraction, Misty Morning transforms simplicity into soulful elegance.Product features- Three paper options: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Glossy (satin photo finish), and Matte (subtle, low-sheen)- Giclée print process for bright, fade-resistant colors- Multiple sizes and both horizontal and vertical orientations available- Paper weights listed for quality: Fine Art 285 g/m², Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m², Matte 189–200 g/m²- Rolled for safe shipping; blank products sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice)Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Misty morning by Norman Barrett Framed Poster Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/misty-morning-by-norman-barrett-framed-poster-wall-art): Norman Barrett’s Misty Morning explores the peaceful tension between light and shadow, rendered in fluid horizontal strokes of red, grey, and gold. Barrett, an abstract artist celebrated for his meditative use of color, channels the essence of a day’s awakening rather than a literal landscape. The work invites stillness, reflection, and emotional clarity. Its flowing gradients evoke calm and balance, ideal for contemporary interiors seeking warmth and serenity. A refined statement piece that captures the harmony between nature and abstraction, Misty Morning transforms simplicity into soulful elegance. Product features- Two paper choices: archival 310 gsm fine art or bright 260 gsm semi-gloss photo paper- Matte black 100% pinewood frame with brown paper backing and white mat- Shatter-proof plexiglass front for safe, clear display- Pre-installed hanging hardware and rubber bumpers — ready to hang straight from the start- Available in 10 sizes with horizontal and vertical layout options; assembled in the USACare instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Misty morning by Norman Barrett Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/misty-morning-by-norman-barrett-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art): Norman Barrett’s Misty Morning explores the peaceful tension between light and shadow, rendered in fluid horizontal strokes of red, grey, and gold. Barrett, an abstract artist celebrated for his meditative use of color, channels the essence of a day’s awakening rather than a literal landscape. The work invites stillness, reflection, and emotional clarity. Its flowing gradients evoke calm and balance, ideal for contemporary interiors seeking warmth and serenity. A refined statement piece that captures the harmony between nature and abstraction, Misty Morning transforms simplicity into soulful elegance. Product features- Greenguard Gold- latex inks for safe, vivid printing- Cotton-polyester canvas with proprietary matte coating for fine detail- Sustainably sourced radial pine frame, multiple colors and sizes available- Durable, non-toxic latex inks and eco-conscious materials- Includes sawtooth hanging hardware; horizontal, vertical, and square optionsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Misty morning by Norman Barrett Matte Canvas Print Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/misty-morning-by-norman-barrett-matte-canvas-print-wall-art): Norman Barrett’s Misty Morning explores the peaceful tension between light and shadow, rendered in fluid horizontal strokes of red, grey, and gold. Barrett, an abstract artist celebrated for his meditative use of color, channels the essence of a day’s awakening rather than a literal landscape. The work invites stillness, reflection, and emotional clarity. Its flowing gradients evoke calm and balance, ideal for contemporary interiors seeking warmth and serenity. A refined statement piece that captures the harmony between nature and abstraction, Misty Morning transforms simplicity into soulful elegance. Product features- Durable cotton-poly canvas with a matte, painterly texture- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for safe, vivid color- Stretched on radiata pine frame from FSC- renewable forests- Soft rubber dots on back corners and included hanging hardware for secure placement- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square sizes (60 size options); slight size tolerance ±1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Colour Study, Squares with Concentric Circles by Vassily Kandinsky Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/colour-study-squares-with-concentric-circles-by-vassily-kandinsky-wall-art-print): Colour Study Squares with Concentric Circles by Wassily Kandinsky is a revolutionary work that explores the relationship between color and form. Created in 1913, this painting reflects Kandinsky’s deep interest in synesthesia — the blending of senses, where colors evoke emotions and sounds. As a pioneer of abstract art, Kandinsky sought to represent spiritual and emotional experiences rather than mere visual representation. This work, with its vibrant, geometric design, is a hallmark of his commitment to art as a means of transcending the material world. It’s a timeless exploration of color’s power to inspire and transform. Product features- Three paper options: Fine art (textured, archival), Semi-glossy (bright satin finish), Matte (subtle, low-glare)- Giclée printing for bright, fade-resistant colors- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical layout options- Paper weights: Fine art 285 g/m²; Semi-glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Shipped rolled for safe delivery; blank product sourced from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Colour Study, Squares with Concentric Circles by Vassily Kandinsky Framed Abstract Canvas Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/colour-study-squares-with-concentric-circles-by-vassily-kandinsky-framed-abstract-canvas-print): Colour Study Squares with Concentric Circles by Wassily Kandinsky is a revolutionary work that explores the relationship between color and form. Created in 1913, this painting reflects Kandinsky’s deep interest in synesthesia — the blending of senses, where colors evoke emotions and sounds. As a pioneer of abstract art, Kandinsky sought to represent spiritual and emotional experiences rather than mere visual representation. This work, with its vibrant, geometric design, is a hallmark of his commitment to art as a means of transcending the material world. It’s a timeless exploration of color’s power to inspire and transform. Product features- Greenguard Gold  latex inks for safe, high-quality color- Sustainable pine stretcher from FSC-sourced wood- Cotton/polyester canvas composite with proprietary matte coating- Multiple sizes and orientations; framed with sawtooth hanging hardware- Vibrant, crisp color reproduction using advanced printing techniquesCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Dominion (Acrylic) by James Pollock Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/dominion-acrylic-by-jackson-pollock-wall-art-print): “Dominion (Acrylic)” by James Pollock captures the raw emotion and movement that defined the Abstract Expressionist era. Pollock, celebrated for his revolutionary drip-painting technique, transformed the canvas into a field of spontaneous energy and rhythm. This piece exemplifies his mastery of controlled chaos — layers of acrylic splashes that create visual depth and intensity. As one of the most influential figures of 20th-century art, Pollock’s work invites the viewer to experience emotion through color and motion. Perfect for collectors and modern art enthusiasts seeking a statement piece that embodies freedom, energy, and artistic innovation. Product features - Giclée print delivers bright, long-lasting color and excellent detail - Three paper options: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Glossy (satin photo finish), Matte (art-optimized, low sheen) - Multiple sizes available with horizontal and vertical orientations - Paper weights vary by option (Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²) - Ships rolled for safe delivery; blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions - If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Flaming June by Lord Frederic Leighton Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/flaming-june-by-lord-frederic-leighton): Celebrate one of the greatest works of Victorian art with Flaming June by Frederic Lord Leighton (1895). A former president of the Royal Academy, Leighton was admired for his mastery of form and color. This captivating image of a sleeping woman bathed in golden light represents his pinnacle of artistic grace. The painting’s warmth, balance, and symbolism have fascinated viewers for over a century. Reproduced with exceptional clarity, this poster honors Leighton’s legacy and adds timeless sophistication to any wall. Product features- Semi-glossy paper offers vibrant color fidelity and a bright, satin finish.- Matte paper provides a sophisticated, non-glossy appearance, perfect for photography.- Fine art paper mimics traditional watercolor surfaces, giving a classic, textured feel.- Giclée printing ensures bright, intense colors that resist fading from sunlight exposure.- Available in multiple sizes and finishes, with options for both horizontal and vertical layouts.Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Counting on Forever by Todd Williamson Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/counting-on-forever-by-todd-williamson-wall-art-print): “Counting on Forever” by Todd Williamson captures the harmony between time, space, and emotion. Known for his meditative abstract style, Williamson blends horizontal and vertical lines with soft, luminous layers that evoke rhythm and balance. A recipient of multiple international art awards, his work explores the human condition through colour and texture. This piece embodies stillness and continuity — a moment suspended in motion. Printed on premium canvas, “Counting on Forever” brings a serene, contemplative energy to any room, reflecting Williamson’s mastery of minimalism and depth. Perfect for collectors who appreciate art that speaks in whispers, not words. Product features- Three premium paper options: Fine art, Semi-glossy, and Matte.- Giclée print process for bright, fade-resistant colors.- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientations available.- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m².- Rolled packaging for safe shipping; blanks sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice).Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Tempest by Rajasekharan Parameswaran Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/tempest-by-rajasekharan-wall-art-print): “Tempest” by Rajasekharan is a powerful exploration of emotion through movement and colour. A renowned contemporary Indian artist, Rajasekharan is celebrated for his dynamic brushwork and evocative depictions of nature’s raw forces. In “Tempest,” swirling tones of blue and gold capture the tension between chaos and calm — the eternal struggle between man and the elements. His technique merges realism with abstraction, giving the painting both energy and depth. This high-quality reproduction preserves every vivid detail, inviting viewers to experience the emotional intensity and visual drama that define Rajasekharan’s celebrated style. Product features- Giclée print for bright, fade-resistant color- Three paper options: Fine Art (textured), Semi-Glossy (satin), Matte (low-reflection)- Multiple sizes and horizontal/vertical orientations- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Rolled for secure shipping; blank product sourced from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Barito 0138 by Heinz Hachel Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/barito-0138-by-heinz-hachel-wall-art-print): Created by German abstract artist Heinz Hachel, Barito 0138 reveals his lifelong fascination with structure, order, and emotion. Hachel’s background in industrial design deeply influences his artistic method, visible in the precise geometry and carefully balanced colour palette of this work. Each segment of the painting appears to pulse with quiet energy, suggesting both architectural form and organic flow. As with much of his oeuvre, Barito 0138 reflects the artist’s quest to find poetry within precision—an exploration of how visual rhythm and spatial harmony can evoke a deeply human response. A modern statement piece of refined abstraction. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Gloss (bright photographic), or Matte (subtle, art-focused finish).- Giclée printing for bright, lasting color and sharp detail.- Multiple sizes and horizontal/vertical orientations available.- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Gloss 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m², depending on print partner.- Shipped rolled for safe delivery; blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice).Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Barito 0138 by Heinz Hachel Matte Canvas Framed Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/barito-0138-by-heinz-hachel-matte-canvas-framed-wall-art): Created by German abstract artist Heinz Hachel, Barito 0138 reveals his lifelong fascination with structure, order, and emotion. Hachel’s background in industrial design deeply influences his artistic method, visible in the precise geometry and carefully balanced colour palette of this work. Each segment of the painting appears to pulse with quiet energy, suggesting both architectural form and organic flow. As with much of his oeuvre, Barito 0138 reflects the artist’s quest to find poetry within precision—an exploration of how visual rhythm and spatial harmony can evoke a deeply human response. A modern statement piece of refined abstraction. Product features- Greenguard Gold  inks for high-quality, safe prints- Durable cotton‑poly canvas with proprietary matte coating- Sustainably sourced pine frame from FSC- forests- Vibrant, latex-based inks — non-toxic and long-lasting- Multiple sizes, orientations, and matte frame color options; sawtooth hardware includedCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Barito 0138 by Heinz Hachel Canvas Print Matte Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/barito-0138-by-heinz-hachel-canvas-print-matte-wall-art): Created by German abstract artist Heinz Hachel, Barito 0138 reveals his lifelong fascination with structure, order, and emotion. Hachel’s background in industrial design deeply influences his artistic method, visible in the precise geometry and carefully balanced colour palette of this work. Each segment of the painting appears to pulse with quiet energy, suggesting both architectural form and organic flow. As with much of his oeuvre, Barito 0138 reflects the artist’s quest to find poetry within precision—an exploration of how visual rhythm and spatial harmony can evoke a deeply human response. A modern statement piece of refined abstraction. This canvas fits into moments when you want to energize a space — a bold accent for a modern apartment, a statement in a workspace, or a color anchor in a curated gallery wall. The tactile matte surface mutes glare while highlighting the brushwork’s texture. It hangs ready to display and ages responsibly thanks to non-toxic, non-flammable latex inks and sustainably sourced materials.Product features- High-quality matte cotton-poly canvas with unique coating for vivid image reproduction- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks — non-toxic and non-flammable- Stretched on radiata pine frame from FSC- renewable forests- Includes back-hanging hardware and soft rubber dots to protect walls and keep the canvas level- Available in multiple sizes and orientations; slight size tolerance +/- 1/8" (3.2 mm)Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Sunny day in may by Norman Barrett Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/sunny-day-in-may-by-norman-barrett-wall-art-print): Norman Barrett’s Sunny Day in May exemplifies his distinctive fusion of landscape and abstraction. A celebrated modern painter, Barrett’s works are renowned for their vibrant palettes and atmospheric depth. In this piece, bands of glowing colour sweep across the canvas, evoking a vivid horizon touched by sunlight and breeze. Each layer reveals his confident mastery of texture and tone, reflecting years of refinement and experimentation. Perfect for collectors who appreciate expressive contemporary art, Sunny Day in May is both a statement of joy and a testament to Barrett’s artistic maturity and boundless imagination. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright satin photo finish), and Matte (subtle, low-sheen)- Giclée printing for bright, fade-resistant colors and sharp detail- Multiple sizes available with horizontal and vertical orientations- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Shipped rolled for safe delivery; blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice)Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Sunny day in may by Norman Barrett Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/sunny-day-in-may-by-norman-barrett-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art): Norman Barrett’s Sunny Day in May exemplifies his distinctive fusion of landscape and abstraction. A celebrated modern painter, Barrett’s works are renowned for their vibrant palettes and atmospheric depth. In this piece, bands of glowing colour sweep across the canvas, evoking a vivid horizon touched by sunlight and breeze. Each layer reveals his confident mastery of texture and tone, reflecting years of refinement and experimentation. Perfect for collectors who appreciate expressive contemporary art, Sunny Day in May is both a statement of joy and a testament to Barrett’s artistic maturity and boundless imagination. Product features- Greenguard Gold  latex inks for safe, high-fidelity color reproduction- Cotton–polyester canvas composite with proprietary matte coating for crisp, painterly detail- Stretched on FSC- radial pine frame made from sustainably sourced wood- Available in multiple sizes and frame colors; horizontal, vertical, and square options- Sawtooth hanging hardware included; non-toxic, non-flammable materialsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Burn baby burn by Norman Barrett Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/burn-baby-burn-by-norman-barrett-wall-art-print): Burn Baby Burn by Norman Barrett is an explosion of passion and movement. Known for his bold use of colour and emotional abstraction, Barrett channels pure energy through fiery reds, glowing golds, and flashes of cobalt blue. This painting embodies transformation and intensity—the raw power of creation itself. Each layered stroke reflects Barrett’s fearless approach and deep connection to the expressive potential of paint. Burn Baby Burn is a statement piece that ignites conversation, radiating warmth and vitality. A striking example of Barrett’s modern abstract mastery, it captures both chaos and beauty in perfect harmony. Product features- Three paper options: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Glossy (bright satin finish), Matte (soft, artwork-friendly surface)- Giclée printing delivers bright, long-lasting colors resistant to regular sunlight exposure- Multiple sizes plus horizontal and vertical orientations available- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Shipped rolled for protection; sourced blanks from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice); adults onlyCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [JMC-1970-2 by Jean Michel Coulon Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/jmc-1970-2-by-jean-michel-coulon-wall-art-print): JMC-1970-2 by French abstract painter Jean Michel Coulon captures his signature mastery of color, rhythm, and form. Coulon, a founding member of the post-war “École de Paris,” devoted decades to refining abstraction into a deeply personal language of emotion and structure. Painted in 1970, this piece reflects his bold experimentation with layered pigments and geometric composition. Each brushstroke embodies the quiet intensity that defined his later work. Perfect for collectors who value mid-century European abstraction, JMC-1970-2 radiates balance, energy, and timeless sophistication — a refined statement for any contemporary interior. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Glossy (satin photo finish), and Matte (art-optimized, low sheen).- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting color and fidelity to the original artwork.- Multiple sizes available with horizontal and vertical orientation options.- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m² (depending on supplier); Matte 189–200 g/m².- Blank sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice); adults only (age restriction).Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Tiny Buddha by Todd Williamson Framed Matte Canvas Abstract  Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/tiny-buddha-by-todd-williamson-framed-matte-canvas-abstract-wall-art): Tiny Buddha by Todd Williamson reflects the artist’s signature blend of abstraction, balance, and meditative calm. Known for his minimalist compositions and rhythmic brushwork, Williamson explores silence and spiritual stillness through layered color fields. A celebrated contemporary American painter, his works have been exhibited internationally, including the Venice Biennale. In Tiny Buddha, soft tonal shifts and structured lines evoke contemplation and inner peace. This piece embodies Williamson’s philosophy that art should move beyond form to emotion. Perfect for modern interiors, it brings harmony, mindfulness, and a subtle spiritual presence to any living or creative space. Product features- UL- Greenguard Gold inks for high-quality, low-emission prints- Cotton/polyester canvas composite with proprietary coating for vivid color and texture- Sustainably sourced radial pine frame with multiple sizes and frame colors available- Non-toxic, latex-based inks; safe and durable printing- Includes sawtooth hanging hardware; horizontal, vertical, and square optionsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [JMC-1970-3 by Jean-Michel Coulon Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/jmc-1970-3-by-jean-michel-coulon-wall-art-print): Bring refined European abstraction into your space with JMC-1970-3 by French artist Jean-Michel Coulon. Part of a remarkable body of work discovered after his death, this 1970 painting reflects Coulon’s disciplined approach to colour, form, and structure. Influenced by the post-war modernist movement, he developed a unique language of geometric harmony and subtle emotion. JMC-1970-3 combines layered tones and carefully balanced shapes, creating a sophisticated focal point for contemporary interiors. This artwork embodies Coulon’s lifelong commitment to private creation and timeless design, offering a piece of authentic modern art history for your home. Product features- Three paper options: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright satin finish), Matte (subtle, low-sheen)- Giclée printing for long-lasting, vivid color and excellent detail- Multiple sizes plus horizontal and vertical orientation choices- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Blank sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice);  productCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [JMC-1960-1 by Jean Michel Coulon Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/jmc-1960-1-by-jean-michel-coulon-wall-art-print): In JMC-1960-1, Jean Michel Coulon continues his exploration of colour as pure energy. Working in Paris during the golden age of abstraction, Coulon developed a distinct style merging French lyrical abstraction with modernist discipline. His limited public exhibitions and private devotion to painting give his works an aura of discovery. This 1960 piece reveals dense, rhythmic layers of pigment, evoking music and movement. Faithfully reproduced, it embodies the spirit of mid-century innovation and the poetic restraint that made Coulon one of France’s quiet masters of abstract art. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured), Semi-Glossy (satin photo finish), Matte (low-sheen for artwork)- Giclée printing with vivid, fade-resistant colors- Multiple sizes and both horizontal & vertical orientations available- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Rolled delivery for safe shipping; blanks sourced from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Heat by Norman Barrett Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/heat-by-norman-barrett-wall-art-print): “Heat” by Norman Barrett radiates pure intensity through layers of vibrant reds, yellows, and blues. Barrett, a contemporary British artist celebrated for his textured abstracts, captures the raw emotion of energy and movement. His signature use of palette-knife strokes and thick acrylic layers transforms color into sensation — evoking the pulse of fire, sunlight, and passion. Every line feels alive, a visual translation of heat itself. This striking piece embodies Barrett’s fascination with light, texture, and atmosphere, making it a bold centrepiece for any modern art collection or space seeking warmth and vitality. Product features- Three paper options: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Glossy (bright photo finish), Matte (subtle, low-reflective)- Giclée printing for vivid, fade-resistant colors- Multiple sizes available with horizontal and vertical orientations- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m², Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m², Matte 189–200 g/m²- Rolled for safe shipping; blanks sourced from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Blue dot by Norman Barrett Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/blue-dot-by-norman-barrett-wall-art-print): With Blue Dot, Norman Barrett continues his exploration of geometric abstraction and expressive minimalism. Known for his instinctive balance of form and colour, Barrett captures emotion through deliberate simplicity. The composition features interlocking black masses animated by red and blue circles — a dynamic interplay of weight, energy, and focus. The solitary blue element provides visual relief and symbolic calm, reflecting Barrett’s fascination with tension and harmony. His modern abstract language resonates with collectors who appreciate thoughtful colour relationships and contemporary aesthetics. Blue Dot exemplifies Barrett’s confident brushwork and his distinctive ability to create emotion from form. Product features- Three paper options: Fine art (textured archival), Semi-glossy (satin photo finish), or Matte (art-optimized, low sheen)- Giclée printing for bright, fade-resistant colors- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientations- Paper weights ranging from ~180–285 g/m² depending on option and supplier- Blank sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice); -only itemCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [(Albi) Portrait de femme nue by Georges Bottini Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/albi-portrait-de-femme-nue-by-georges-bottini-wall-art-print): Experience the timeless elegance of “(Albi) Portrait de femme nue” by Georges Bottini, a celebrated French artist of the Belle Époque era. Bottini was known for his refined portrayals of Parisian women, blending Impressionist light with Symbolist emotion. This exquisite nude study captures intimacy and grace through soft brushwork and subtle tones, reflecting Bottini’s mastery of form and atmosphere. Perfect for modern interiors or classical collections, this fine art reproduction embodies the quiet sophistication of early 20th-century French art. Bring the romantic charm of fin-de-siècle Paris into your space with this beautiful and evocative piece. Product features- Three paper choices: fine art (textured archival), semi-glossy (bright satin), or matte (low-reflective).- Giclée printing for bright, lasting color that resists fading.- Multiple sizes and both horizontal and vertical orientations available.- Paper weights: fine art 285 g/m²; semi-glossy 180–260 g/m²; matte 189–200 g/m² depending on provider.- Ships rolled for protection; blanks sourced from USA and Japan (-only art).Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Lantenhammer by Lageplan Atelier Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/lantenhammer-by-lageplan-atelier-wall-art-print): Lantenhammer by Lageplan Atelier reflects the studio’s signature fusion of fine art and architectural design. Lageplan Atelier, a European collective celebrated for its minimalist and modern aesthetic, transforms spatial concepts into expressive visual compositions. In Lantenhammer, geometric precision meets painterly emotion, creating a bold yet balanced statement of structure and colour. The refined lines and modern palette evoke calm sophistication, making it ideal for contemporary interiors, studios, or galleries. This piece exemplifies the atelier’s philosophy — where art and architecture meet in perfect harmony — offering timeless elegance for collectors who value thoughtful, design-driven abstraction. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright white, satin finish), Matte (lighter weight, low-reflection)- Giclée print quality for bright, fade-resistant colors- Multiple sizes and horizontal/vertical orientations available- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Blank sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice); adults onlyCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Lantenhammer by Lageplan Atelier Framed Modern Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/lantenhammer-by-lageplan-atelier-framed-modern-wall-art): Lantenhammer by Lageplan Atelier reflects the studio’s signature fusion of fine art and architectural design. Lageplan Atelier, a European collective celebrated for its minimalist and modern aesthetic, transforms spatial concepts into expressive visual compositions. In Lantenhammer, geometric precision meets painterly emotion, creating a bold yet balanced statement of structure and colour. The refined lines and modern palette evoke calm sophistication, making it ideal for contemporary interiors, studios, or galleries. This piece exemplifies the atelier’s philosophy — where art and architecture meet in perfect harmony — offering timeless elegance for collectors who value thoughtful, design-driven abstraction. Product features- UL- Greenguard Gold inks for superior image quality- Sustainable pine stretcher frame from FSC- sources- Vibrant, crisp color reproduction with advanced printing techniques- Durable cotton/polyester canvas with proprietary matte coating- Includes sawtooth hanging hardware; multiple sizes and frame colors availableCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Self-Portrait Black Background by Helene Schjerfbeck Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/self-portrait-black-background-by-helene-schjerfbeck-wall-art-print): Helene Schjerfbeck’s Self-Portrait (Black Background) stands among her most compelling works, offering an intimate window into the artist’s soul. One of Finland’s most influential painters, Schjerfbeck redefined portraiture through her subtle colour tones, simplified form, and emotional precision. Here, she depicts herself with stark honesty — her features fading into darkness, symbolising both mortality and artistic clarity. The black background isolates her expression, heightening the sense of solitude and reflection. This painting embodies Schjerfbeck’s lifelong dedication to self-examination and her pioneering move toward modernist abstraction. A deeply moving and sophisticated piece, it resonates with timeless humanity. Product features- Fine art option: textured, archival 285 g/m² paper for a traditional art feel- Semi-glossy option: bright white satin finish with high color fidelity (180–260 g/m²)- Matte option: lighter-weight, low-reflective paper for a subtle look (189–200 g/m²)- Giclée printing: vivid, lightfast colors that resist fading- Multiple sizes and orientations; rolled for safe shipping and easy framingCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Circus Girl by Helene Schjerfbeck Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/circus-girl-by-helene-schjerfbeck-wall-art-print): Circus Girl by Helene Schjerfbeck is a striking example of the Finnish modernist’s delicate yet powerful approach to portraiture. Painted in her later years, Schjerfbeck’s refined brushwork and muted palette reveal both fragility and inner strength. Known for her introspective self-portraits and minimalist style, Schjerfbeck (1862–1946) was a pioneering figure in Nordic art, often exploring themes of identity and performance. In Circus Girl, the subject’s pale face and poised stillness contrast with the vibrant world of the circus, evoking an emotional tension between vulnerability and artifice. A timeless study in character and restraint, it reflects Schjerfbeck’s quiet mastery. Product features- Three paper options: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright, satin finish), Matte (low-reflective, art-optimized).- Giclée printing for vivid, long-lasting color that resists fading.- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation choices.- Paper weight details: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m² depending on source; Matte 189–200 g/m².- Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice); age restrictions: adults only.Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Circus Girl by Helene Schjerfbeck Framed Matte Canvas Portrait Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/circus-girl-by-helene-schjerfbeck-framed-matte-canvas-portrait-art-print): Circus Girl by Helene Schjerfbeck is a striking example of the Finnish modernist’s delicate yet powerful approach to portraiture. Painted in her later years, Schjerfbeck’s refined brushwork and muted palette reveal both fragility and inner strength. Known for her introspective self-portraits and minimalist style, Schjerfbeck (1862–1946) was a pioneering figure in Nordic art, often exploring themes of identity and performance. In Circus Girl, the subject’s pale face and poised stillness contrast with the vibrant world of the circus, evoking an emotional tension between vulnerability and artifice. A timeless study in character and restraint, it reflects Schjerfbeck’s quiet mastery. Product features- Unique JONDO canvas coating with UL- Greenguard Gold inks for exceptional image quality- Sustainable pinewood frame made from FSC- renewable forests- Vibrant, long-lasting colors printed with non-toxic latex inks- Durable cotton/polyester canvas composite with proprietary coating- Includes sawtooth hanging hardware; available in multiple sizes and frame colorsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Red Apples by Helene Schjerfbeck Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/red-apples-by-helene-schjerfbeck-wall-art-print): Painted by Helene Schjerfbeck, Red Apples is a serene yet powerful still life that highlights the artist’s refined minimalism. Schjerfbeck, one of Finland’s most acclaimed modernists, spent much of her later life exploring the quiet poetry of everyday subjects. Here, she reduces the image to essential forms and subtle hues, creating a delicate balance between realism and abstraction. The apples glow softly against muted tones, reflecting her sensitivity to light and atmosphere. Red Apples stands as a perfect example of Schjerfbeck’s mature style — intimate, contemplative, and profoundly modern in its quiet restraint. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Glossy (bright photo finish), Matte (soft, low-reflective)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting colors that resist fading- Paper weights listed: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Multiple sizes and horizontal/vertical orientation options- Ships rolled; blanks sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice);  productCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Carminella by Antonio Mancini Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/carminella-by-antonio-mancini-wall-art-print): Antonio Mancini’s Carminella stands as a moving testament to his mastery of emotion and form. Known for his luminous portraits and textured technique, Mancini rose from humble beginnings in Naples to become one of Italy’s most celebrated realist painters. Carminella reflects his fascination with ordinary people, painted with honesty and sensitivity. The soft interplay of light on the girl’s face conveys innocence and strength, while his tactile brushwork adds depth and vibrancy. Mancini’s art bridges realism and impressionism, and this piece, with its soulful humanity, perfectly captures his gift for turning the familiar into something truly extraordinary. Product features- Available on three paper types: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright, satin finish), Matte (subtle, low-sheen)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting color and excellent detail- Multiple sizes and both horizontal and vertical orientations- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Shipped rolled for safe delivery; blanks sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice)Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Carminella by Antonio Mancini Framed Matte Canvas Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/carminella-by-antonio-mancini-framed-matte-canvas-art-print): Antonio Mancini’s Carminella stands as a moving testament to his mastery of emotion and form. Known for his luminous portraits and textured technique, Mancini rose from humble beginnings in Naples to become one of Italy’s most celebrated realist painters. Carminella reflects his fascination with ordinary people, painted with honesty and sensitivity. The soft interplay of light on the girl’s face conveys innocence and strength, while his tactile brushwork adds depth and vibrancy. Mancini’s art bridges realism and impressionism, and this piece, with its soulful humanity, perfectly captures his gift for turning the familiar into something truly extraordinary. Product features- Matte, non-reflective coating for reduced glare and preserved brushwork detail- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks—vibrant yet non-toxic- Cotton-polyester canvas composite stretched over FSC- radial pine frame- Multiple size and orientation options; sawtooth hardware included for easy hanging- Sustainably sourced materials and eco-conscious printing processCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Tytuotokuva by Helena Schjerfbeck Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/tytuotokuva-by-helena-schjerfbeck-wall-art-print): Helene Schjerfbeck’s “Tytuotokuva” is a striking example of her minimalist yet emotionally charged approach to portraiture. As one of Finland’s most celebrated artists, Schjerfbeck dedicated much of her career to self-reflection through art. In this piece, she pares down form and colour to their essence, creating a portrait that feels both timeless and deeply personal. The subdued palette and simplified lines reveal her mastery of restraint, while her steady gaze speaks of quiet strength and acceptance. Tytuotokuva captures the beauty of vulnerability, offering a window into Schjerfbeck’s soul and the evolution of early modernist expression. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured), Semi-Glossy (satin finish), Matte (soft, low-sheen)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting color and fine detail- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation options- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Rolled delivery for safe transport; blanks sourced from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Fragment by Helena Schjerfbeck Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/fragment-by-helena-schjerfbeck-wall-art-print): Helene Schjerfbeck’s “Fragment” exemplifies her late-career modernist minimalism, where every brushstroke carries meaning. A pioneering Finnish artist, Schjerfbeck captured the passage of time and the fragility of existence through her introspective works. In Fragment, soft tones and subtle textures evoke both decay and beauty, reflecting her contemplation of aging and the self. The painting’s sparse composition creates emotional weight through silence and simplicity. Schjerfbeck’s ability to express profound human emotion with such restraint marks her as one of the great modern portraitists — and Fragment stands as a powerful testament to her visionary sensitivity and timeless artistry.Product features- Three paper options: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright, satin finish), Matte (subdued, artwork-optimized)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting color- Multiple sizes and horizontal/vertical orientations available- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Shipped rolled for safe, easy framing or mountingCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Fragment by Helena Schjerfbeck Framed Matte Canvas Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/fragment-by-helena-schjerfbeck-framed-matte-canvas-art-print): Helene Schjerfbeck’s “Fragment” exemplifies her late-career modernist minimalism, where every brushstroke carries meaning. A pioneering Finnish artist, Schjerfbeck captured the passage of time and the fragility of existence through her introspective works. In Fragment, soft tones and subtle textures evoke both decay and beauty, reflecting her contemplation of aging and the self. The painting’s sparse composition creates emotional weight through silence and simplicity. Schjerfbeck’s ability to express profound human emotion with such restraint marks her as one of the great modern portraitists — and Fragment stands as a powerful testament to her visionary sensitivity and timeless artistry. Product features- Greenguard Gold- latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color- Cotton-polyester composite canvas with proprietary matte coating- Sustainably sourced radial pine frame (FSC)- Multiple orientations and frame colors; sawtooth hanging hardware included- Durable, gallery-style finish with bright, crisp color reproductionCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Burn baby burn by Norman Barrett Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/burn-baby-burn-by-norman-barrett-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art): The "Burn baby burn by Norman Barrett Art Print" is an abstract poster featuring bold, colorful designs created by the artist Norman Barrett. The poster is part of the Printify franchise and is an original licensed reprint, making it a unique and eye-catching addition to any art collection. Measuring as a standard poster size, this piece exudes a vibrant and dynamic energy that is sure to make a statement in any room. With its striking subject matter and distinctive style, this artwork is sure to be a conversation starter and a focal point for any space.Product features- Greenguard Gold latex inks for bright, non-toxic color- Proprietary coated cotton-poly canvas for sharp detail and texture- Sustainably sourced pine frame with multiple color options- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square sizes with sawtooth hardware- Durable, non-flammable printing using eco-conscious materialsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Selbstbildnis by Helena Schjerfbeck Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/selbstbildnis-by-helena-schjerfbeck-wall-art-print): Helene Schjerfbeck’s “Selbstbildnis” is an iconic example of her late-career mastery—an elegant balance of modernism, simplicity and emotional clarity. Schjerfbeck spent decades refining her style, moving from academic realism to a distilled, deeply personal form of expression. In this self-portrait, she confronts the viewer with a calm yet powerful presence, using muted tones and subtle lines to reveal vulnerability beneath composure. The work reflects her lifelong commitment to examining identity, especially as she grew older. Perfect for lovers of Nordic art, this print brings quiet strength and timeless sophistication to any interior setting. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Glossy (bright satin photo paper), Matte (art-optimized, low-sheen)- Giclée printing for bright, fade-resistant color- Multiple sizes and horizontal/vertical orientation options- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Shipped rolled for safe delivery; blanks sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice)Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract
