- [Lukeva tytto by Helena Schjerfbeck Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/lukeva-tytto-by-helena-schjerfbeck-wall-art-print): Helena Schjerfbeck’s “Lukeva tyttö” (“The Reading Girl”) showcases the artist’s evolution from academic training to a refined, modern aesthetic. Born in Finland in 1862, Schjerfbeck developed a uniquely quiet yet powerful style shaped by years of illness, travel and introspection. This painting reflects her sensitivity to gesture, silence and inner emotion. The girl reading is rendered with gentle brushwork and a muted colour scheme, emphasising calm concentration. Schjerfbeck’s signature simplicity lets the viewer focus on the subject’s serenity rather than decorative detail. This work stands as a testament to her influence on Scandinavian modern art and her mastery of intimate portraiture. Product features- Three paper options: Fine art, Semi-glossy, Matte- Archival giclée printing with bright, fade-resistant color- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m² (varies by source)- Available in multiple sizes and horizontal or vertical orientations- Printed and sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice);  productCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Lukeva tytto by Helena Schjerfbeck Framed Matte Canvas Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/lukeva-tytto-by-helena-schjerfbeck-framed-matte-canvas-art-print): Helena Schjerfbeck’s “Lukeva tyttö” (“The Reading Girl”) showcases the artist’s evolution from academic training to a refined, modern aesthetic. Born in Finland in 1862, Schjerfbeck developed a uniquely quiet yet powerful style shaped by years of illness, travel and introspection. This painting reflects her sensitivity to gesture, silence and inner emotion. The girl reading is rendered with gentle brushwork and a muted colour scheme, emphasising calm concentration. Schjerfbeck’s signature simplicity lets the viewer focus on the subject’s serenity rather than decorative detail. This work stands as a testament to her influence on Scandinavian modern art and her mastery of intimate portraiture. Product features- Greenguard Gold– latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color- Proprietary cotton-polyester canvas coating for high-resolution detail- Sustainably sourced pine frame from FSC- forests- Available in multiple sizes and orientations (horizontal, vertical, square)- Sawtooth hanging hardware included for easy wall mountingCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Music Lesson by Frederic Leighton Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/music-lesson-by-frederic-leighton-wall-art-print): “Music Lesson” by Frederic Leighton reflects the artist’s devotion to classical beauty, harmony and discipline. Leighton, one of the leading figures of the Victorian academic tradition, trained extensively across Europe, absorbing influences from Renaissance masters and classical sculpture. This painting showcases his refined technique and love of idealised form. The scene captures a serene exchange between teacher and pupil, rendered with soft light and sculptural precision. Leighton’s mastery of composition elevates an everyday moment into a timeless study of grace and learning. The warm palette, intricate fabrics and gentle gestures embody his belief that art should uplift through elegance and perfection. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art, Semi-Glossy, Matte.- Giclée printing for bright, fade-resistant colors.- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m².- Available in multiple sizes and horizontal or vertical orientations.- Satin finish option (semi-gloss) with sharp color fidelity; fine art offers textured archival surface.Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Jeune Fille assise by Henri Matisse Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/jeune-fille-assise-by-henri-matisse-wall-art-print): Jeune Fille assise by Henri Matisse captures the artist’s mastery of colour, form and emotional clarity. Created during Matisse’s mature period, the work reflects his lifelong pursuit of harmony and expressive simplicity. As the leading figure of Fauvism, Matisse revolutionised modern art through bold palettes and fluid, confident lines. This seated young woman embodies that approach, presenting a quiet yet radiant sense of presence. The composition’s balance of soft contours and vivid tones reveals Matisse’s belief that art should offer comfort and joy. A timeless piece, this poster brings the warmth and elegance of Matisse’s iconic visual language into any space.Product features- Three premium paper options: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright white, satin finish), Matte (lighter-weight, low-reflective)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting color and sharp detail- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientations available- Clear country sourcing: blanks from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice); varying paper weights (180–285 g/m²)- Shipped rolled for safe delivery; -use artworkCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Jeune Fille assise by Henri Matisse Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/jeune-fille-assise-by-henri-matisse-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art): Jeune Fille assise by Henri Matisse captures the artist’s mastery of colour, form and emotional clarity. Created during Matisse’s mature period, the work reflects his lifelong pursuit of harmony and expressive simplicity. As the leading figure of Fauvism, Matisse revolutionised modern art through bold palettes and fluid, confident lines. This seated young woman embodies that approach, presenting a quiet yet radiant sense of presence. The composition’s balance of soft contours and vivid tones reveals Matisse’s belief that art should offer comfort and joy. A timeless piece, this poster brings the warmth and elegance of Matisse’s iconic visual language into any space. Product features- Greenguard Gold- inks for high-quality, non-toxic prints- Durable cotton-poly canvas with proprietary matte coating for rich color and texture- Sustainably sourced radial pine frame available in multiple sizes and colors- Latex-based inks: non-hazardous, non-flammable, vivid color reproduction- Includes sawtooth hanging hardware; horizontal, vertical, and square formats availableCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Summer evening on Skagen's Beach by P.S. Krøyer Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/summer-evening-on-skagens-beach-by-p-s-kroyer-wall-art-print): P.S. Krøyer’s “Summer Evening on Skagen’s Beach” is a timeless tribute to the ethereal “blue hour” of northern Denmark. As one of the most beloved Scandinavian artists, Krøyer spent years documenting life in the artists’ colony at Skagen. Painted in 1893, this masterpiece features Anna Ancher and Marie Krøyer walking along the shoreline bathed in soft, dreamlike light. The work showcases Krøyer’s exceptional ability to blend realism with poetic atmosphere. This premium wall art reproduction brings the charm of Danish Impressionism into any space, celebrating friendship, nature, and the gentle glow of a summer evening. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (satin photo finish), Matte (low-sheen, art-optimized)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting colors- Multiple sizes available in horizontal and vertical orientations- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice); age restrictions: adultsCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Luce au banjo dans le salon à Rabastens by Georges Gaudion Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/luce-au-banjo-dans-le-salon-a-rabastens-by-georges-gaudion-wall-art-print): “Luce au banjo dans le salon à Rabastens” highlights Georges Gaudion’s talent for turning everyday moments into captivating art. Gaudion, celebrated for his expressive figurative style, often painted musicians and domestic settings filled with character. This piece features Luce seated with her banjo, framed by the warm interior of a Rabastens home. The composition balances musical energy with quiet intimacy, revealing Gaudion’s sensitivity to light and mood. A perfect choice for lovers of French cultural art, this reproduction brings a sense of storytelling, authenticity, and peaceful charm to any room. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright photo finish), or Matte (soft, non-reflective)- High-quality Giclée printing for vivid, fade-resistant color- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation options- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m², Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m², Matte 189–200 g/m²- Shipped rolled for safe delivery so you can frame or mount to tasteCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Mrs Williams by Lord Frederic Leighton Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/mrs-williams-by-lord-frederic-leighton-wall-art-print): Frederic Leighton’s Mrs. Williams showcases his unparalleled ability to combine technical precision with emotional warmth. As President of the Royal Academy and a key figure in the British classical revival, Leighton painted this portrait to express quiet strength and feminine grace. The soft textures and delicate color palette reveal his academic training and romantic sensitivity. This museum-quality reproduction captures every nuance of his brushwork, making it a perfect centerpiece for lovers of timeless art and history. Display Mrs. Williams to bring the gentle sophistication of the Victorian era into your living space. Product features- Printed on high-quality semi-glossy, matte, or fine art paper for versatile styles.- Giclée printing ensures bright colors that won't fade with regular sunlight exposure.- Available in multiple sizes and orientations to suit your decorating needs.- Composed of thick, durable paper for a premium feel and longevity.- Created with care, sourced from reliable USA and Japan origins for superior quality.Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Mrs Williams by Lord Frederic Leighton Framed Matte Canvas Portrait Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/mrs-williams-by-lord-frederic-leighton-framed-matte-canvas-portrait-wall-art-print): Frederic Leighton’s Mrs. Williams showcases his unparalleled ability to combine technical precision with emotional warmth. As President of the Royal Academy and a key figure in the British classical revival, Leighton painted this portrait to express quiet strength and feminine grace. The soft textures and delicate color palette reveal his academic training and romantic sensitivity. This museum-quality reproduction captures every nuance of his brushwork, making it a perfect centerpiece for lovers of timeless art and history. Display Mrs. Williams to bring the gentle sophistication of the Victorian era into your living space. Product features- Greenguard Gold  inks for high-quality, low-emission prints- Cotton-polyester canvas composite with proprietary coating for sharp detail- Sustainably sourced pine frame, available in multiple colors and sizes- Non-toxic latex inks delivering vibrant, long-lasting color- Included sawtooth hardware for easy horizontal, vertical, or square hangingCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Tableau Confusion by Nicolae Calancea Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/tableau-confusion-by-nicolae-calancea-wall-art-print): Bring bold contemporary energy into your space with Tableau Confusion by Nicolae Calancea. Born in Moldova, Calancea is celebrated for his abstract expressionist style and his ability to turn emotional tension into powerful visual storytelling. In Tableau Confusion, layered strokes, sharp contrasts, and shifting forms create a captivating sense of movement. This artwork demonstrates Calancea’s signature approach—blending spontaneity with symbolic depth. Ideal as a high-quality wall art print, it adds modern sophistication to living rooms, offices, and creative environments. A perfect choice for collectors seeking a dramatic and culturally rich statement piece. Product features- Available in three papers: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright satin photo finish), Matte (lighter, low-reflective surface)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting color that resists fading- Multiple sizes plus horizontal and vertical orientation options- Paper weight options: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice); -only salesCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Tableau Confusion by Nicolae Calancea Framed Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/tableau-confusion-by-nicolae-calancea-framed-canvas-wall-art-print): Bring bold contemporary energy into your space with Tableau Confusion by Nicolae Calancea. Born in Moldova, Calancea is celebrated for his abstract expressionist style and his ability to turn emotional tension into powerful visual storytelling. In Tableau Confusion, layered strokes, sharp contrasts, and shifting forms create a captivating sense of movement. This artwork demonstrates Calancea’s signature approach—blending spontaneity with symbolic depth. Ideal as a high-quality wall art print, it adds modern sophistication to living rooms, offices, and creative environments. A perfect choice for collectors seeking a dramatic and culturally rich statement piece. Product features- Greenguard Gold- latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color- Proprietary coating on cotton/poly canvas for high image fidelity- Sustainably sourced radial pine stretcher frame- Multiple sizes and frame colors with sawtooth hanging hardware- Low-reflective matte finish that emphasizes texture and brushworkCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Flame by Natalija Miladinovic Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/flame-by-natalija-miladinovic-wall-art-print): Flame by Serbian contemporary artist Natalija Miladinović showcases her signature blend of emotional symbolism and bold expression. Known for her exploration of identity, intuition and the inner world, Miladinović uses fiery tones and dynamic strokes to represent personal strength and transformation. The painting radiates warmth and intensity, capturing the moment where passion meets self-renewal. Rooted in European artistic tradition yet unmistakably modern, Flame brings dramatic energy and soulful depth to any space. Ideal for collectors who appreciate expressive figurative abstraction and art that celebrates resilience and emotional awakening. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright satin finish), Matte (low-reflective, art-optimized)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting color and sharp detail- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation options- Paper weights from 180–285 g/m² depending on paper and supplier- Rolled for safe shipping; blanks sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice)Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Flame by Natalija Miladinovic Matte Canvas Framed Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/flame-by-natalija-miladinovic-matte-canvas-framed-wall-art): Flame by Serbian contemporary artist Natalija Miladinović showcases her signature blend of emotional symbolism and bold expression. Known for her exploration of identity, intuition and the inner world, Miladinović uses fiery tones and dynamic strokes to represent personal strength and transformation. The painting radiates warmth and intensity, capturing the moment where passion meets self-renewal. Rooted in European artistic tradition yet unmistakably modern, Flame brings dramatic energy and soulful depth to any space. Ideal for collectors who appreciate expressive figurative abstraction and art that celebrates resilience and emotional awakening. Product features- Greenguard Gold- latex inks for high-quality, non-toxic prints- Durable cotton-polyester canvas with proprietary coating for vibrant color- Sustainably sourced radial pine frame (FSC) with multiple sizes/colors- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square formats with sawtooth hanging hardware- Matte finish and recessed framing for a gallery-style presentationCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [JMC-1970-1 by Jean-Michel Coulon Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/jmc-1970-1-by-jean-michel-coulon-wall-art-print): Created during Jean-Michel Coulon’s mature period, JMC-1970-1 showcases the French artist’s signature blend of structure and expressive energy. Known for working quietly in isolation, Coulon produced a vast, secret body of art that was only fully discovered after his death. His work reflects decades of disciplined exploration into colour, texture and spatial balance. This piece from 1970 highlights his mastery of building depth through layered geometric forms and nuanced tonal shifts. JMC-1970-1 brings a sophisticated and contemplative atmosphere to any contemporary space, appealing to collectors who appreciate understated yet powerful European abstraction. This poster sits naturally in a lived-in home office, an artist’s nook, or a modern living room. It complements mid-century and contemporary interiors, and adds a quiet, textural focal point above a console or leaning on a shelf. The color story reads as both calming and curious—invite it into a slow morning with coffee or a late-night creative session.Handmade appeal and archival inks mean the colors stay bright through regular light exposure. Adults only please; the scale and material are tailored for mature spaces and collector displays.Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured), Semi-Glossy (satin finish), Matte (subtle, low-sheen)- Archival Giclée print for bright, fade-resistant color- Multiple sizes and horizontal/vertical orientations available- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Ships rolled for safe delivery — blanks sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice)Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Three Children Thielska by Edvard Munch Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/three-children-thielska-by-edvard-munch-wall-art-print): Three Children (Thielska) embodies Edvard Munch’s deeply emotional approach to portraiture, shaped by a lifetime marked by loss, introspection, and artistic rebellion. Created during his productive years in Scandinavia, the painting reflects his evolving exploration of psychological states. Munch, best known for The Scream, sought to capture the inner lives of his subjects rather than their physical likeness. Here, the three children of the Thiel family are portrayed with quiet stillness, their expressions subtly revealing innocence touched by the complexity of growing up. This artwork blends symbolism, mood, and human fragility, making it a timeless piece for collectors and admirers. Product features- Available on three papers: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Glossy (bright satin), or Matte (low-reflective)- Giclée printing for vivid, fade-resistant color- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientations- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Shipped rolled for safe, easy framing and displayCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Painting of boy by Unknown Artist Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/painting-of-boy-by-unknown-artist-wall-art-print): This striking portrait captures a young boy illuminated by soft, natural light against a deep blue, textured background. His thoughtful expression, crossed arms, and finely rendered features create a sense of quiet confidence and introspection. The artist’s delicate brushwork highlights the contrast between the crisp white shirt and the rich, expressive strokes surrounding him. Perfect for adding elegance and emotional depth to any room, this artwork enhances modern, minimalist, and classic interiors alike. Ideal for collectors seeking unique portrait art, this piece brings warmth, presence, and timeless charm to your home or gallery wall.Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Gloss (bright satin), Matte (soft, low-sheen)- Giclée printing for bright, fade-resistant color- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation options- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Gloss and Matte options vary by supplier- Shipped rolled for safe delivery; sourced from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Painting of boy by Unknown Artist Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/painting-of-boy-by-unknown-artist-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): This striking portrait captures a young boy illuminated by soft, natural light against a deep blue, textured background. His thoughtful expression, crossed arms, and finely rendered features create a sense of quiet confidence and introspection. The artist’s delicate brushwork highlights the contrast between the crisp white shirt and the rich, expressive strokes surrounding him. Perfect for adding elegance and emotional depth to any room, this artwork enhances modern, minimalist, and classic interiors alike. Ideal for collectors seeking unique portrait art, this piece brings warmth, presence, and timeless charm to your home or gallery wall. Product features- Greenguard Gold  inks for safe, high-fidelity color- Sustainable radial pine frame from FSC renewable forests- Cotton-poly composite canvas with proprietary matte coating- Non-toxic latex inks and archival-quality print durability- Multiple sizes and frame colors; sawtooth hanging hardware includedCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Painting of girl by Unknown Artist Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/painting-of-girl-by-unknown-artist-wall-art-print): This captivating portrait features a young girl rendered in soft, luminous tones against a richly textured blue background. The artist’s delicate brushwork highlights her gentle expression, pale hair, and thoughtful pose, creating a serene and introspective atmosphere. Subtle details—such as the golden earring and the crisp white clothing—add elegance and refinement to the composition. The swirling blue backdrop contrasts beautifully with her calm presence, giving the piece depth and emotional resonance. Perfect for adding sophistication and quiet beauty to any interior, this artwork brings a sense of calm, sensitivity, and timeless portraiture to your space. Product features- Three paper options: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Glossy (bright satin), Matte (subtle, low-sheen)- Giclée print quality for bright, fade-resistant colors- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical layouts- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Shipped rolled for protection; sourced blanks from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice)Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Painting of girl by Unknown Artist Framed Matte Canvas Classic Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/painting-of-girl-by-unknown-artist-framed-matte-canvas-classic-wall-art): This captivating portrait features a young girl rendered in soft, luminous tones against a richly textured blue background. The artist’s delicate brushwork highlights her gentle expression, pale hair, and thoughtful pose, creating a serene and introspective atmosphere. Subtle details—such as the golden earring and the crisp white clothing—add elegance and refinement to the composition. The swirling blue backdrop contrasts beautifully with her calm presence, giving the piece depth and emotional resonance. Perfect for adding sophistication and quiet beauty to any interior, this artwork brings a sense of calm, sensitivity, and timeless portraiture to your space. Product features- Greenguard Gold  latex inks for safe, vivid color- Cotton–polyester canvas with proprietary matte coating for crisp detail- Sustainably sourced radial pine frame in multiple color options- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square sizes with sawtooth hanging hardware- Non-toxic, durable printing process with bright, long-lasting colorsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [JMC-1970-3 by Jean-Michel Coulon Matte Canvas Framed Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/jmc-1970-3-by-jean-michel-coulon-matte-canvas-framed-wall-art-print): Bring refined European abstraction into your space with JMC-1970-3 by French artist Jean-Michel Coulon. Part of a remarkable body of work discovered after his death, this 1970 painting reflects Coulon’s disciplined approach to colour, form, and structure. Influenced by the post-war modernist movement, he developed a unique language of geometric harmony and subtle emotion. JMC-1970-3 combines layered tones and carefully balanced shapes, creating a sophisticated focal point for contemporary interiors. This artwork embodies Coulon’s lifelong commitment to private creation and timeless design, offering a piece of authentic modern art history for your home. Product features- Greenguard Gold  inks for high-quality, low-emission prints- Sustainable radial pine frame sourced from FSC- wood- Vibrant, latex-based inks that are non-toxic and fade-resistant- Cotton/polyester canvas composite with proprietary matte coating- Includes sawtooth hanging hardware; multiple sizes and frame colors availableCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Closed Eyes by Odilon Redon Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/closed-eyes-by-odilon-redon-wall-art-print): Closed Eyes (1894) by Odilon Redon captures the quiet mystery of the Symbolist era. Redon, a French visionary painter and printmaker, explored the boundary between dreams and reality. In this haunting image, a woman’s face emerges from a soft, glowing haze—her eyes gently closed in spiritual reflection. Redon sought to paint the unseen, revealing the emotions and ideas beyond physical form. This museum-quality reproduction brings poetic serenity and timeless elegance to any space, embodying Redon’s belief that true beauty lies in imagination and the inner world. Product features- Available in multiple sizes to fit any space- Choose from three paper options: Fine Art, Semi-Glossy, and Matte- Crafted using high-quality Giclée printing for vibrant colors- Archival quality ensures your art will last and retain its beauty- Designed for adults, making it a perfect gift or decor piece for mature audiences.Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Closed Eyes by Odilon Redon Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/closed-eyes-by-odilon-redon-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Closed Eyes (1894) by Odilon Redon captures the quiet mystery of the Symbolist era. Redon, a French visionary painter and printmaker, explored the boundary between dreams and reality. In this haunting image, a woman’s face emerges from a soft, glowing haze—her eyes gently closed in spiritual reflection. Redon sought to paint the unseen, revealing the emotions and ideas beyond physical form. This museum-quality reproduction brings poetic serenity and timeless elegance to any space, embodying Redon’s belief that true beauty lies in imagination and the inner world. Product features- UL Greenguard Gold  inks for highest image quality- Sustainable pine frame from FSC- sources- Cotton-polyester canvas composite with proprietary matte coating- Non-toxic, latex-based inks with vibrant, long-lasting colors- Includes sawtooth hanging hardware; multiple sizes and frame colors availableCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Resting by Antonio Mancini Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/resting-by-antonio-mancini-wall-art-print): Resting by Antonio Mancini captures a moment of quiet introspection, rendered in his signature textured brushwork. Painted around 1882, this masterpiece reflects Mancini’s genius as one of Italy’s most expressive Realist painters. Known for his masterful use of light and shadow, Mancini brought deep emotion to intimate scenes. This stunning wall art poster highlights his ability to merge realism with impressionistic flair. Perfect for art lovers and collectors, Resting adds a timeless touch of European sophistication and romantic atmosphere to any space. A beautiful reminder of 19th-century artistry and human tenderness. Product features- Available in three premium paper options: Fine Art, Semi-Glossy, and Matte.- High-quality Giclée print ensures vibrant colors that resist fading over time.- Multiple sizes available to fit any space and preference.- Options for both horizontal and vertical orientations to suit your design needs.- Crafted from sourced materials in the USA and Japan, ensuring exceptional quality.Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Resting by Antonio Mancini Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/resting-by-antonio-mancini-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Resting by Antonio Mancini captures a moment of quiet introspection, rendered in his signature textured brushwork. Painted around 1882, this masterpiece reflects Mancini’s genius as one of Italy’s most expressive Realist painters. Known for his masterful use of light and shadow, Mancini brought deep emotion to intimate scenes. This stunning wall art poster highlights his ability to merge realism with impressionistic flair. Perfect for art lovers and collectors, Resting adds a timeless touch of European sophistication and romantic atmosphere to any space. A beautiful reminder of 19th-century artistry and human tenderness. Product features- Greenguard Gold UL- inks for superior image quality- Sustainably stretched on FSC- radial pine frames- Vibrant, crisp color reproduction with advanced printing techniques- Non-toxic latex inks on a cotton/polyester coated canvas- Includes pine frame, multiple size options, and sawtooth hanging hardwareCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Resting by Antonio Mancini  Framed Poster Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/resting-by-antonio-mancini-framed-poster-wall-art-print): Resting by Antonio Mancini captures a moment of quiet introspection, rendered in his signature textured brushwork. Painted around 1882, this masterpiece reflects Mancini’s genius as one of Italy’s most expressive Realist painters. Known for his masterful use of light and shadow, Mancini brought deep emotion to intimate scenes. This stunning wall art poster highlights his ability to merge realism with impressionistic flair. Perfect for art lovers and collectors, Resting adds a timeless touch of European sophistication and romantic atmosphere to any space. A beautiful reminder of 19th-century artistry and human tenderness. Product features- Two paper options: textured fine art (310 gsm) or bright semi-gloss photo (260 gsm).- Matte black 100% pinewood frame with brown paper backing and white mat.- Shatter-proof plexiglass cover for safe, clear display.- Pre-installed hanging hardware and rubber bumpers for easy, level mounting.- Ten sizes plus horizontal and vertical orientation choices; assembled in the USA.Care instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Resting by Antonio Mancini Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/resting-by-antonio-mancini-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Resting by Antonio Mancini captures a moment of quiet introspection, rendered in his signature textured brushwork. Painted around 1882, this masterpiece reflects Mancini’s genius as one of Italy’s most expressive Realist painters. Known for his masterful use of light and shadow, Mancini brought deep emotion to intimate scenes. This stunning wall art poster highlights his ability to merge realism with impressionistic flair. Perfect for art lovers and collectors, Resting adds a timeless touch of European sophistication and romantic atmosphere to any space. A beautiful reminder of 19th-century artistry and human tenderness.Printed using UL- Greenguard Gold inks on a cotton/poly canvas blend, the image retains subtle tonal variation and rich texture without glare. The inner radiata pine frame is sustainably sourced, and soft rubber corner dots protect your walls while keeping the piece steady. Available in multiple orientations and sizes, this canvas adapts to narrow hallways or wide living rooms without losing its contemplative mood.Product features- Stretched 1.25" wooden frame for gallery depth- Matte cotton/poly canvas with unique high-quality coating- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks (non-toxic)- Sustainably sourced radiata pine inner frame from FSC forests- Soft rubber dots and included back hanging for stable, wall-safe displayCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Follow by Christopher Le Brun Matte Framed Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/follow-by-christopher-le-brun-matte-framed-canvas-wall-art-print): Follow by Christopher Le Brun highlights the artist’s signature blend of expressive abstraction and classical influence. As a leading British painter and former Royal Academy President, Le Brun is celebrated for his rich colour palettes, lyrical brushwork and symbolic depth. This artwork features flowing movements and layered textures that draw the viewer forward, echoing the title’s theme of progression and discovery. Known for exploring emotion through colour and form, Le Brun’s paintings appear in major museum and private collections worldwide. Follow embodies his contemporary yet timeless style, making it a standout piece for collectors seeking refined, modern art. Product features- High-quality Greenguard Gold inks for vivid, safe color- Sustainably sourced radial pine frame from FSC- forests- Cotton-polyester canvas composite with proprietary coating for sharp detail- Non-toxic latex inks and UL- printing process- Multiple sizes and orientations; sawtooth hardware includedCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Follow by Christopher Le Brun Minimalist Modern Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/follow-by-christopher-le-brun-minimalist-modern-wall-art-print): Follow by Christopher Le Brun highlights the artist’s signature blend of expressive abstraction and classical influence. As a leading British painter and former Royal Academy President, Le Brun is celebrated for his rich colour palettes, lyrical brushwork and symbolic depth. This artwork features flowing movements and layered textures that draw the viewer forward, echoing the title’s theme of progression and discovery. Known for exploring emotion through colour and form, Le Brun’s paintings appear in major museum and private collections worldwide. Follow embodies his contemporary yet timeless style, making it a standout piece for collectors seeking refined, modern art. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright, satin finish), and Matte (art-optimized, low sheen).- Giclée printing for vivid, long-lasting color that resists regular sunlight exposure.- Multiple sizes available with horizontal and vertical orientation options.- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m² depending on source.- Sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice); shipped rolled for secure delivery.Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Follow by Christopher Le Brun Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/follow-by-christopher-le-brun-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Follow by Christopher Le Brun highlights the artist’s signature blend of expressive abstraction and classical influence. As a leading British painter and former Royal Academy President, Le Brun is celebrated for his rich colour palettes, lyrical brushwork and symbolic depth. This artwork features flowing movements and layered textures that draw the viewer forward, echoing the title’s theme of progression and discovery. Known for exploring emotion through colour and form, Le Brun’s paintings appear in major museum and private collections worldwide. Follow embodies his contemporary yet timeless style, making it a standout piece for collectors seeking refined, modern art. Product features- Matte, stretched cotton-poly canvas on a 1.25" pine frame- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for safe, vivid color- Soft rubber dots on back corners to keep the canvas steady when hung- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square orientations across 60 sizes- Sustainably sourced radiata pine frame from FSC- renewable forestsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Follow by Christopher Le Brun Framed Poster Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/follow-by-christopher-le-brun-framed-poster-wall-art-print): Follow by Christopher Le Brun highlights the artist’s signature blend of expressive abstraction and classical influence. As a leading British painter and former Royal Academy President, Le Brun is celebrated for his rich colour palettes, lyrical brushwork and symbolic depth. This artwork features flowing movements and layered textures that draw the viewer forward, echoing the title’s theme of progression and discovery. Known for exploring emotion through colour and form, Le Brun’s paintings appear in major museum and private collections worldwide. Follow embodies his contemporary yet timeless style, making it a standout piece for collectors seeking refined, modern art. Product features- Two paper options: fine art (310 gsm) or semi-gloss photo paper (260 gsm)- Matte black 100% pinewood frame with brown paper backing- Pre-installed hanging hardware and rubber bumpers for straight, protected mounting- Shatter-proof plexiglass cover; vibrant, crisp color reproduction- Available in 10 sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation optionsCare instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Farbfeld Malerei (Acryl) by Unknown Artist Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/farbfeld-malerei-acryl-by-unknown-artist-wall-art-print): Bring bold contemporary energy into your space with this vibrant acrylic abstract painting, a striking example of modern Farbfeld Malerei (Color Field Art). Built from layered blocks of intense colour—crimson, turquoise, magenta, yellow, black, and white—the composition radiates movement and balance. Thick horizontal and vertical strokes create a textured grid that feels both structured and expressive. The artwork’s luminous palette and dynamic rhythm make it a perfect statement piece for living rooms, offices, and creative interiors. Ideal for lovers of modern abstraction, this piece adds depth, personality, and gallery-worthy sophistication to any décor. Hang it to lift a room’s mood. Let the strong horizontal and vertical shapes anchor a workspace or compliment contemporary furnishings. The layered colors read differently in bright daylight and softer evening light, so the piece evolves with your space.Choose orientation and size that match your frame — horizontal for a low, wide composition or vertical to emphasize height. With archival inks and vibrant giclée printing, the palette stays vivid over time.Product features- Three paper options: Fine art (textured), Semi-glossy (satin), Matte (subtle)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting colors- Multiple sizes plus horizontal and vertical orientations- Rolled shipping for safe, easy framing- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Farbfeld Malerei (Acryl) by Unknown Artist Matte Canvas Print Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/farbfeld-malerei-acryl-by-unknown-artist-matte-canvas-print-wall-art): Bring bold contemporary energy into your space with this vibrant acrylic abstract painting, a striking example of modern Farbfeld Malerei (Color Field Art). Built from layered blocks of intense colour—crimson, turquoise, magenta, yellow, black, and white—the composition radiates movement and balance. Thick horizontal and vertical strokes create a textured grid that feels both structured and expressive. The artwork’s luminous palette and dynamic rhythm make it a perfect statement piece for living rooms, offices, and creative interiors. Ideal for lovers of modern abstraction, this piece adds depth, personality, and gallery-worthy sophistication to any décor. Product features- Matte, stretched canvas on 1.25" radial pine frame- Printed with non-toxic latex inks and UL- Greenguard Gold pigments- Proprietary coating for vivid, high-quality image reproduction- Sustainably sourced radiata pine frame from FSC- renewables- Soft rubber dots on back corners and included hanging hardwareCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Farbfeld Malerei (Acryl) by Unknown Artist Matte Framed Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/farbfeld-malerei-acryl-by-unknown-artist-matte-framed-canvas-wall-art-print): Bring bold contemporary energy into your space with this vibrant acrylic abstract painting, a striking example of modern Farbfeld Malerei (Color Field Art). Built from layered blocks of intense colour—crimson, turquoise, magenta, yellow, black, and white—the composition radiates movement and balance. Thick horizontal and vertical strokes create a textured grid that feels both structured and expressive. The artwork’s luminous palette and dynamic rhythm make it a perfect statement piece for living rooms, offices, and creative interiors. Ideal for lovers of modern abstraction, this piece adds depth, personality, and gallery-worthy sophistication to any décor. Product features- UL- Greenguard Gold inks for the highest image quality- Cotton-polyester canvas composite with proprietary coating for vivid, durable prints- Sustainably sourced radial pine frame with multiple sizes and frame colors available- Non-toxic latex inks — non-hazardous and non-flammable- Sawtooth hanging hardware included; horizontal, vertical, and square optionsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Sand by Natalia P Fernandes Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/sand-by-natalia-p-fernandes-wall-art-print): “Sand” by contemporary artist Natalia P. Fernandes captures the quiet poetry of natural landscapes through her signature blend of minimalism and emotional depth. Born in Portugal and influenced by the shifting textures of coastal environments, Fernandes channels her background in fine arts and environmental studies into works that explore harmony between land, light, and memory. In this painting, soft gradients and tactile brushwork evoke the warmth and movement of windswept dunes, creating a serene, meditative atmosphere. Ideal for modern interiors, “Sand” offers a refined balance of texture and calm, reflecting Fernandes’ devotion to organic beauty and thoughtful composition. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Glossy (bright photo satin), Matte (low-sheen art-optimized)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting color retention- Multiple sizes available with vertical and horizontal orientations- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m², Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m², Matte 189–200 g/m²- Rolled shipping;  product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice)Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Une liseuse de romans by Vincent Van Gogh Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/une-liseuse-de-romans-by-vincent-van-gogh-wall-art-print): In Madame Roulin Rocking the Cradle (La Berceuse), painted in 1889, Vincent van Gogh expresses maternal serenity through rhythmic brushwork and luminous color. Augustine Roulin, wife of his close friend Joseph Roulin, is depicted as the symbol of nurturing love. Created during Van Gogh’s stay in Arles, the painting reflects his yearning for peace amid emotional turbulence. The golden background and rocking motion evoke a lullaby’s gentle rhythm. This stunning reproduction embodies Van Gogh’s passion and empathy, turning any room into a warm sanctuary. Ideal for art lovers who appreciate emotional depth and timeless post-impressionist beauty. Product features- Made with semi-glossy paper for sharp color fidelity.- Available in a lighter matte paper for a classic look.- Crafted from fine art paper for an archival-quality feel.- Giclée prints ensure bright and lasting colors.- Choose from various sizes and orientations to fit your space. Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Madame Roulin Rocking the Cradle (La berceuse) by Vincent Van Gogh Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/madame-roulin-rocking-the-cradle-la-berceuse-by-vincent-van-gogh-wall-art-print): In Madame Roulin Rocking the Cradle (La Berceuse), painted in 1889, Vincent van Gogh expresses maternal serenity through rhythmic brushwork and luminous color. Augustine Roulin, wife of his close friend Joseph Roulin, is depicted as the symbol of nurturing love. Created during Van Gogh’s stay in Arles, the painting reflects his yearning for peace amid emotional turbulence. The golden background and rocking motion evoke a lullaby’s gentle rhythm. This stunning reproduction embodies Van Gogh’s passion and empathy, turning any room into a warm sanctuary. Ideal for art lovers who appreciate emotional depth and timeless post-impressionist beauty. Product features- Made with semi-glossy paper for sharp color fidelity.- Available in a lighter matte paper for a classic look.- Crafted from fine art paper for an archival-quality feel.- Giclée prints ensure bright and lasting colors.- Choose from various sizes and orientations to fit your space.Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [By The Sea by Piet Mondrian Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/by-the-sea-by-piet-mondrian-wall-art-print): By The Sea (1909) by Piet Mondrian reveals the origins of one of modern art’s most influential styles. Long before his famous grids, Mondrian studied the rhythm of light and horizon in this Dutch coastal view. The subtle transition between sea and sky hints at the geometric precision that would later shape his career. Professionally reproduced on archival matte paper, this elegant print merges natural calm with early modern abstraction — ideal for minimalist or contemporary interiors. Product features- Available in three paper options: Fine Art, Semi-Glossy, and Matte.- Giclée print technology ensures vibrant, long-lasting colors.- Multiple sizes and both horizontal and vertical options to suit any space.- Fine art paper options mirror the texture and quality of traditional artwork.- Created with archival-quality materials for lasting beauty.Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Rhinoceros wearing a business suit screaming aloud while seeing the stock price crash by Kazuo Shiraga Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/rhinoceros-wearing-a-business-suit-screaming-aloud-while-seeing-the-stock-price-crash-by-kazuo-shiraga-wall-art-print): Bold, chaotic, and unforgettable—Rhinoceros Wearing a Business Suit Screaming Aloud While Seeing the Stock Price Crash celebrates the explosive action-painting style of Kazuo Shiraga, a pioneer of Japan’s Gutai movement. Shiraga was renowned for creating abstract works using his entire body, expressing struggle and vitality through motion. This imaginative reinterpretation channels his energy into a surreal, contemporary concept—a rhinoceros embodying the madness of modern markets. Perfect for art lovers who appreciate avant-garde expression and bold conversation pieces, this high-quality print transforms any room with color, emotion, and power. Product features- Available in three paper options: Fine Art, Semi-Glossy, and Matte- Giclée print technology ensures vibrant, fade-resistant colors- Multiple sizes available to fit your space perfectly- Choose between horizontal and vertical orientation for versatile display- Made with premium quality paper sourced from the USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [The Yellow Scale by František Kupka Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/the-yellow-scale-by-frantisek-kupka-wall-art-print): Add a touch of art-world history to your décor with The Yellow Scale by František Kupka. Painted in Paris around 1907, this vibrant self-portrait reflects Kupka’s transition from Symbolism to abstract color theory. Known as one of the first artists to paint non-objective forms, Kupka used shades of yellow to express emotion and movement rather than realism. This high-quality reproduction celebrates freedom, creativity, and modern art’s bold beginnings — a perfect statement piece for any living room, studio, or office space. Product features- Available in three paper types: Semi-glossy, Matte, and Fine art, allowing for personalization based on aesthetic preferences.- Giclée prints ensure bright, vivid colors that resist fading, keeping your artwork vibrant over time.- Multiple sizes provide versatility to fit different wall spaces and styles.- Offer both horizontal and vertical orientations to match your design vision.- Sourced from high-quality materials in the USA and Japan, ensuring premium craftsmanship.Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth.EU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Generic brand, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: For adults, Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) Care instructions: If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Painting by ravi mandlik Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/painting-by-ravi-mandlik-wall-art-print): This striking painting by Ravi Mandlik, one of India’s leading contemporary abstract artists, showcases his masterful ability to translate energy, atmosphere, and emotion onto canvas. Trained at the prestigious Sir J. J. School of Art in Mumbai, Mandlik draws inspiration from nature’s elemental forces—wind, water, light, and shifting terrain. His layered textures, dynamic brushwork, and radiant colour fields create a sense of movement that feels both organic and spiritual. In this work, Mandlik’s signature balance of intuition and technique is unmistakable, offering a visually rich and contemplative piece that brings depth, sophistication, and modern elegance to any interior. Product features- Giclée printing for bright, fade-resistant color- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured), Semi-Glossy (satin), Matte (low-reflective)- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical options- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy and Matte options from 180–260 g/m²- Rolled for safe shipping; blanks sourced from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Weeki Wachee spring by Toni Frissell Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/weeki-wachee-spring-by-toni-frissell-wall-art-print): Weeki Wachee Spring captures the ethereal vision of renowned American photographer Toni Frissell, celebrated for her pioneering work in fashion, portrait, and underwater photography. Created during her groundbreaking explorations beneath the surface, this image showcases Frissell’s ability to transform water into a dreamlike stage of light, grace, and suspended movement. Her innovative use of natural spring environments—especially Florida’s crystal-clear Weeki Wachee—pushed the boundaries of photographic art in the mid-20th century. This piece reveals both her technical mastery and her poetic eye, resulting in a timeless, serene composition that continues to inspire collectors, designers, and lovers of atmospheric visual storytelling. Product features- Giclée prints with bright, fade-resistant color and deep blacks- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright satin finish), Matte (low-reflection)- Multiple sizes plus horizontal or vertical layout options- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Shipped rolled for protection; blank product sourced from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Little girl on the beach by Hans Olaf Heyerdahl Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/little-girl-on-the-beach-by-hans-olaf-heyerdahl-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): “Little Girl on the Beach” captures the quiet poetry of childhood through the delicate, naturalistic style of Norwegian painter Hans Olaf Heyerdahl. A leading figure of the late 19th-century Nordic art scene, Heyerdahl trained in Paris and Munich, where he embraced realism, atmospheric light, and intimate human moments. This serene coastal scene reflects his mastery of soft colour transitions and emotional subtlety, portraying a young girl absorbed in the seashore’s calm beauty. Perfect for collectors who value classical European artistry, this timeless work brings gentle warmth, coastal charm, and historical depth into any modern home or gallery space. Product features- Matte, textured cotton-poly canvas stretched on a 1.25" pine frame- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks — non-toxic and fade-resistant- Back-hanging hardware included plus soft rubber dots to keep the canvas level- Sustainably sourced radiata pine inner frame from FSC- renewable forests- Available in multiple orientations and 60 size options; slight size tolerance +/- 1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Matilda (formerly called Beatrice) by John William Waterhouse Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/matilda-formerly-called-beatrice-by-john-william-waterhouse-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Celebrate the enchanting world of John William Waterhouse with Matilda (originally titled Beatrice), a captivating example of his signature Pre-Raphaelite-inspired style. Waterhouse, known for painting mythic, literary, and feminine subjects with poetic realism, created this work in the late 19th century during a period when he explored intimate portraiture. Matilda reflects his mastery of soft light, delicate colour, and expressive character studies. The painting’s serene pose and thoughtful gaze reveal Waterhouse’s ability to blend narrative mystery with emotional depth. Ideal for art lovers drawn to romanticism and classical portraiture, this piece adds sophistication, beauty, and historical charm to any interior. Product features- Matte cotton-poly canvas with unique high-quality coating- Printed with non-toxic, UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks- Stretched on 1.25" radiata pine frame from renewable FSC sources- Back hanging hardware plus soft rubber dots to keep canvas steady- Available in multiple orientations and up to 60 sizes; tolerance ±1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [The Lady of Shalott by John William Waterhouse Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/the-lady-of-shalott-by-john-william-waterhouse-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Bring timeless Pre-Raphaelite beauty into your space with The Lady of Shalott by John William Waterhouse, painted in 1888. Waterhouse, celebrated for his luminous storytelling and romantic realism, draws inspiration from Alfred Tennyson’s iconic poem. This masterpiece captures the tragic heroine at the moment she breaks her curse, portrayed with exquisite detail, rich colour, and emotional intensity. The shimmering water, intricate tapestry, and expressive figure reflect Waterhouse’s mastery of light and narrative. Perfect for lovers of classical art, literature, and myth, this piece adds drama, elegance, and poetic depth to any room or gallery wall. Printed with archival, Greenguard Gold- latex inks on a cotton-polyester canvas, the image holds rich shadow detail and subtle color transitions without glare. The pine stretcher frame and included hanging hardware make installation straightforward, while soft rubber dots protect the wall and keep the piece steady. Choose from multiple orientations and sizes to suit the room and composition you want to emphasize.Product features- Matte stretched canvas printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for deep, durable color- Stretched over sustainably sourced radiata pine inner frame; cotton-polyester canvas blend- Soft rubber dots on bottom back corners to keep canvas steady and protect walls; back hanging included- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square formats across 60 size options- Slight size tolerance of +/- 1/8" due to handcrafted stretching processCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Raising the St George  by Unknown attributed to Joe Rosenthal Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/raising-the-st-george-by-unknown-attributed-to-joe-rosenthal-wall-art-print): Raising the St George is a striking reinterpretation of one of the most famous wartime photographs in history, long attributed to American photojournalist Joe Rosenthal, who captured the original Raising the Flag on Iwo Jima in 1945. While the creator of this altered artwork remains unknown, the piece draws its power from Rosenthal’s legacy of documenting resilience and sacrifice. By replacing the original flag with the St George-inspired Union motif, the artwork transforms a global symbol of victory into a fresh cultural statement. This production celebrates both the historic moment that inspired it and the creative reimagining that gives it new life today. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured/archival), Semi-Glossy (bright satin), or Matte (subtle, low sheen)- Giclée print quality for vivid, long-lasting color and sharp detail- Multiple sizes available with horizontal and vertical orientation options- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m² depending on supplier- Carefully rolled for shipping; blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice) — adults onlyCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Raising the Union Jack by Unknown attributed to Joe Rosenthal Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/raising-the-union-jack-by-unknown-attributed-to-joe-rosenthal-wall-art-print): Raising the Union Jack is a striking reinterpretation of one of the most famous wartime photographs in history, long attributed to American photojournalist Joe Rosenthal, who captured the original Raising the Flag on Iwo Jima in 1945. While the creator of this altered artwork remains unknown, the piece draws its power from Rosenthal’s legacy of documenting resilience and sacrifice. By replacing the original flag with the St George-inspired Union motif, the artwork transforms a global symbol of victory into a fresh cultural statement. This production celebrates both the historic moment that inspired it and the creative reimagining that gives it new life today. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright, satin finish), Matte (low sheen for artwork)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting colors and rich blacks- Multiple sizes available with horizontal and vertical orientation options- Paper weights listed: Fine Art 285 g/m², Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m², Matte 189–200 g/m²- Shipped rolled for protection; sourced blanks from USA and Japan;  productCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [The Mummy 1932 film poster by Karoly Grosz Wall Art Print (Karloff "It Comes to Life!") - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/the-mummy-1932-film-poster-by-karoly-grosz-wall-art-print-karloff-it-comes-to-life): This iconic 1932 The Mummy film poster is widely attributed to Universal Pictures’ in-house illustrator Karoly Grosz, a master of early Hollywood poster art known for his dramatic compositions and bold colour palettes. Grosz’s work helped define Universal’s classic horror aesthetic, using striking visual storytelling to evoke mystery, atmosphere, and supernatural allure. This poster captures Boris Karloff’s unforgettable portrayal of the resurrected priest Imhotep, blending Art Deco influences with haunting pulp style. Our production offers a meticulously restored reproduction, preserving the vintage textures, painterly gradients, and expressive hand-rendered typography that made the original artwork a defining piece of early cinema history. Product features- Three paper finishes: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Glossy (satin photo bright), Matte (art-optimized, low sheen)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting color that resists fading- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical layout options- Rolled packaging for safe shipping; sourced blanks from USA and Japan- Paper weights range by option (Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte ~189–200 g/m²)Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Gassed by John Singer Sargent (RA) Framed Matte Canvas Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/gassed-by-john-singer-sargent-ra-framed-matte-canvas-print): Gassed is one of John Singer Sargent’s most powerful and poignant works, created in 1919 after his visit to the Western Front during World War I. Known for his refined portraiture and fluid realism, Sargent (RA) shifted to a raw, documentary style to capture the human cost of war. The painting depicts soldiers temporarily blinded by mustard gas, guided in a line toward  care, their vulnerability contrasted with a distant football game. Our production faithfully reproduces Sargent’s dramatic composition, muted palette, and emotive brushwork, preserving the intensity and historical weight of this unforgettable masterpiece of war art. Product features- UL- Greenguard Gold inks for safe, high-quality prints- Cotton-polyester canvas composite with proprietary matte coating- Sustainably sourced radial pine frame (FSC) with multiple color options- Durable, non-toxic latex inks that preserve vibrant colors- Sawtooth hanging hardware included; horizontal, vertical, and square sizes availableCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Lisbon falls by Kinga Ogieglo Matte Canvas Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/lisbon-falls-by-kinga-ogieglo-matte-canvas-wall-art): Lisbon Falls reflects Kinga Ogieglo’s distinctive talent for transforming natural scenery into emotionally charged, contemporary art. Known for her textured mixed-media approach and soft, atmospheric palettes, Ogieglo blends abstraction with gentle realism to capture the rhythm and serenity of cascading water. This piece showcases her signature layering techniques, where subtle tones and delicate brushwork create depth, movement, and a sense of quiet immersion. Our production faithfully preserves Ogieglo’s nuanced textures and luminous transitions, highlighting the artist’s ability to evoke calm, reflection, and connection to nature. A striking modern artwork, Lisbon Falls brings a tranquil, sophisticated presence to any space. Product features- Stretched matte canvas on 1.25" pine frame- Printed with non-toxic UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks- Soft rubber dots on back to hold canvas steady- Sustainably sourced radiata pine inner frame from FSC- forests- Available in multiple sizes and orientations; slight size tolerance +/-1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Woman's Head against a Red Background by Edvard Munch Matte Canvas Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/womans-head-against-a-red-background-by-edvard-munch-matte-canvas-wall-art): Woman's Head Against a Red Background by Edvard Munch captures the psychological depth and emotional turbulence that defined the Norwegian artist’s groundbreaking career. Created during a period when Munch explored themes of love, anxiety, and the human condition, this work reflects his signature use of bold colour and expressive brushwork. The intense red backdrop heightens the sense of inner drama, while the solitary female figure echoes Munch’s preoccupation with identity and vulnerability. Rooted in the same artistic spirit that produced The Scream, this painting showcases Munch’s ability to merge emotion with symbolism, resulting in a haunting, unforgettable visual experience. Product features- Matte cotton-poly canvas with unique high-quality image coating- Stretched on radiata pine inner frame from FSC- renewable forests- Printed with non-toxic, UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks- Soft rubber dots on back plus included hanging hardware to keep it steady- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square orientations across 60 sizesCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Under the Linden by Helene Schjerfbeck Soft Pastel Portrait Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/under-the-linden-by-helene-schjerfbeck-soft-pastel-portrait-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Under the Linden by Helene Schjerfbeck reflects the Finnish modernist’s delicate balance of simplicity, emotion, and refined technique. Painted during a period when Schjerfbeck increasingly embraced minimalism and soft, distilled forms, this work captures her gift for portraying quiet introspection. The gentle scene beneath the linden tree evokes themes of memory, passage of time, and the quiet poetry of everyday life. Schjerfbeck, known for her evolving style and deeply personal approach to portraiture and stillness, brings a subtle luminosity to this composition. Under the Linden highlights her mastery of mood, offering a serene yet poignant moment shaped by her lifelong artistic evolution. Product features- Matte stretched canvas with 1.25" profile for a gallery look- High-quality UL- Greenguard Gold inks with unique coating for rich, accurate color- Sustainably built: radiata pine inner frame from FSC- renewable forests- Printed with non-toxic latex inks; materials: cotton/polyester canvas and pine frame- Soft rubber dots on back corners and included back hanging; multiple sizes and orientations availableCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Bride and Bridesmaid by Unknown Artist Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/bride-and-bridesmaid-by-unknown-artist-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): This vibrant contemporary painting presents a striking expressive portrait of a woman and child, rendered in bold colour and energetic brushwork. Set against a radiant yellow background, the figures appear almost dreamlike, their forms shaped by sweeping strokes of red, blue, pink, and white. The woman’s flowing dress and the child’s oversized bow evoke themes of celebration, heritage, and memory. Rich texture and layered paint give the piece a lively, modern character while maintaining an emotional warmth. Perfect for collectors of contemporary expressionism, this artwork adds colour, movement, and personality to any interior space. - [Nighthawks by Edward Hopper Matte Stretched Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/nighthawks-by-edward-hopper-matte-stretched-canvas-wall-art-print): Nighthawks by Edward Hopper is one of the most iconic paintings in American art, capturing the quiet isolation of urban life in the early 1940s. Hopper, known for his masterful use of light, shadow, and mood, created this scene during a period when he focused intensely on loneliness and modern city experiences. The diner’s harsh fluorescent glow illuminates four figures who seem emotionally distant despite their physical closeness. Hopper drew inspiration from New York’s late-night streets, translating everyday moments into powerful narratives. Nighthawks remains a defining example of his realist style, blending cinematic atmosphere with profound psychological depth. This canvas is for the viewer who cherishes atmosphere over bustle. It reads like a pause between moments: late-night city lights, a lone booth, and the hush that follows closing time. Place it above a sofa, along a stair run, or in a home office to introduce mood without shouting. The subdued matte surface reduces glare and keeps the colors true from most angles, so the picture ages gracefully alongside your daily routines.Product features- Matte stretched canvas with cotton-poly blend for a smooth, low-glare finish- Stretched on radiata pine frame from FSC- renewable forests- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color- Soft rubber dots on back to protect surfaces and provide stable hanging- Available in multiple orientations and sizes; +/- 1/8" size tolerance notedCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Yonkers by Edward Hopper Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/yonkers-by-edward-hopper-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Yonkers by Edward Hopper reflects the artist’s keen interest in American architecture and the quiet, often overlooked corners of urban life. Painted during a period when Hopper focused on capturing the mood of small towns and city outskirts, this work highlights his signature interplay of light and shadow. The scene’s crisp geometry, muted palette, and sense of stillness echo Hopper’s fascination with isolation and the narratives hidden within everyday spaces. Drawing on his lifelong study of buildings, railways, and transitional landscapes, Yonkers reveals the artist’s talent for turning ordinary vistas into evocative, contemplative moments that resonate with timeless American character. Product features - Matte cotton-poly canvas with textured finish for reduced glare and painterly depth - Stretched on 1.25" radiata pine stretcher made from FSC- renewable forests - Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for non-toxic, durable color - Soft rubber dots on back corners and included hanging hardware for stable installation - Available in 60 sizes and multiple orientations; slight size tolerance +/- 1/8" Care instructions - If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [New York movie by Edward hopper Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/new-york-movie-by-edward-hopper-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): New York Movie by Edward Hopper showcases the artist’s fascination with solitude amid bustling modern life. Painted in 1939, during an era when Hopper explored the emotional tension between public spaces and private thoughts, this work captures a quiet moment inside a Manhattan cinema. The usherette, bathed in soft golden light, stands apart from the theatre’s rich red interior and shadowy audience. Hopper drew inspiration from countless hours spent sketching in New York movie houses, observing their distinctive architecture and atmosphere. New York Movie reflects his masterful ability to blend realism, mood, and psychological depth, transforming an everyday scene into a poignant narrative. Product features- Premium matte coating with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for vivid, long-lasting color- Stretched on sustainable radiata pine frame from FSC- renewable sources- Soft rubber dots on bottom back corners to keep the canvas secure and level- Back hanging hardware included; available in horizontal, vertical, and square orientations- Printed on cotton-poly canvas; production tolerance +/- 1/8" (3.2mm)Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract
