- [The reading girl by Theodore Roussel Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/the-reading-girl-by-theodore-roussel-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): The Reading Girl by Théodore Roussel reflects the French-born, British-based artist’s refined command of light, intimacy, and domestic realism. Painted during a period when Roussel was deeply influenced by Whistler and the aesthetics of the London art scene, this work captures a quiet, contemplative moment. The young girl, absorbed in her book, conveys the artist’s fascination with private interior life and subtle emotional nuance. Roussel’s delicate brushwork, gentle tones, and careful composition reveal his mastery of atmospheric calm. The Reading Girl stands as a testament to his ability to transform everyday scenes into elegant, poetic studies of mood and character. Product features- Matte, stretched canvas on 1.25" pine frame- UL‑ Greenguard Gold inks with JONDO coating for high image quality- Printed with non-toxic latex inks on cotton/poly canvas- Soft rubber dots on back corners and included hanging hardware- Sustainably sourced radiata pine frame; available in many sizes and orientationsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Nu de dos sur un canapé rouge by Félix Vallotton Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/nu-de-dos-sur-un-canape-rouge-by-felix-vallotton-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Nu de dos sur un canapé rouge by Félix Vallotton reflects the Swiss-French artist’s mastery of bold composition, emotional restraint, and refined modernism. Vallotton, a prominent member of the Nabis group, was known for his striking use of flat colour, simplified forms, and expressive silhouettes—qualities that define this intimate interior scene. The nude figure, viewed from behind and set against a vivid red sofa, showcases his ability to blend sensuality with structural clarity. Painted during a period when Vallotton explored psychological tension and the quiet drama of domestic spaces, this work highlights his distinctive balance of elegance, mystery, and modern aesthetic boldness. Product features- Matte cotton-poly canvas with low-glare finish- Stretched on 1.25" radial pine frame from renewable forests- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for rich, safe color- Soft rubber dots and included back-hanging hardware for secure, level display- Available in multiple orientations and sizes; slight size tolerance +/- 1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Adele Bloch-Bauer by Gustav Klimt Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/adele-bloch-bauer-by-gustav-klimt-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Adele Bloch-Bauer I by Gustav Klimt is one of the most iconic portraits of the early 20th century, created during the artist’s famed Golden Period. Klimt, a leading figure of the Vienna Secession, was celebrated for his fusion of symbolism, Art Nouveau elegance, and luxurious decorative detail. Completed in 1907, this masterpiece portrays Adele Bloch-Bauer—an influential Viennese patron—surrounded by shimmering gold leaf, intricate patterns, and geometric motifs inspired by Byzantine art. The painting embodies Klimt’s fascination with beauty, sensuality, and ornamentation, transforming a traditional portrait into a radiant, almost mystical celebration of form, texture, and opulent modernism. Product features- Stretched 1.25" radial pine frame with back-hanging included- Soft rubber dots on back corners keep the canvas steady and protect walls- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color- Cotton-poly canvas with a unique coating for high-detail, matte finish- Sustainably sourced radiata pine frame; available in many sizes and orientationsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [When she finally woke the world around her had changed unrecognizably by Hennie Niemann jnr Framed Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/when-she-finally-woke-the-world-around-her-had-changed-unrecognizably-by-hennie-niemann-jnr-framed-wall-art-print): Hennie Niemann jnr, a celebrated South African contemporary painter, brings his expressive style to When She Finally Woke the World Around Her Had Changed Unrecognizably (2020). Known for his dynamic brushwork and emotionally charged compositions, Niemann captures a moment of profound transformation. The figure’s awakening is echoed in shifting tones, layered textures, and subtle movement across the canvas, creating a sense of change and renewal. This premium reproduction highlights the original’s rich oil-based depth, making it an elegant centrepiece for modern interiors. A compelling work that reflects Niemann’s mastery of colour, gesture, and psychological storytelling. Product features- Two paper options: fine art (310 gsm) or semi-gloss (260 gsm) for different textures and finishes- Matte black 100% pinewood frame with brown paper backing and shatter-proof plexiglass- Pre-installed hanging hardware plus rubber bumpers to protect walls and keep frame level- Vibrant, high-fidelity color reproduction using modern printing techniques- Ten sizes available with horizontal and vertical orientation choices, assembled in the USACare instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [When she finally woke the world around her had changed unrecognizably by Hennie Niemann jnr Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/when-she-finally-woke-the-world-around-her-had-changed-unrecognizably-by-hennie-niemann-jnr-canvas-wall-art-print): Hennie Niemann jnr, a celebrated South African contemporary painter, brings his expressive style to When She Finally Woke the World Around Her Had Changed Unrecognizably (2020). Known for his dynamic brushwork and emotionally charged compositions, Niemann captures a moment of profound transformation. The figure’s awakening is echoed in shifting tones, layered textures, and subtle movement across the canvas, creating a sense of change and renewal. This premium reproduction highlights the original’s rich oil-based depth, making it an elegant centrepiece for modern interiors. A compelling work that reflects Niemann’s mastery of colour, gesture, and psychological storytelling. Lightweight and ready to hang, the piece arrives with built-in hanging hardware and soft rubber dots on the back to protect walls and keep the canvas sitting true. Printed with low-VOC, UL Greenguard Gold inks on a durable cotton-poly canvas and stretched over responsibly sourced pine, it blends artisanal look with conscientious materials. Choose from vertical, horizontal, or square orientations and multiple sizes to suit your wall and sightline.Product features- Matte stretched cotton–poly canvas printed with UL Greenguard Gold latex inks- Stretched on renewable radiata pine frame with built-in hanging hardware- Soft rubber dots on back corners to protect walls and keep canvas level- Available in vertical, horizontal, and square formats across 60 sizes- Printed with non-toxic, non-flammable latex inks; size tolerance ±1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [self-portrait by Ellen Thesleff Framed Art Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/self-portrait-by-ellen-thesleff-framed-art-wall-art-print): Self-Portrait by Ellen Thesleff reveals the visionary strength of one of Finland’s earliest female modernists. Trained in Helsinki and influenced by European avant-garde movements, Thesleff forged her own expressive language. This portrait reflects her inner independence, using energetic lines and atmospheric colour to demonstrate a fearless self-awareness. Rather than presenting a literal likeness, she paints emotion, movement, and artistic identity. The work marks a turning point in her career as she moved toward increasingly expressive, almost musical compositions. Perfect for collectors who appreciate meaningful art history, this print brings the bold, pioneering spirit of Thesleff into any contemporary living space. Product features- Two paper options: 310 gsm fine art or 260 gsm semi-gloss photo paper- Matte black 100% pinewood frame with brown paper backing- Shatter‑proof plexiglass glazing for safe display- Pre‑installed top hanging hardware and rubber bumpers included- Available in 10 sizes with horizontal and vertical orientationsCare instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Thyra Elisabeth by Ellen Thesleff Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/thyra-elisabeth-by-ellen-thesleff-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Thyra Elisabeth showcases Ellen Thesleff’s mastery as a pioneering Finnish modernist. Born in 1869, Thesleff gained recognition for her expressive technique, bold colour choices, and ability to capture emotional depth. This portrait reflects her early interest in Symbolism, blending delicate details with atmospheric tones that hint at the sitter’s inner world. Thesleff’s brushwork is both confident and poetic, revealing a personal connection to her subject. The painting marks her transition toward a freer, more intuitive style. Perfect for modern interiors, this artwork brings a sense of Nordic elegance and the visionary spirit of one of Finland’s most influential female artists. Product features- Matte cotton-poly canvas with low-reflective finish- Stretched on 1.25" radial pine inner frame from FSC- forests- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for high-quality, non-toxic color- Soft rubber dots and included back hanging for stable, damage-free display- Available in multiple orientations and sizes; slight size tolerance +/- 1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Bee Garden by Norman Barrett Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/bee-garden-by-norman-barrett-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): “Bee Garden” by Norman Barrett celebrates the artist’s passion for vivid, nature-driven artwork. Barrett’s background in contemporary floral painting shines through in this radiant field of orange and yellow blossoms, rendered with vibrant tones and soft atmospheric depth. Known for capturing the emotional warmth of outdoor landscapes, Barrett transforms a simple garden into a glowing, uplifting visual experience. This artwork is perfect for brightening living rooms, bedrooms, hallways, and creative spaces. Its joyful palette and modern aesthetic make it a bestselling choice for customers who love bold colour, floral themes, and high-quality wall art inspired by the beauty of nature. Product features- Greenguard Gold- latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color- Proprietary cotton-poly coating for sharp detail and matte texture- Sustainably sourced radial pine frame with multiple finish options- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square sizes with sawtooth hanger- Durable, non-flammable materials and eco-friendly productionCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Portrait of a Lady by Rogier van der Weyden Matte Canvas Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/portrait-of-a-lady-by-rogier-van-der-weyden-matte-canvas-wall-art): Portrait of a Lady by Rogier van der Weyden is a masterpiece of Northern Renaissance portraiture, created by one of the 15th century’s most influential Flemish painters. Van der Weyden was celebrated for his emotional depth, refined technique and exquisite attention to detail. This portrait showcases his ability to convey quiet dignity through delicate modelling, crisp lines and a striking geometric composition. The sitter’s serene expression and elegant attire reflect the courtly sophistication of Burgundian culture. Reproduced as premium wall art, this timeless work brings the grace and craftsmanship of early Renaissance painting into any modern interior. Product features- Matte, non-glare finish with high-detail image reproduction- Stretched over a 1.25" radiata pine frame with included back hanging- Printed with UL Greenguard Gold– latex inks for archival safety- Soft rubber dots on back corners to keep the canvas secure and level- Available in multiple orientations and sizes; slight size tolerance ±1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Femme nue tenant un livre by Félix Vallotton Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/femme-nue-tenant-un-livre-by-felix-vallotton-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Femme nue tenant un livre showcases Félix Vallotton’s signature blend of simplicity, elegance and emotional depth. Vallotton, a leading member of the Nabis movement, revolutionised modern art with his bold contours, flattened forms and subtle tension. Painted in the early 20th century, this work captures a moment of quiet introspection as a nude figure holds a book with poised serenity. The refined palette, clean lines and controlled composition reflect Vallotton’s mastery of both painting and printmaking. Reproduced as premium wall art, it brings the sophistication and calm beauty of Vallotton’s modernist vision into any contemporary interior. Product features- Matte, glare-reducing finish on cotton-poly canvas for vivid, painterly detail- Stretched over 1.25" radial pine frame made from FSC-sourced renewable wood- Printed with non-toxic latex inks and UL Greenguard Gold- pigment for safe indoor air quality- Soft rubber dots on back corners and included hanging hardware for stable, ready-to-display mounting- Available in multiple orientations and sizes; slight size tolerance +/- 1/8" due to productionCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Amparo by Isidre Nonell Matte Stretched Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/amparo-by-isidre-nonell-matte-stretched-canvas-wall-art-print): Amparo (1902) is a powerful work by Isidre Nonell, the influential Catalan painter known for his deeply expressive portraits of marginalised women in early 20th-century Barcelona. Nonell’s art challenged social norms, capturing dignity, solitude and resilience with raw honesty. In Amparo, his bold brushwork and earthy palette emphasise both vulnerability and inner strength. The sitter’s downward gaze invites quiet reflection, showcasing Nonell’s unique ability to blend emotion with modernist experimentation. Reproduced as premium wall art, this piece brings a moving, humanistic moment from Spanish art history into any contemporary interior. Product features- Stretched cotton-poly matte canvas on 1.25" radiata pine frame- Printed with UL Greenguard Gold-, non-toxic latex inks- Soft rubber dots on back corners to keep canvas stable when hung- Sustainably sourced pine frame from FSC- renewable forests- Available in 60 sizes and multiple orientations; back hanging includedCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [La Chata by Isidre Nonell Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/la-chata-by-isidre-nonell-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Isidre Nonell, celebrated for his emotionally resonant depictions of working-class women, created La Chata as part of his groundbreaking portrait series. The painting’s rich ochre tones, deliberate shadows and sculptural brushwork reveal Nonell’s mastery of both mood and form. Known for his courage in challenging artistic conventions, Nonell transformed everyday subjects into profound visual statements. La Chata exemplifies this vision, offering an intimate, quietly powerful presence. This refined reproduction captures every textured nuance, delivering a timeless piece of Spanish modernism that lends sophistication, depth and emotional gravity to contemporary interiors. - [Nu au lit by Félix Vallotto Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/nu-au-lit-by-felix-vallotto-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Nu au lit by Félix Vallotton, a leading figure of the Nabis movement, captures the quiet poetry of intimate everyday moments. Vallotton, known for his bold lines and emotional restraint, brings a refined elegance to this tender scene of a reclining nude. Painted during a period when the artist explored sensuality with subtle tension, the work reflects his mastery of colour, shape and atmosphere. This reproduction celebrates Vallotton’s unique blend of realism and symbolism, offering a timeless piece of French modern art for your wall. A sophisticated choice for collectors who appreciate understated beauty and artistic heritage. - [The Two Graces by Odilon Redon Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/the-two-graces-by-odilon-redon-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Odilon Redon’s The Two Graces captures the Symbolist painter’s devotion to exploring the unseen world of dreams and myth. Known for his imaginative palette and deeply introspective themes, Redon moved away from Realism and into spiritual expression, shaping the course of modern art. This painting reflects his late-career brilliance, where bright, layered pigments replaced the dark tones of his earlier works. The two figures, serene and luminous, embody harmony and feminine strength. This premium reproduction celebrates Redon’s distinctive vision—ideal for art lovers seeking a contemplative, colourful work that bridges symbolism, fantasy, and emotional depth. Product features- Archival-quality matte coating with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks- Stretched on sustainable radiata pine frame (FSC-sourced)- Soft rubber dots on back to protect walls and stabilize hanging- Cotton-poly canvas composite with painterly texture- Available in multiple orientations and sizes; back-hanging hardware includedCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Le Silence by Odilon Redon Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/le-silence-by-odilon-redon-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Odilon Redon’s Le Silence showcases the Symbolist painter’s mastery of mood and atmosphere. A central figure in late 19th-century French art, Redon sought to depict the emotional and spiritual realm rather than the visible world. Created during a period when his palette shifted toward soft, radiant colours, this piece embodies the tranquillity and introspection that define his mature style. The gentle hues and delicate shading evoke a meditative stillness that invites viewers inward. This high-quality reproduction introduces a refined, contemplative presence to any space, perfect for admirers of Symbolism, modernist colour work, and expressive, dreamlike imagery. Product features- Matte cotton-poly canvas with non-reflective finish- Stretched on radiata pine frame from FSC- renewable forests- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for high-quality, non-toxic color- Soft rubber dots on back to keep canvas stable when hung- Available in multiple orientations and 60 size options; back hanging includedCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [La loge de theatre by Félix Vallotton Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/la-loge-de-theatre-by-felix-vallotton-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Félix Vallotton’s La loge de théâtre showcases his mastery of observation and minimalist detail. A Swiss-French painter and a core member of the Nabis movement, Vallotton pushed against academic norms with bold lines, flat planes, and atmospheric restraint. This painting depicts a couple seated in a theatre box, their composed presence contrasted with the lively world beyond. Created during Vallotton’s mature period, it highlights his interest in social behaviour and subtle emotional tension. This high-quality reproduction brings a refined sense of modernity and cultural sophistication to any interior, ideal for lovers of Symbolism and early modern French art. Product features- Matte stretched canvas with 1.25" profile- Printed with non-toxic latex inks and Greenguard Gold- coating- Stretched on FSC- radiata pine inner frame- Soft rubber back dots and included hanging hardware for secure display- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square sizes with ±1/8" toleranceCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Andrevanb Panneau Décoratif by Odilon Redon Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/andrevanb-panneau-decoratif-by-odilon-redon-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Renowned Symbolist painter Odilon Redon crafted Andrevanb Panneau Décoratif during the height of his exploration of colour, light and decorative design. Redon’s artistic journey—from melancholy charcoal drawings to joyful, radiant palettes—defined him as a master of mood and imagination. This panel captures his later focus on uplifting, harmonious compositions inspired by mythology, nature and spirituality. With its gentle tones and softly layered forms, the work reveals Redon’s intention to enrich interiors with emotional warmth and dreamlike beauty. Ideal for modern or classic settings, this piece brings a touch of Redon’s visionary artistry into the contemporary home. Product features- Matte, stretched canvas with 1.25" depth- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks (non-toxic)- Proprietary coating for high image quality- Stretched on radiata pine from FSC- renewable forests- Soft rubber dots and included back hanging for stable, easy displayCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Nu au lit by Félix Vallotto  Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/nu-au-lit-by-felix-vallotto-wall-art-print): Nu au lit by Félix Vallotton, a leading figure of the Nabis movement, captures the quiet poetry of intimate everyday moments. Vallotton, known for his bold lines and emotional restraint, brings a refined elegance to this tender scene of a reclining nude. Painted during a period when the artist explored sensuality with subtle tension, the work reflects his mastery of colour, shape and atmosphere. This reproduction celebrates Vallotton’s unique blend of realism and symbolism, offering a timeless piece of French modern art for your wall. A sophisticated choice for collectors who appreciate understated beauty and artistic heritage.Printed with archival-quality giclée inks, the image keeps its depth and subtle color transitions whether you choose a textured fine art paper, a satin semi-gloss, or a subdued matte finish. Available in horizontal and vertical orientations and multiple sizes, this poster lets you choose how boldly — or softly — it joins your space.Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright, satin finish), Matte (lightweight, low-reflective)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting color and fine detail- Multiple sizes plus horizontal and vertical layout options- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Blank product sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice); for adultsCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Consuelo by Isidre Nonell Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/consuelo-by-isidre-nonell-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Consuelo by Isidre Nonell captures the emotional intensity that defined the Catalan artist’s career. Born in Barcelona in 1872, Nonell became known for painting society’s overlooked figures with deep empathy and expressive colour. In Consuelo, he portrays a contemplative woman using bold brushwork and muted tones, reflecting his signature post-Impressionist style. The painting’s raw humanity reveals Nonell’s commitment to truth over idealisation, offering a poignant glimpse into early 20th-century Barcelona. This artwork brings soulful depth to any interior, celebrating an artist whose legacy lies in elevating the dignity and inner life of his subjects. Product features- Soft rubber dots on the back keep the canvas stable when displayed.- Printed with non-hazardous latex inks for vivid, durable color.- Unique coating and Greenguard Gold inks deliver high-quality image reproduction.- Stretched on FSC-sourced radiata pine frame from renewable forests.- Available in multiple orientations and sizes; 1.25" stretched profile.Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [A Woman For Gods by Paul Klee Matte Canvas Framed Wall Art Decor - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/a-woman-for-gods-by-paul-klee-matte-canvas-framed-wall-art-decor): Paul Klee’s A Woman for Gods showcases the artist’s mastery of expressive linework and symbolic storytelling. Klee, known for his pivotal role in modern art and his years teaching at the Bauhaus, often drew inspiration from music, dreams, and ancient cultures. This painting embodies those influences through its stylised female figure, whose presence feels both earthly and divine. Klee’s unique visual language—developed through travels, experimentation, and a lifelong curiosity—creates a composition rich in emotion and texture. This artwork reflects his ability to fuse abstraction with narrative, making it a striking and meaningful piece for any art enthusiast. Product features- Greenguard Gold- latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color- Cotton/polyester composite canvas with proprietary matte coating- Stretched on FSC- radial pine frame with sawtooth hanger- Multiple sizes and frame finishes available to suit your layout- Durable, sustainable materials — vibrant colors that resist fadingCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Female Nude by János Vaszary Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/female-nude-by-janos-vaszary-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Female Nude by János Vaszary exemplifies the artist’s lifelong exploration of colour harmony and expressive realism. Vaszary, a central figure of Hungarian modern art, drew inspiration from his Parisian studies and European travels, blending tradition with modern flair. This painting showcases his sensitivity to light, form, and human emotion. The graceful figure, painted with soft contours and atmospheric tones, creates an inviting sense of calm and refinement. Ideal for art lovers seeking museum-grade sophistication, this work brings a touch of early modern European artistry into contemporary living spaces. Product features- High-quality matte coating with UL- Greenguard Gold inks for true-to-art reproduction- Durable cotton–polyester canvas composite with proprietary coating for museum-like texture- Non-toxic, latex-based inks for bright, safe color that resists fading- Sustainably sourced radial pine frame; multiple sizes and frame colors available- Comes ready to hang with sawtooth hardware; available in horizontal, vertical, and square formatsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Nude in the Studio by János Vaszary Matte Stretched Canvas: Wall Art Poster - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/nude-in-the-studio-by-janos-vaszary-matte-stretched-canvas-wall-art-poster): Nude in the Studio showcases János Vaszary’s exceptional talent for portraying the human figure with warmth and sophistication. A central figure in Hungarian modernism, Vaszary blended classical techniques with the fresh, expressive energy he encountered during his studies in Paris. This painting highlights his ability to use fluid brushstrokes, balanced composition and nuanced colour to create a captivating portrayal of femininity. The studio environment adds a layer of authenticity, inviting viewers into the artist’s world. A beautiful choice for collectors, it brings early modern European artistry into any contemporary home. Product features- Matte cotton-poly canvas stretched on 1.25" pine frame- UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color- Soft rubber dots on back corners to keep canvas steady when hung- Available in multiple orientations and 60 sizes; back hanging hardware included- Sustainably sourced radiata pine frame from FSC- renewable forestsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Magdalena vor der Bekehrung by Paul Klee Abstract Wall Art Poster - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/magdalena-vor-der-bekehrung-by-paul-klee-abstract-wall-art-poster): Magdalena vor der Bekehrung by Paul Klee is an iconic modernist artwork ideal for premium wall art collections. Klee, celebrated for his role at the Bauhaus and his pioneering abstract style, created pieces filled with symbolism and emotional nuance. This painting illustrates the introspective moment before personal transformation, captured through his expressive lines and soft, mystical palette. Known for merging childlike simplicity with deep psychological insight, Klee remains one of the most influential artists of the 20th century. This reproduction brings museum-level sophistication to your home, studio or gallery space. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine art (textured archival), Semi-glossy (bright satin photo paper), Matte (lightweight, low-sheen)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting colors- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical layout options- Paper weights provided: Fine Art 285 g/m², Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m², Matte 189–200 g/m²- Ships rolled for protection; sourced blanks from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice)Care instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Magdalena vor der Bekehrung by Paul Klee Framed Abstract Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/magdalena-vor-der-bekehrung-by-paul-klee-framed-abstract-wall-art-print): Magdalena vor der Bekehrung by Paul Klee is an iconic modernist artwork ideal for premium wall art collections. Klee, celebrated for his role at the Bauhaus and his pioneering abstract style, created pieces filled with symbolism and emotional nuance. This painting illustrates the introspective moment before personal transformation, captured through his expressive lines and soft, mystical palette. Known for merging childlike simplicity with deep psychological insight, Klee remains one of the most influential artists of the 20th century. This reproduction brings museum-level sophistication to your home, studio or gallery space. This framed print works especially well for collectors of contemporary folk art, parents decorating playful spaces, and anyone who loves art that feels both childlike and contemplative. The variety of sizes and orientation options make it easy to mix into an existing arrangement or give a single wall a focal point. Assembled in the USA and finished with a matte black pine frame, it’s built to look intentional and hang beautifully right away.Product features- Two paper choices: fine art (310 gsm, textured) or semi-gloss (260 gsm, bright satin photo paper)- Matte black 100% pinewood frame with brown paper backing and shatter-proof plexiglass- Pre-installed hanging hardware and rubber bumpers for straight, wall-safe display- Available in 10 sizes with horizontal and vertical orientations- Vibrant, high-fidelity printing using modern techniques to preserve color and detailCare instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Lying nude by Paul Gosselin Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/lying-nude-by-paul-gosselin-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Lying Nude by Paul Gosselin is a striking example of the artist’s commitment to figurative realism and emotional atmosphere. Gosselin, recognised for his elegant portrayal of the human body, brings classical training and a modern eye to each composition. This painting captures a reclining nude rendered with smooth transitions, gentle lighting and expressive form. Its subtle sensuality and artistic refinement make it ideal for luxury wall art collections. Perfect for contemporary homes, boutique interiors or curated galleries seeking artwork that blends sophistication, calm and timeless technique. The sustainable materials and archival-grade inks mean the image stays true for years. Choose from multiple sizes and frame colors to find the scale and silhouette that fits your space. Sawtooth hardware is preinstalled for fast, level hanging; the lightweight pine stretcher makes placement simple.For collectors of contemporary figurative work and homes that favor layered, lived-in interiors, this matte canvas framed print reads like a quiet conversation — intimate, unforced, and beautifully made.Product features- Greenguard Gold  latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color- Cotton/polyester canvas with proprietary matte coating to preserve brush texture- Sustainably sourced radial pine stretcher and frame- Multiple sizes and frame colors; horizontal, vertical, and square options- Sawtooth hanging hardware included for easy installationCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Nude female by Filipp Malyavin Wall Art Poster - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/nude-female-by-filipp-malyavin-wall-art-poster): Russian master Filipp Malyavin became internationally recognised for his vibrant depictions of peasant life, yet “Nude Female” reveals a quieter, more contemplative side of his artistic journey. Painted during a period when he experimented with European impressionist influences, the work showcases his skill in rendering flesh tones, natural light and emotional nuance. The figure is presented with elegance and subtlety, capturing both physical presence and inner calm. Malyavin’s distinctive loose brushwork adds dynamic texture, giving the composition its unmistakable liveliness. This artwork brings museum-quality sophistication to any wall art collection, highlighting a rare facet of Malyavin’s diverse creative legacy. Product features- Three paper options: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright satin), Matte (subtle, low-sheen)- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting color and sharp detail- Multiple sizes plus horizontal and vertical orientations available- Paper weight options: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Shipped rolled for protection; blank product sourced from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Lying nude by Paul Gosselin Wall Art Poster - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/lying-nude-by-paul-gosselin-wall-art-poster): Lying Nude by Paul Gosselin is a striking example of the artist’s commitment to figurative realism and emotional atmosphere. Gosselin, recognised for his elegant portrayal of the human body, brings classical training and a modern eye to each composition. This painting captures a reclining nude rendered with smooth transitions, gentle lighting and expressive form. Its subtle sensuality and artistic refinement make it ideal for luxury wall art collections. Perfect for contemporary homes, boutique interiors or curated galleries seeking artwork that blends sophistication, calm and timeless technique. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured, archival), Matte (low-glare, artwork-optimized), Semi-Glossy (bright white, satin finish)- Giclée printing for bright, lasting color that resists fading- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation options- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m² (varies by source)- Blanks sourced from USA (JONDO) and Japan; -only contentCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Marilyn Monroe attributed to Voke Wall Pop Art Poster - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/marilyn-monroe-attributed-to-voke-wall-pop-art-poster): This striking contemporary portrait attributed Voke celebrates the timeless glamour and magnetic charm of Marilyn Monroe, reimagined through bold colour and expressive brushwork. Bursting with vibrant reds, electric blues and warm golden tones, the artwork transforms the legendary Hollywood icon into a modern pop-art masterpiece. Voke’s dynamic layering and confident strokes create a sense of movement and emotional intensity, giving the classic muse a fresh, energetic presence. Perfect for modern interiors, studios and statement walls, this piece captures the allure, strength and cinematic legacy of Marilyn Monroe while adding a dramatic, eye-catching focal point to any space. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine art, Semi-glossy, Matte- Giclée prints with bright, fade-resistant color- Paper weights from 180–285 g/m² depending on option- Multiple sizes and horizontal/vertical orientations- Ships rolled for safe delivery; sourced from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Marilyn Monroe attributed to Voke Matte Canvas Framed Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/marilyn-monroe-attributed-to-voke-matte-canvas-framed-wall-art): This striking contemporary portrait attributed Voke celebrates the timeless glamour and magnetic charm of Marilyn Monroe, reimagined through bold colour and expressive brushwork. Bursting with vibrant reds, electric blues and warm golden tones, the artwork transforms the legendary Hollywood icon into a modern pop-art masterpiece. Voke’s dynamic layering and confident strokes create a sense of movement and emotional intensity, giving the classic muse a fresh, energetic presence. Perfect for modern interiors, studios and statement walls, this piece captures the allure, strength and cinematic legacy of Marilyn Monroe while adding a dramatic, eye-catching focal point to any space. Product features- UL- Greenguard Gold inks for high-quality, safe prints- Sustainable pine stretcher from FSC- renewable forests- Vibrant, crisp color reproduction using advanced latex inks- Durable cotton-poly canvas composite with proprietary coating- Comes framed with sawtooth hardware; multiple sizes and frame colors availableCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Marilyn Monroe attributed to Voke Framed Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/marilyn-monroe-attributed-to-voke-framed-wall-art-print): magnetic charm of Marilyn Monroe, reimagined through bold colour and expressive brushwork. Bursting with vibrant reds, electric blues and warm golden tones, the artwork transforms the legendary Hollywood icon into a modern pop-art masterpiece. Voke’s dynamic layering and confident strokes create a sense of movement and emotional intensity, giving the classic muse a fresh, energetic presence. Perfect for modern interiors, studios and statement walls, this piece captures the allure, strength and cinematic legacy of Marilyn Monroe while adding a dramatic, eye-catching focal point to any space. Product features- Two paper choices: fine art (310 gsm, textured) or semi‑gloss photo paper (260 gsm)- Matte black 100% pinewood frame with brown paper backing and shatter‑proof plexiglass- Pre-installed hanging hardware plus rubber bumpers to protect walls and keep alignment- Available in 10 sizes with horizontal and vertical layout options- Vibrant, high‑quality printing for bright, crisp colors; assembled in the USACare instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Mademoiselle Mary de Borderieux by Jean Auguste Dominique Ingres Matte Stretched Canvas Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/mademoiselle-mary-de-borderieux-by-jean-auguste-dominique-ingres-matte-stretched-canvas-wall-art): A master of precision and classical beauty, Jean-Auguste-Dominique Ingres created “Mademoiselle Mary de Borderieux” at a time when his portraits were regarded as the height of French artistic refinement. Known for his impeccable line work and serene, idealised figures, Ingres elevates the sitter with subtle expression, luxurious texture, and impeccable attention to detail. The portrait reflects his devotion to balance and restraint, hallmarks of the Neoclassical tradition he championed. This artwork embodies the calm elegance and polished finish that defined Ingres’s career, making it a sophisticated addition to interiors seeking timeless artistry and historical charm. Product features- Matte stretched canvas with cotton-poly blend for subtle texture- Unique coating and UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for vivid, safe color- Inner frame of radiata pine from FSC- renewable forests- Soft rubber dots on back corners and included hanging hardware for secure display- Available in 60 sizes with horizontal, vertical, and square orientations; size tolerance +/- 1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [smashing a wave at Lobitos by Henry Espinoza Panta Framed Wall Art Poster - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/smashing-a-wave-at-lobitos-by-henry-espinoza-panta-framed-wall-art-poster): Peruvian photographer Henry Espinoza Panta channels his coastal roots into Smashing a Wave at Lobitos, a dynamic portrayal of one of Peru’s most beloved surfing beaches. Raised close to the shoreline, Espinoza Panta developed a deep sensitivity to the shifting moods of the sea, which he expresses through soft gradients, layered textures, and rhythmic composition. This artwork captures a single crashing wave in vivid motion, celebrating nature’s power and serenity combined. Ideal for modern, beach-inspired décor, it offers a calming yet invigorating statement piece for living rooms, studios, or holiday homes. Product features- Choose between textured 310 gsm fine art paper or bright 260–310 gsm semi-gloss photo paper- Matte black 100% pinewood frame with brown paper backing and shatter-proof plexiglass- Pre-installed top-hanging hardware plus rubber bumpers to protect walls and keep prints level- Available in 10 sizes and both horizontal and vertical orientations- Vibrant, crisp color reproduction using modern printing techniques; assembled in the USACare instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Christina by Amedeo Modigliani Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/christina-by-amedeo-modigliani-wall-art-print): Amedeo Modigliani’s Christina captures the quiet intensity that defines his portraiture. Born in Italy and later active in Paris, Modigliani blended classical sensibilities with modern expressiveness, forging a signature style of elongated features and searching eyes. In Christina, he distils the sitter’s presence into graceful lines and muted tones, creating a mood of introspection and grace. The portrait reflects the artist’s lifelong pursuit of emotional truth, shaped by illness, hardship and an unrelenting devotion to beauty. The result is a serene, haunting image that draws viewers into Modigliani’s deeply personal world of refined, soulful elegance. Product features- Three paper options: Fine art (textured, archival), Semi-glossy (bright, satin finish), Matte (soft, low-reflective)- Giclée print process for bright, fade-resistant colors- Multiple sizes and both horizontal and vertical orientations available- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Shipped rolled for protection; blanks sourced from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Christina by Amedeo Modigliani Framed Wall Art Poster - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/christina-by-amedeo-modigliani-framed-wall-art-poster): Amedeo Modigliani’s Christina captures the quiet intensity that defines his portraiture. Born in Italy and later active in Paris, Modigliani blended classical sensibilities with modern expressiveness, forging a signature style of elongated features and searching eyes. In Christina, he distils the sitter’s presence into graceful lines and muted tones, creating a mood of introspection and grace. The portrait reflects the artist’s lifelong pursuit of emotional truth, shaped by illness, hardship and an unrelenting devotion to beauty. The result is a serene, haunting image that draws viewers into Modigliani’s deeply personal world of refined, soulful elegance. Product features- Two paper options: Fine art (310 gsm) or semi-gloss photo paper (260 gsm)- Matte black 100% pinewood frame with brown paper backing and white mat- Pre-installed hanging hardware plus rubber bumpers for wall protection and level display- Shatter-proof plexiglass glazing for lightweight, durable protection- Available in 10 sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation options; assembled in the USACare instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Femme au châle rouge by Félix Vallotton Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/femme-au-chale-rouge-by-felix-vallotton-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): In Femme au châle rouge, Félix Vallotton reveals the distinctive style that positioned him as one of the most intriguing members of the Nabis group. Known for his sharp outlines, flattened surfaces and psychological subtlety, Vallotton crafted portraits that feel both intimate and enigmatic. Painted during his mature period, this work highlights his fascination with emotional stillness. The deep red shawl draws the viewer’s attention, adding a dramatic accent to the otherwise calm setting. Vallotton’s Swiss-French heritage and background in woodcut prints shaped his disciplined approach, resulting in a portrait that blends modernity, mood and quiet sophistication. Product features- Greenguard Gold  latex inks for non-toxic, fade-resistant color- Cotton–polyester canvas with proprietary matte coating for fine detail- Sustainably sourced radial pine floater frame- Multiple size and orientation options with sawtooth hanging hardware- Vibrant, museum-quality print reproduction with crisp color fidelityCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Mariya Magdalena by Frederick Sandys Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/mariya-magdalena-by-frederick-sandys-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): A contemporary of Dante Gabriel Rossetti, Frederick Sandys combined Pre-Raphaelite precision with a darker, more dramatic sensibility. Mariya Magdalena presents a contemplative vision of Mary Magdalene, rendered with striking realism and emotional restraint. Painted during Sandys’ most productive period, the work demonstrates his exceptional draftsmanship and interest in inner character over idealisation. The subdued palette and careful attention to fabric, flesh, and light enhance the painting’s solemn mood. This piece stands as a compelling example of Sandys’ ability to merge spiritual narrative with human vulnerability. Product features- Greenguard Gold UL- inks for safe, high-fidelity color- Durable cotton-polyester canvas composite with proprietary matte coating- Sustainably sourced pine frame from FSC- forests- Non-toxic latex inks — bright, long-lasting, and safe- Comes in multiple sizes and orientations with sawtooth hanging hardwareCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Mariya Magdalena by Frederick Sandys Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/mariya-magdalena-by-frederick-sandys-canvas-wall-art-print): A contemporary of Dante Gabriel Rossetti, Frederick Sandys combined Pre-Raphaelite precision with a darker, more dramatic sensibility. Mariya Magdalena presents a contemplative vision of Mary Magdalene, rendered with striking realism and emotional restraint. Painted during Sandys’ most productive period, the work demonstrates his exceptional draftsmanship and interest in inner character over idealisation. The subdued palette and careful attention to fabric, flesh, and light enhance the painting’s solemn mood. This piece stands as a compelling example of Sandys’ ability to merge spiritual narrative with human vulnerability.Product features- Matte coating for low-glare, museum-like finish- Stretched on 1.25" pine frame with back hanging included- Printed with non-toxic latex inks and Greenguard Gold  inks- Soft rubber dots on back corners to protect walls and secure placement- Available in multiple sizes and orientations; slight size tolerance ±1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Portrait of hyllis Sjostrom by Akseli Gallen-Kallela Canvas Matte Framed Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/portrait-of-hyllis-sjostrom-by-akseli-gallen-kallela-canvas-matte-framed-wall-art-print): Akseli Gallen-Kallela’s Portrait of Hyllis Sjöström exemplifies the artist’s refined approach to portrait painting during a pivotal era in Finnish art. Known internationally for his interpretations of the Kalevala, Gallen-Kallela also excelled in intimate works that reveal the emotional world of his sitters. This portrait balances realism with symbolism, using controlled brushwork and a muted palette to suggest introspection and intelligence. The simplicity of the composition draws attention to the sitter’s expression, reflecting the artist’s belief that true portraiture should capture the essence of the individual. The painting stands as a testament to Gallen-Kallela’s versatility and sensitivity. Product features- UL‑ Greenguard Gold inks for the highest image quality- Sustainable radial pine frame from FSC- renewable forests- Vibrant latex inks that are non-toxic and non-flammable- Durable cotton/polyester canvas composite with proprietary coating- Available in multiple sizes and frame colors; sawtooth hanging hardware includedCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Portrait of hyllis Sjostrom by Akseli Gallen-Kallela Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/portrait-of-hyllis-sjostrom-by-akseli-gallen-kallela-canvas-wall-art-print): Akseli Gallen-Kallela’s Portrait of Hyllis Sjöström exemplifies the artist’s refined approach to portrait painting during a pivotal era in Finnish art. Known internationally for his interpretations of the Kalevala, Gallen-Kallela also excelled in intimate works that reveal the emotional world of his sitters. This portrait balances realism with symbolism, using controlled brushwork and a muted palette to suggest introspection and intelligence. The simplicity of the composition draws attention to the sitter’s expression, reflecting the artist’s belief that true portraiture should capture the essence of the individual. The painting stands as a testament to Gallen-Kallela’s versatility and sensitivity. Product features- Durable cotton-poly matte canvas stretched over 1.25" pine frame- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color- Soft rubber dots on back to keep canvas steady when hung- Available in horizontal, vertical and square orientations across 60 sizes- Inner frame made from FSC- radiata pine; slight size tolerance +/- 1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [View of Jaegersborg Allé, North of Copenhagen by Vilhelm Hammershøi Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/view-of-jaegersborg-alle-north-of-copenhagen-by-vilhelm-hammershoi-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Vilhelm Hammershøi, one of Denmark’s most distinctive painters, is celebrated for his restrained palette and poetic stillness. Painted during a period when he explored quiet urban and suburban landscapes, View of Jaegersborg Allé, North of Copenhagen reflects his fascination with order, atmosphere, and solitude. The long, tree-lined avenue is rendered with muted greys and soft tonal transitions, creating a sense of calm introspection. Unlike traditional landscape painting, Hammershøi avoids dramatic light or narrative, instead focusing on structure and rhythm. This work exemplifies his modern sensibility, where everyday scenes become meditative spaces. Product features- Greenguard Gold UL- inks for high-quality, non-hazardous color- Sustainable radial pine frame from FSC- renewable forests- Cotton-polyester canvas composite with proprietary matte coating- Multiple sizes, orientations, and frame colors; sawtooth hardware included- Durable, non-toxic latex inks delivering bright, crisp colorsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [View of Jaegersborg Allé, North of Copenhagen by Vilhelm Hammershøi Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/view-of-jaegersborg-alle-north-of-copenhagen-by-vilhelm-hammershoi-canvas-wall-art-print): Vilhelm Hammershøi, one of Denmark’s most distinctive painters, is celebrated for his restrained palette and poetic stillness. Painted during a period when he explored quiet urban and suburban landscapes, View of Jaegersborg Allé, North of Copenhagen reflects his fascination with order, atmosphere, and solitude. The long, tree-lined avenue is rendered with muted greys and soft tonal transitions, creating a sense of calm introspection. Unlike traditional landscape painting, Hammershøi avoids dramatic light or narrative, instead focusing on structure and rhythm. This work exemplifies his modern sensibility, where everyday scenes become meditative spaces. Product features- Matte stretched cotton-poly canvas with low-reflective coating- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks (non-toxic, non-flammable)- Stretched on radiata pine frame from FSC- renewable forests- Soft rubber dots on back corners to keep canvas secure and include back hanging hardware- Available in horizontal, vertical and square orientations across 60 sizes (±1/8" tolerance)Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Senecio II by Paul Klee Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/senecio-ii-by-paul-klee-wall-art-print): Senecio II (1922) is one of Paul Klee’s most iconic works, created during his influential years at the Bauhaus. Klee, a Swiss-German artist, combined modernist abstraction with deep theoretical knowledge of colour, form, and symbolism. The painting presents a stylised human face reduced to geometric planes, its warm ochres and reds offset by cool, muted tones. Inspired by masks, theatre, and ancient art, Klee transforms portraiture into a poetic visual language. Senecio II reflects his belief that art should reveal inner truths rather than imitate reality, making it a timeless expression of modernist thought. Product features- Available on fine art (textured archival), semi-glossy (satin photo finish), or matte paper- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting color fidelity- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation options- Paper weights range from ~180–285 g/m² depending on paper and source- Shipped rolled to protect the print during transitCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Senecio II by Paul Klee Framed Wall Art Poster - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/senecio-ii-by-paul-klee-framed-wall-art-poster): Senecio II (1922) is one of Paul Klee’s most iconic works, created during his influential years at the Bauhaus. Klee, a Swiss-German artist, combined modernist abstraction with deep theoretical knowledge of colour, form, and symbolism. The painting presents a stylised human face reduced to geometric planes, its warm ochres and reds offset by cool, muted tones. Inspired by masks, theatre, and ancient art, Klee transforms portraiture into a poetic visual language. Senecio II reflects his belief that art should reveal inner truths rather than imitate reality, making it a timeless expression of modernist thought. Product features- Two paper options: fine art (310 gsm textured) or semi-gloss photo paper (260 gsm)- Matte black 100% pinewood frame with brown paper backing- Shatter-proof plexiglass cover for safe, clear display- Pre-installed hanging hardware and rubber bumpers for easy, stable installation- Available in 10 sizes and horizontal or vertical orientationsCare instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Senecio II by Paul Klee Canvas Framed Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/senecio-ii-by-paul-klee-canvas-framed-wall-art-print): Senecio II (1922) is one of Paul Klee’s most iconic works, created during his influential years at the Bauhaus. Klee, a Swiss-German artist, combined modernist abstraction with deep theoretical knowledge of colour, form, and symbolism. The painting presents a stylised human face reduced to geometric planes, its warm ochres and reds offset by cool, muted tones. Inspired by masks, theatre, and ancient art, Klee transforms portraiture into a poetic visual language. Senecio II reflects his belief that art should reveal inner truths rather than imitate reality, making it a timeless expression of modernist thought. Product features- Greenguard Gold  inks for high-quality, non-toxic colour- Durable cotton/polyester canvas with proprietary matte coating- Sustainably sourced radial pine frame, multiple sizes and frame colours available- Latex printing process: non-hazardous and vibrant colour reproduction- Includes sawtooth hanging hardware; available in horizontal, vertical, and square orientationsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [This Bloom is About to Wither by Paul Klee  Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/this-bloom-is-about-to-wither-by-paul-klee-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Paul Klee’s This Bloom is About to Wither is a contemplative meditation on impermanence. Associated with Expressionism, Surrealism, and the Bauhaus, Klee developed a unique visual language rooted in symbols and intuition. In this work, organic forms and softened hues suggest a moment suspended between vitality and decline. Painted during a time when Klee was increasingly reflective about nature and mortality, the piece resonates with emotional restraint rather than drama. His refined line work and abstracted imagery invite viewers to consider life’s transience, reinforcing Klee’s belief that art should echo inner experience rather than literal appearance. Product features- Greenguard Gold  latex inks for safe, long-lasting color- Cotton/polyester canvas composite with a proprietary matte coating for crisp detail- Sustainably sourced radial pine frame (FSC) in multiple color options- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square sizes with sawtooth hanging hardware- Vibrant, fade-resistant printing using advanced techniques for true-to-art colorCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [This Bloom is About to Wither by Paul Klee Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/this-bloom-is-about-to-wither-by-paul-klee-wall-art-print): Paul Klee’s This Bloom is About to Wither is a contemplative meditation on impermanence. Associated with Expressionism, Surrealism, and the Bauhaus, Klee developed a unique visual language rooted in symbols and intuition. In this work, organic forms and softened hues suggest a moment suspended between vitality and decline. Painted during a time when Klee was increasingly reflective about nature and mortality, the piece resonates with emotional restraint rather than drama. His refined line work and abstracted imagery invite viewers to consider life’s transience, reinforcing Klee’s belief that art should echo inner experience rather than literal appearance. Choose between fine art, semi-gloss, or matte finish, and bring your artwork to life in stunning detail. Whether it's breathtaking landscapes, or eye-capturing portraits, these rolled prints can feature it all as they come in multiple sizes as well as horizontal and vertical orientations..: Three paper options - Fine art, Semi-glossy and Matte.: Paper thickness (JONDO): Fine Art: 285 g/m², Semi-Glossy: 180 g/m², Matte: 200 g/m².: Paper thickness (Printify Choice): Semi-Glossy: 260 g/m², Matte: 189 g/m² .: Multiple sizes to choose from.: Horizontal and vertical options available - Maison Abstract

- [This Bloom is About to Wither by Paul Klee Framed Wall Art Poster - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/this-bloom-is-about-to-wither-by-paul-klee-framed-wall-art-poster): Paul Klee’s This Bloom is About to Wither is a contemplative meditation on impermanence. Associated with Expressionism, Surrealism, and the Bauhaus, Klee developed a unique visual language rooted in symbols and intuition. In this work, organic forms and softened hues suggest a moment suspended between vitality and decline. Painted during a time when Klee was increasingly reflective about nature and mortality, the piece resonates with emotional restraint rather than drama. His refined line work and abstracted imagery invite viewers to consider life’s transience, reinforcing Klee’s belief that art should echo inner experience rather than literal appearance. Product features- Two paper choices: textured 310 gsm fine art or bright 260 gsm semi‑gloss photo paper- Matte black 100% pinewood frame with brown paper backing and shatter‑proof plexiglass- Pre‑installed hanging hardware and rubber bumpers for straight, protected mounting- Available in 10 sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation options- Vibrant, crisp color reproduction using modern printing techniques; assembled in the USACare instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Mill by Sunlight by Piet Mondrian Matte Framed Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/mill-by-sunlight-by-piet-mondrian-matte-framed-canvas-wall-art-print): Mill by Sunlight captures Piet Mondrian at a formative point in his artistic evolution, when he was experimenting with colour, light, and mood. Before becoming a pioneer of geometric abstraction, Mondrian painted landscapes that sought to express deeper spiritual truths. The windmill stands silhouetted against a luminous sky, bathed in intense sunlight that dissolves solid form into colour. Influenced by Post-Impressionism and Theosophical ideas, Mondrian uses light to suggest balance and universal order. This work reflects his growing belief that art should move beyond surface appearance toward an inner, transcendent reality. Product features- High-quality matte coating for vivid, detailed image reproduction- Printed with non-toxic, UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks- Cotton-polyester canvas composite on FSC- pine frame- Available in multiple sizes, orientations, and frame colors with sawtooth hanger- Sustainably produced materials and eco-friendly printing processCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Study of Flesh Color and Gold by William Merritt Chase Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/study-of-flesh-color-and-gold-by-william-merritt-chase-wall-art-print): Study of Flesh Color and Gold captures William Merritt Chase’s refined understanding of color, light, and painterly immediacy. A central figure in American Impressionism, Chase combined rigorous European training with a distinctly modern sensibility. This work emphasizes the sensual qualities of paint itself, where soft flesh tones are set against glowing gold accents to create visual harmony. Intended as a study, it reveals the artist’s analytical approach to composition and texture. The painting embodies Chase’s role not only as a celebrated artist but also as a mentor who encouraged expressive brushwork and a direct engagement with color. Product features- Three paper choices: Fine art (textured, archival), Semi-glossy (bright, satin finish), Matte (subtle, low-sheen)- Giclée print for bright, long-lasting color and fade resistance- Multiple sizes and horizontal/vertical orientation options- Paper weight options: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Rolled delivery for safe transport; sourced blanks from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Study of Flesh Color and Gold by William Merritt Chase Framed Matte Canvas Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/study-of-flesh-color-and-gold-by-william-merritt-chase-framed-matte-canvas-art): Study of Flesh Color and Gold captures William Merritt Chase’s refined understanding of color, light, and painterly immediacy. A central figure in American Impressionism, Chase combined rigorous European training with a distinctly modern sensibility. This work emphasizes the sensual qualities of paint itself, where soft flesh tones are set against glowing gold accents to create visual harmony. Intended as a study, it reveals the artist’s analytical approach to composition and texture. The painting embodies Chase’s role not only as a celebrated artist but also as a mentor who encouraged expressive brushwork and a direct engagement with color. Product features- Greenguard Gold  latex inks for safe, high-fidelity color reproduction- Cotton/polyester canvas composite with proprietary matte coating for crisp, non-glare detail- Sustainably sourced pine wood frame; multiple sizes and frame colors available- Durable, non-toxic materials and bright, long-lasting print vibrancy- Sawtooth hanging hardware included; horizontal, vertical, and square orientationsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Girl in a Japanese Costume by William Merritt Chase Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/girl-in-a-japanese-costume-by-william-merritt-chase-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): William Merritt Chase was one of America’s most influential painters and teachers, bridging European tradition and modern American art. In Girl in a Japanese Costume, he explores exoticism and fashion through a sensitive, painterly lens. The richly detailed garment contrasts with the softly handled background, drawing attention to Chase’s confident brushwork and tonal harmony. Influenced by Japanese aesthetics as well as European Impressionism, the painting demonstrates his openness to international trends. This work stands as a refined example of Chase’s portrait style, celebrating beauty, craftsmanship, and cross-cultural inspiration at the turn of the century. Product features- Greenguard Gold  latex inks for safe, vivid color- Cotton-polyester canvas with proprietary coating for sharp detail- Sustainably sourced pine frame from FSC- forests- Available in multiple sizes, orientations, and frame colors- Sawtooth hanging hardware included for easy installationCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Girl in a Japanese Costume by William Merritt Chase Matte Stretched Canvas Wall Art Print (1.25") - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/girl-in-a-japanese-costume-by-william-merritt-chase-matte-stretched-canvas-wall-art-print-1-25): A finely stretched matte canvas print that brings quiet elegance to a room. The portrait’s soft brushwork and muted palette feel intimate and contemplative — like a whispered memory on the wall. The subtle texture of the cotton-poly canvas and the matte finish soften light and reduce glare, letting the sitter’s gentle expression and delicate kimono details hold the center of attention. Hang it in a reading nook, over a vintage dresser, or in a calm hallway to invite stillness and thoughtful pause into the space.Product features- Stretched matte canvas on a 1.25" pine frame with back hanging included- UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color- Soft rubber dots on the bottom back corners keep the canvas steady when hung- Sustainably sourced radiata pine frame from FSC- renewable forests- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square formats across 60 sizes; slight size tolerance ±1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Mill by Sunlight by Piet Mondrian Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/mill-by-sunlight-by-piet-mondrian-canvas-wall-art-print): Mill by Sunlight captures Piet Mondrian at a formative point in his artistic evolution, when he was experimenting with colour, light, and mood. Before becoming a pioneer of geometric abstraction, Mondrian painted landscapes that sought to express deeper spiritual truths. The windmill stands silhouetted against a luminous sky, bathed in intense sunlight that dissolves solid form into colour. Influenced by Post-Impressionism and Theosophical ideas, Mondrian uses light to suggest balance and universal order. This work reflects his growing belief that art should move beyond surface appearance toward an inner, transcendent reality. The canvas speaks to collectors who appreciate painterly texture and bold color. Let it sit above a mid-century console, lean it on a shelf in a sunlit studio, or make it the focal point of a cozy corner. The subdued sheen keeps the mood intimate; the stretched profile keeps the look modern and clean. Sustainability-minded buyers will appreciate the responsibly sourced pine frame and low-impact latex inks. Small size variances are part of the handmade process, and a hanging kit is included so the piece is ready to display.Product features- Stretched matte cotton-poly canvas on a 1.25" radiata pine frame- Printed with UL Greenguard Gold  latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color- Soft rubber dots on the back to protect walls and stabilize the hanging- Back hanging hardware included; available in horizontal, vertical, and square sizes- Sustainably sourced pine frame from FSC- forests; slight size tolerance +/- 1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [US Marshals with Young Ruby Bridges on School Steps by Unknown  Black & White Civil Rights Photograph Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/us-marshals-with-young-ruby-bridges-on-school-steps-by-unknown-black-white-civil-rights-photograph-wall-art-print): This powerful black-and-white photograph captures a defining moment of the American civil rights era. A young schoolgirl descends the steps of a public building, flanked by U.S. marshals, embodying both vulnerability and extraordinary courage. The formal attire, stark architecture, and guarded presence create a striking contrast between childhood innocence and institutional force. Composed with documentary precision, the image reflects the tensions of a nation confronting segregation and social change. As wall art, it serves as a timeless reminder of resilience, justice, and the individuals who stood at the center of historic transformation. Each poster ships rolled for safe delivery and is available in horizontal or vertical formats and a range of sizes. Thoughtful materials and archival giclée printing mean the image maintains its depth and clarity with regular light exposure. Whether you’re curating a personal wall gallery or searching for a quiet piece to anchor a reading nook, these prints add a restrained, timeless focal point.Product features- Three paper options: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (bright, satin finish), Matte (low reflection, art-optimized)- Giclée printing for vivid, long-lasting black-and-white tones- Multiple sizes with horizontal and vertical orientations- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Ships rolled for secure delivery; sourced blanks from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [US Marshals with Young Ruby Bridges on School Steps by Unknown  Black & White Civil Rights Photograph Framed Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/us-marshals-with-young-ruby-bridges-on-school-steps-by-unknown-black-white-civil-rights-photograph-framed-wall-art-print): This powerful black-and-white photograph captures a defining moment of the American civil rights era. A young schoolgirl descends the steps of a public building, flanked by U.S. marshals, embodying both vulnerability and extraordinary courage. The formal attire, stark architecture, and guarded presence create a striking contrast between childhood innocence and institutional force. Composed with documentary precision, the image reflects the tensions of a nation confronting segregation and social change. As wall art, it serves as a timeless reminder of resilience, justice, and the individuals who stood at the center of historic transformation. Product features- Two paper choices: 310 gsm fine art (textured) or 260 gsm semi-gloss (bright photo finish)- Matte black 100% pinewood frame with brown paper backing- Shatter‑proof plexiglass cover for safe, clear display- Pre‑installed hanging hardware and rubber bumpers for easy, level mounting- Available in 10 sizes with horizontal and vertical orientation optionsCare instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Sabra by Franz Kline Abstract Matte Canvas Framed Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/sabra-by-franz-kline-abstract-matte-canvas-framed-wall-art-print): Sabra reflects Franz Kline’s mastery of reduction and gesture at the height of his career. As a central figure in Abstract Expressionism, Kline sought to strip painting down to its most essential elements. His background in academic drawing lent precision to works that appear instinctive and raw. In Sabra, bold black forms dominate the canvas, creating a powerful dialogue between movement and stillness. The composition reveals Kline’s fascination with structure beneath spontaneity, making this work a timeless example of American modernism and a striking statement piece for contemporary interiors. Product features- Archival latex inks: non-toxic, non-flammable, UL Greenguard Gold quality for safe indoor use- Durable cotton-polyester canvas with proprietary matte coating for crisp, vibrant color and reduced glare- Sustainably sourced pine frame (FSC-based) with multiple sizes and frame colors available- Available horizontal, vertical, and square orientations; sawtooth hanging hardware included- Printed using eco-conscious processes and materials — bright, long-lasting prints with responsible sourcingCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Sabra by Franz Kline Abstract Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/sabra-by-franz-kline-abstract-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Sabra reflects Franz Kline’s mastery of reduction and gesture at the height of his career. As a central figure in Abstract Expressionism, Kline sought to strip painting down to its most essential elements. His background in academic drawing lent precision to works that appear instinctive and raw. In Sabra, bold black forms dominate the canvas, creating a powerful dialogue between movement and stillness. The composition reveals Kline’s fascination with structure beneath spontaneity, making this work a timeless example of American modernism and a striking statement piece for contemporary interiors. Made with water-based latex inks and a unique coating that holds fine detail, the print keeps true blacks and layered whites without chemical off-gassing. The inner frame is radiata pine from renewable forests, and the piece is available in multiple orientations and sizes to suit narrow entries, vertical stairwells, or clustered gallery arrangements.Lean, tactile, and quietly assertive — this canvas brings the clarity of minimalism and the energy of mark-making into rooms where restraint feels intentional.Product features- Matte stretched canvas with 1.25" profile and back hanging- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for low emissions- Soft rubber dots on back corners prevent slipping and protect walls- Inner frame of radiata pine from FSC-sourced renewable forests- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square options across many sizesCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract
