- [Adolescente entrant dans l'eau by Félix Vallotton Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/adolescente-entrant-dans-leau-by-felix-vallotton-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Painted by Félix Vallotton, a Swiss-French artist closely associated with the Nabi movement, Adolescente entrant dans l'eau exemplifies his distinctive balance of realism and modernist restraint. Known for his bold woodcuts and psychologically charged scenes, Vallotton approached painting with the same clarity and precision. Created in the early 20th century, this work captures a solitary adolescent figure poised between land and water, a moment of quiet transition. The simplified forms, cool palette, and controlled composition reflect Vallotton’s interest in emotional distance and inner tension, transforming an everyday scene into a timeless meditation on youth, vulnerability, and introspection. Product features- Greenguard Gold- latex inks for safe, vibrant color- Cotton-polyester canvas with proprietary matte coating for reduced glare- Stretch-mounted on FSC- radial pine frame- Available in multiple orientations and frame color options- Includes sawtooth hanging hardware for easy installationCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Adolescente entrant dans l'eau by Félix Vallotton  Matte Stretched Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/adolescente-entrant-dans-leau-by-felix-vallotton-matte-stretched-wall-art-print): Painted by Félix Vallotton, a Swiss-French artist closely associated with the Nabi movement, Adolescente entrant dans l'eau exemplifies his distinctive balance of realism and modernist restraint. Known for his bold woodcuts and psychologically charged scenes, Vallotton approached painting with the same clarity and precision. Created in the early 20th century, this work captures a solitary adolescent figure poised between land and water, a moment of quiet transition. The simplified forms, cool palette, and controlled composition reflect Vallotton’s interest in emotional distance and inner tension, transforming an everyday scene into a timeless meditation on youth, vulnerability, and introspection. Product features- Matte cotton-poly canvas with museum-quality, low-glare finish- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks — non-toxic and durable- Stretched on sustainable radiata pine frame from FSC- renewable forests- Soft rubber dots on back corners and included hanging hardware for secure display- Available in 60 sizes and horizontal, vertical, or square orientations; slight size tolerance ±1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [People Communicating by Unknown Abstract Framed Minimalist Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/people-communicating-by-unknown-abstract-framed-minimalist-wall-art-print): This abstract composition explores the quiet tension between form and emptiness. Soft, organic shapes appear to float across a warm, neutral ground, their blurred edges suggesting movement, diffusion, and chance. The restrained palette of browns and creams creates a calm, contemplative atmosphere, inviting slow observation. The work evokes natural processes—ink spreading through paper, stains forming unpredictably—while maintaining a deliberate sense of balance. Minimal yet expressive, the composition speaks to modern abstraction’s interest in spontaneity, materiality, and the beauty of imperfection. A framed matte canvas print that brings subtle, modern texture to quiet interiors. The soft cream background and scattered organic spots lend an aged, film-like quality—an abstract whisper rather than a shout. Mounted on a slim pine frame with a matte black finish, the piece reads both contemporary and lived-in. It hangs easily with sawtooth hardware and arrives ready to display, adding a gentle focal point over a bedside table, in a study, or along a gallery wall.Product features- Greenguard Gold  inks for safe, high-fidelity prints- Sustainable pine frame from FSC- renewable forests- Durable cotton/polyester canvas with proprietary matte coating- Non-toxic latex inks for bright, long-lasting color- Available in multiple sizes and orientations; sawtooth hanging hardware includedCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [People Communicating by Unknown Abstract Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/people-communicating-by-unknown-abstract-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): This abstract composition explores the quiet tension between form and emptiness. Soft, organic shapes appear to float across a warm, neutral ground, their blurred edges suggesting movement, diffusion, and chance. The restrained palette of browns and creams creates a calm, contemplative atmosphere, inviting slow observation. The work evokes natural processes—ink spreading through paper, stains forming unpredictably—while maintaining a deliberate sense of balance. Minimal yet expressive, the composition speaks to modern abstraction’s interest in spontaneity, materiality, and the beauty of imperfection. A minimalist stretched matte canvas that brings quiet, contemplative energy to a room. Soft cream tones are interrupted by organic, ink-like dots and blots that feel both accidental and deliberate — like fragments of a memory or the residue of a slow, meditative process. The lightly textured cotton-poly canvas sits on a slim 1.25" pine stretcher and is printed with low-VOC, UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for vivid, long-lasting color. Rubber corner dots and included back-hanging hardware keep the piece steady and easy to hang. Works well as a subtle focal point above a sofa, in a calm reading nook, or grouped with other abstract pieces to build a curated wall composition.Product features- Matte cotton-poly canvas stretched over 1.25" radiata pine frame- Printed with non-toxic, UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks- Soft rubber dots on back corners to prevent slipping and included hanging hardware- Sustainably sourced pine frame from FSC- renewable forests- Available in multiple orientations and sizes; slight size tolerance of +/- 1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Fritza Riedler by Gustav Klimt Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/fritza-riedler-by-gustav-klimt-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Painted in 1906, Portrait of Fritza Riedler reflects Gustav Klimt’s position at the forefront of Viennese modernism. A founding member of the Vienna Secession, Klimt sought to break from academic tradition through decorative richness and symbolic form. In this portrait, the sitter is rendered with psychological restraint, set against a flattened background of geometric pattern and muted color. Klimt’s use of ornamental design, influenced by Byzantine mosaics and Japanese art, transforms society portraiture into modern abstraction. The balance between realism and decoration reveals Klimt’s exploration of identity, modern femininity, and the evolving language of early twentieth-century art. This framed matte canvas brings museum-worthy character into everyday spaces. The textured cotton-poly canvas holds rich, layered color and subtle detail, while the slender pine frame adds a grounded, classic edge. Hung in a living room, study, or hallway, the artwork becomes a calm focal point — soft light, quiet presence, and a sense of carefully preserved craft. Archival-quality printing and a low-gloss finish keep reflections minimal so the composition reads clearly from across the room. For those who live with art, this piece reads as both thoughtful and lived-in: it complements warm wood tones, mid-century furnishings, and layered galleries without shouting for attention.Product features- Archival latex inks with Greenguard Gold certification for safe, vivid prints- Cotton–polyester canvas composite with proprietary matte coating for texture and low-glare finish- Sustainably sourced pine frame, available in multiple colors and sizes- Durable, non-toxic printing process with bright, true-to-design color reproduction- Ready-to-hang: sawtooth hardware included; horizontal, vertical, and square optionsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Fritza Riedler by Gustav Klimt Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/fritza-riedler-by-gustav-klimt-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Painted in 1906, Portrait of Fritza Riedler reflects Gustav Klimt’s position at the forefront of Viennese modernism. A founding member of the Vienna Secession, Klimt sought to break from academic tradition through decorative richness and symbolic form. In this portrait, the sitter is rendered with psychological restraint, set against a flattened background of geometric pattern and muted color. Klimt’s use of ornamental design, influenced by Byzantine mosaics and Japanese art, transforms society portraiture into modern abstraction. The balance between realism and decoration reveals Klimt’s exploration of identity, modern femininity, and the evolving language of early twentieth-century art. A museum-quality stretched matte canvas that brings classic portraiture into your living space with calm elegance. The rich, warm backdrop and delicate detailing of the subject sit beautifully on the finely textured cotton-poly canvas, producing a soft, non-reflective finish that feels intimate yet refined. Stretched over a sustainably sourced radiata pine frame, this piece arrives ready to hang and stay put thanks to soft rubber dots and included hanging hardware. It settles naturally into quiet corners — over a reading chair, above a mantel, or in a hallway — adding warmth, history, and a touch of old-world sophistication to rooms that favor thoughtful, artful decor.Product features- Matte, non-reflective cotton-poly canvas for museum-style presentation- Stretched on FSC- radiata pine frame with back hanging included- Printed with UL Greenguard Gold  latex inks for vivid, safe color- Soft rubber dots on back corners keep the canvas steady when displayed- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square orientations across 60 sizesCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Only Cadillac 2 by Yann Sciberras Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/only-cadillac-2-by-yann-sciberras-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Yann Sciberras’ Only Cadillac 2 exemplifies his distinctive abstract style, shaped by an interest in modern identity, memory, and visual culture. As a contemporary artist, Sciberras strips away realism to focus on mood, structure, and the emotional resonance of form and colour. The painting’s evocative title suggests motion, luxury, and cultural symbolism, while the composition itself remains open-ended and expressive. Only Cadillac 2 reflects the artist’s background in contemporary abstraction, offering a sophisticated artwork that balances conceptual ideas with strong visual presence, ideal for modern collections and design-focused environments. This framed matte canvas brings a playful, urban energy into any room. Hand-drawn skyscrapers rise against a bright sky while colorful cars stream along a busy street below — small, witty phrases peek out between the buildings and lanes, giving the scene a whimsical, street-art feel. The fine matte finish cuts glare so the details and layered textures stay visible from every angle. With a slim pine frame and sturdy, museum-style stretch, this piece arrives ready to hang and quietly transforms a hallway, studio, or living room wall into a vibrant city snapshot that sparks conversation.Product features- Greenguard Gold  latex inks for non-toxic, vivid color- Cotton–polyester canvas with proprietary matte coating for crisp detail- Sustainably sourced radial pine frame from FSC- wood- Available in multiple sizes and orientations with sawtooth hardware- Durable, non-flammable coating and fade-resistant printingCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Only Cadillac 2 by Yann Sciberras Stretched Matte Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/only-cadillac-2-by-yann-sciberras-stretched-matte-wall-art-print): Yann Sciberras’ Only Cadillac 2 exemplifies his distinctive abstract style, shaped by an interest in modern identity, memory, and visual culture. As a contemporary artist, Sciberras strips away realism to focus on mood, structure, and the emotional resonance of form and colour. The painting’s evocative title suggests motion, luxury, and cultural symbolism, while the composition itself remains open-ended and expressive. Only Cadillac 2 reflects the artist’s background in contemporary abstraction, offering a sophisticated artwork that balances conceptual ideas with strong visual presence, ideal for modern collections and design-focused environments. A vibrant matte canvas print that brings urban energy and playful color into any room. Hand-stretched over a 1.25" pine frame, the artwork captures a bustling cityscape—bold skyscrapers against a saturated blue sky, tiny cars zipping along the foreground, and whimsical hand-lettered details that invite closer inspection. The matte finish reduces glare and lends a painterly, tactile feel to the image. Built with an eco-conscious approach, the print uses a cotton-poly canvas, latex inks, and a sustainably sourced radiata pine inner frame. Soft rubber dots on the back keep the canvas steady on the wall, and built-in hanging hardware makes installation straightforward. Choose from multiple orientations and sizes to fit hallway nooks, living rooms, or creative studios.Product features- Matte, stretched cotton-poly canvas on 1.25" pine frame- Printed with non-toxic latex inks and UL Greenguard Gold- ink process- Eco-friendly construction with FSC-sourced radiata pine inner frame- Soft rubber dots on back and included hanging hardware for stable display- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square formats across 60 sizesCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Mother by Joaquin Sorolla y Bastida Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/mother-by-joaquin-sorolla-y-bastida-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): Painted in 1895, Mother by Joaquín Sorolla y Bastida is an intimate and deeply personal work created shortly after the birth of the artist’s daughter. Known for his radiant depictions of Mediterranean light and modern Spanish life, Sorolla here turns inward, presenting a quiet moment of motherhood with remarkable tenderness. The subdued palette and soft illumination contrast with his famous sunlit scenes, highlighting his academic training and emotional sensitivity. This painting reveals Sorolla’s ability to merge technical mastery with private experience, offering a rare, contemplative glimpse into the artist’s personal world. A framed matte canvas print that brings a quiet, intimate moment into your space. The soft, muted palette and gentle brushwork create a calming focal point — like a sigh of relief after a long day. Mounted on a slender pine frame with a contemporary floating edge, the print keeps the artwork as the center of attention while adding subtle depth and presence to a living room, bedroom, or cozy reading nook. The breathable cotton-poly canvas and advanced latex inks preserve delicate tones and texture so the piece feels like an original rather than a flat reproduction. Comes ready to hang with sawtooth hardware and available in multiple orientations and frame finishes to match your room’s mood.Product features- UL- Greenguard Gold inks for clean, vivid prints- Sustainable radial pine frame sourced from FSC- forests- Durable cotton-poly canvas composite with proprietary coating- Non-toxic latex inks for safe, lasting color- Available in multiple sizes, orientations, and frame colors; sawtooth hardware includedCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Mother by Joaquin Sorolla y Bastida Art Canvas Print — Serene Nursery Wall Decor - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/mother-by-joaquin-sorolla-y-bastida-art-canvas-print-serene-nursery-wall-decor): Mother stands apart in Joaquín Sorolla y Bastida’s oeuvre as a profoundly intimate portrait inspired by the birth of his daughter in 1895. While Sorolla is celebrated for vibrant coastal scenes filled with light and movement, this work embraces stillness and emotional depth. The softly lit hospital setting and restrained color palette reflect both maternal vulnerability and reverence. Trained in academic realism yet drawn to modern expression, Sorolla demonstrates exceptional sensitivity in this painting. Mother captures a universal human experience, revealing the artist’s emotional range beyond his celebrated sun-drenched Mediterranean masterpieces. A softly elegant stretched canvas that brings quiet intimacy and warmth to any room. The print captures a tranquil bedroom scene rendered in muted creams and gentle grays, where soft brushstrokes and layered texture create a peaceful, painterly presence. Mounted on a slim 1.25" pine frame, the matte finish reduces glare and emphasizes the artwork’s subtle tonal shifts. It hangs easily with the included back hardware and stays securely in place thanks to soft rubber dots on the back corners. Thoughtfully produced with Greenguard Gold latex inks on a durable cotton-poly canvas and sustainably sourced pine, this piece blends museum-quality appearance with everyday livability — a serene focal point for a bedroom, nursery, or quiet reading nook.Product features- Matte 1.25" stretched canvas on a slim pine frame- Greenguard Gold- latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color- Soft rubber dots on back corners prevent slipping when hung- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square sizes (60 size options)- Sustainably sourced radiata pine frame and cotton-poly canvas compositeCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Paysage de Provence by Nicolas de Staël Framed Matte Canvas Seascape Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/paysage-de-provence-by-nicolas-de-stael-framed-matte-canvas-seascape-wall-art-print): In Paysage de Provence, Nicolas de Staël transforms the Provençal landscape into an expressive meditation on color and structure. Created in the early 1950s, the painting reflects a period when de Staël was intensely exploring the balance between abstraction and reality. Thick layers of paint and simplified forms evoke the weight, heat, and stillness of the southern French terrain. Drawing on his Russian heritage and Parisian modernist influences, de Staël imbues the scene with emotional depth rather than literal detail. The result is a timeless landscape that conveys both place and feeling through painterly intensity A framed matte canvas that brings a quiet coastal painting into your space with painterly texture and deep, seaworthy blues. The subtle brushwork and layered pigments create a lived-in, collected feeling—like a sketch made on a slow morning by the shore. The slim pine frame in black gives the piece a modern shadowbox effect, letting the canvas float visually while protecting the sides. Hang it in a hallway, above a mantle, or in a small reading nook to add calm, layered color that reads as both art and atmosphere.Product features- Greenguard Gold  inks for safer indoor air quality- Durable cotton-poly canvas with proprietary coating for crisp detail- Sustainably sourced radial pine frame, multiple sizes and frame colors available- Vibrant, high-fidelity latex inks that are non-toxic and non-flammable- Comes ready to hang with sawtooth hardware; horizontal, vertical, and square optionsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Paysage de Provence by Nicolas de Staël Matte Stretched Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/paysage-de-provence-by-nicolas-de-stael-matte-stretched-wall-art-print): Painted during Nicolas de Staël’s mature period, Paysage de Provence reveals the artist’s distinctive approach to landscape, where color and form replace traditional detail. Influenced by the light and terrain of southern France, de Staël translated the scenery into powerful planes of muted blues, ochres, and greens. Trained in classical methods yet driven by modern abstraction, he created works that feel both monumental and intimate. This painting highlights his mastery of texture and composition, making it a compelling example of postwar European modernism and a striking addition to any contemporary art collection. A tranquil coastal scene rendered in soft impasto blues and pale sands, printed on a matte stretched canvas that brings texture and calm to any room. The muted horizon and abstracted shoreline invite slow breaths and quiet moments—an easy companion for morning coffee, late-night reading, or simply a pause in a busy day. Lightweight yet substantial, the canvas hangs flush with a slim 1.25" profile and sits slightly off the wall thanks to soft rubber dots that protect surfaces and keep the piece steady. Made with non-toxic latex inks on a durable cotton-poly blend and stretched over responsibly sourced pine, this print offers gallery-quality color with a gentle, lived-in feel that complements coastal, modern, and minimal interiors. Choose from multiple orientations and sizes to fit a hallway, bedroom, or living room vignette.Product features- Soft rubber dots on back corners keep the canvas stable and protect walls.- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color.- Stretched over radiata pine from FSC- renewable forests for sustainable framing.- Durable cotton-poly matte canvas with unique coating for high-quality image reproduction.- Available in 60 sizes and horizontal, vertical, or square orientations; 1.25" depth.Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Vivid 20 by Orit Fuchs Pop Art Matte Canvas Framed Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/vivid-20-by-orit-fuchs-pop-art-matte-canvas-framed-wall-art-print): Vivid 20 by Orit Fuchs exemplifies the artist’s contemporary approach to abstraction, rooted in emotional expression and intuitive process. Known for her bold color relationships and textured surfaces, Fuchs draws on modern expressionist influences to create works that explore inner landscapes rather than literal form. In this painting, vibrant hues and layered brushwork interact dynamically, producing a sense of movement and depth. Vivid 20 reflects Fuchs’ commitment to balancing spontaneity with structure, resulting in a composition that feels both energetic and resolved, inviting viewers to engage emotionally with its powerful visual language. This framed matte canvas brings bold, modern portrait art into your space with clarity and calm. The smooth matte finish tames glare and deepens the saturated reds, navy, and warm skin tones, while the black pine frame gives the piece structure and a contemporary edge. Hang it in a living room, studio, or gallery wall to add a confident, stylish statement that reads as both artwork and conversation starter.The piece feels like a quiet pause: a confident gaze, a pop of patterned fabric, and colors that hold attention without shouting. It suits someone who curates intentionally—collectors of contemporary illustration, apartment decorators updating a focal wall, or creatives wanting a muse for their workspace. Use it for housewarmings, gallery nights, or to mark a creative milestone; the print’s refined finish and durable build mean it arrives ready to hang and enjoy.Materials and craft are visible in every detail: archival-quality latex inks on a cotton-poly canvas composite, stretched over sustainably sourced pine and finished with sawtooth hardware. The result is a gallery-ready piece that balances vibrant color with responsible production.Product features- Greenguard Gold  latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color- Cotton-poly canvas composite with proprietary matte coating for reduced glare- Stretched on FSC-sourced pinewood frame with multiple size/color options- Durable, non-flammable printing process and archival-quality output- Includes sawtooth hanging hardware; horizontal, vertical, and square layouts availableCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Vivid 20 by Orit Fuchs Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/vivid-20-by-orit-fuchs-canvas-wall-art-print): Vivid 20 by Orit Fuchs exemplifies the artist’s contemporary approach to abstraction, rooted in emotional expression and intuitive process. Known for her bold color relationships and textured surfaces, Fuchs draws on modern expressionist influences to create works that explore inner landscapes rather than literal form. In this painting, vibrant hues and layered brushwork interact dynamically, producing a sense of movement and depth. Vivid 20 reflects Fuchs’ commitment to balancing spontaneity with structure, resulting in a composition that feels both energetic and resolved, inviting viewers to engage emotionally with its powerful visual language. This stretched matte canvas brings bold, modern portrait art into any space with bright color, clean lines, and museum-quality print clarity. The image’s deep navy background and vibrant pop of red and orange create a lively focal point — a confident, stylish presence that complements contemporary living rooms, bedrooms, or studio walls. Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks on a cotton-poly canvas and stretched over sustainably sourced radiata pine, the piece looks polished from every angle thanks to a crisp 1.25" profile and soft rubber dots that keep it steady when hung. Choose horizontal, vertical, or square orientations and from a wide range of sizes to fit your wall and composition needs. Slight size variations may occur due to the production process.Product features- Museum-quality prints using Greenguard Gold latex inks for vivid, durable color- Stretched over 1.25" sustainable radiata pine frame with back-hanging hardware- Soft rubber dots on back corners to protect walls and keep the canvas securely in place- Cotton-poly composite matte canvas with unique coating for exceptional image detail- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square formats across 60 sizes; tolerance +/- 1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Vivid 81 by Orit Fuchs Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/vivid-81-by-orit-fuchs-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art): Vivid 81 embodies Orit Fuchs’ belief in painting as an emotional language. Rooted in contemporary abstract and expressionist practices, her work transforms gesture, color, and texture into a visual reflection of inner experience. In this painting, dynamic hues and layered marks suggest rhythm and momentum rather than fixed imagery. Fuchs’ background in modern abstraction allows her to harmonize intensity with restraint. Vivid 81 invites viewers to engage intuitively, offering a vibrant and contemplative work that reveals new nuances through repeated viewing. This framed matte canvas brings bold, modern pop-art into your space with sunlit color and a playful edge. The image of a woman in yellow-tinted sunglasses biting into a vivid slice of watermelon feels lively and immediate — like a summer memory paused on the wall. The matte finish softens glare while keeping the saturated hues crisp, and the slim pine frame adds a clean, gallery-ready border that slips effortlessly into living rooms, kitchens, studios, or trendy office nooks. Hang it horizontal, vertical, or square to suit your layout; the included sawtooth hardware makes placement simple. For anyone who loves bold color, retro-inspired style, and a touch of everyday glamour, this canvas becomes a conversation starter and a visual mood boost.Product features- Greenguard Gold- latex inks for safe, vibrant prints- Cotton-polyester canvas with proprietary matte coating for crisp color and low glare- Sustainably sourced pine frame from FSC- wood- Multiple size and orientation options with sawtooth hanging hardware- Durable, non-toxic materials and vivid, long-lasting color reproductionCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Vivid 81 by Orit Fuchs Matte Canvas Wall Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/vivid-81-by-orit-fuchs-matte-canvas-wall-art-print): In Vivid 81, Orit Fuchs delivers a bold abstract work characterized by rich color relationships and expressive surface detail. Influenced by modern abstraction and expressionism, Fuchs approaches painting as an intuitive process shaped by experience and emotion. Her artistic background informs the structured yet energetic composition, where layered textures create movement and depth. Vivid 81 stands as a striking example of her mature style, making it an ideal statement piece for contemporary interiors. The painting’s vitality and balance ensure lasting visual impact for collectors and design-conscious spaces. Bright, bold, and playfully modern — this stretched matte canvas turns a quirky pop-portrait into wall-ready art. The image of a sunlit woman biting into a juicy slice of watermelon feels impulsive and summer-sweet: warm tones, glossy sunglasses, and confident brushlike shapes that bring energy to kitchens, studios, and living rooms. Printed with low-VOC GREENGUARD Gold inks on a cotton-poly canvas, the colors stay vivid while the matte finish reduces glare for a relaxed, gallery-style look. The panel arrives stretched on a sustainable radiata pine frame with soft rubber corner dots and ready-to-hang hardware, so the piece sits flat and secure against the wall the moment you unbox it.Product features- Matte cotton-poly canvas printed with GREENGUARD Gold latex inks- Stretched on sustainable radiata pine frame with back hanging included- Soft rubber dots on bottom corners to keep canvas steady when hung- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square orientations across 60 sizes- Printed using non-toxic, non-flammable latex inks; small size tolerance +/- 1/8" (3.2mm)Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Vivid 63 by Orit Fuchs Matte Framed Canvas Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/vivid-63-by-orit-fuchs-matte-framed-canvas-wall-art): Vivid 63 stands as a vivid example of Orit Fuchs’s dynamic visual language, where oil and acrylic meld into a powerful portrait that commands attention. Fuchs—an artist and storyteller living in Tel Aviv—shapes her striking female figures from a lifetime of creative exploration, spanning painting, sculpture, and design. Her early career as a successful art director informs the work’s nuanced engagement with gender roles, cultural imagery, and self-expression. This piece’s bold palette and thoughtful composition capture a moment of introspection, inviting the viewer to engage with the emotional and cultural layers Fuchs consistently unearths. This matte canvas print brings bold pop-art attitude to any wall. A stylized portrait with bright pinks and southwestern accents sits on a smooth, low-reflective surface that keeps colors punchy without glare. The slender black pine frame gives the piece a modern, gallery-ready edge while the muted matte finish makes it easy to place under soft lighting — from living rooms to reading nooks. It hangs cleanly with included sawtooth hardware and pairs naturally with mixed-media gallery walls or solitary statement spaces.The artwork feels playful and a little secretive: a confident figure tipping a finger to her lips against a warm background. It suits someone who curates interiors with personality — collectors of contemporary pop illustration, makers who love color-forward décor, and anyone outfitting a studio, boutique, or bedroom with chic, tongue-in-cheek charm. Bring this framed matte canvas into a space to add a bright focal point that reads both modern and comfortable.Product features- Matte, low-reflective coating for deep, glare-free colors- Cotton/polyester composite canvas with proprietary coating for sharp detail- Printed with non-toxic latex inks and UL- Greenguard Gold pigments- Sustainably sourced pine frame; multiple sizes and frame colors available- Sawtooth hanging hardware included; horizontal, vertical, and square optionsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Vivid 63 by Orit Fuchs Canvas Wall Art Matte Stretched - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/vivid-63-by-orit-fuchs-canvas-wall-art-matte-stretched): Painted in 2019, Vivid 63 is part of Orit Fuchs’s iconic VIVID Series, known for its contemporary portrayal of women with bold color and graphic refinement. Fuchs—who lives and works in Tel Aviv—brings a multidisciplinary background to her practice, ranging from typography and illustration to sculpture, all rooted in a deep understanding of visual storytelling. Her experience in  and design gives her portraits a compelling pop-infused edge, while her artistic vision reveals layered narratives of strength, attitude, and presence. Vivid 63 resonates as both a fashion-forward portrait and a cultural vignette. Bright, bold, and a little mischievous — this stretched matte canvas brings pop-art attitude to a room without shouting for attention. The stylized portrait, with its soft skin tones, candy-pink background, and colorful southwestern hatband, reads like a confident whisper on the wall. The slim 1.25" depth keeps the piece contemporary and gallery-ready; it hangs clean and flat so the artwork becomes the focal point of a bedroom, studio, or entryway. Use it to add a splash of playful sophistication to a curated gallery wall or let it stand alone as a statement that’s both modern and subtly provocative.Product features- Durable cotton-poly canvas with matte finish for low-glare, museum-quality images.- Stretched on a 1.25" radiata pine frame sourced from renewable FSC- forests.- Printed with non-toxic, UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for vivid, long-lasting color.- Soft rubber dots on the back keep the canvas stable when hung; back hanging hardware included.- Available in multiple orientations and 60 size options; slight size tolerance +/- 1/8" due to production.Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Bloom by Unknown Framed Matte Canvas Abstract Floral Field Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/bloom-by-unknown-framed-matte-canvas-abstract-floral-field-wall-art): A framed matte canvas that brings painterly color and texture into your living space. Rich washes of blue, teal, pink and crimson come alive on a coated cotton-poly canvas, then sit inside a slim pine frame finished in your choice of color. The surface has a soft, non-reflective matte finish that emphasizes brush-like details and layered pigments. Lightweight yet sturdy, it arrives ready to hang with sawtooth hardware and gives walls a calm, artfully layered focal point that feels collected over time.Product features- UL- Greenguard Gold inks for high-quality, safe color.- Sustainably stretched on radial pine from FSC- forests.- Vivid, crisp color reproduction with advanced printing techniques.- Non-toxic latex inks on a cotton/poly canvas composite with proprietary coating.- Available in multiple sizes and frame colors; includes sawtooth hanging hardware.Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Bloom by Unknown Abstract Coastal Bloom Canvas Wall Art — Matte Stretched 1.25" - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/bloom-by-unknown-abstract-coastal-bloom-canvas-wall-art-matte-stretched-1-25): A stretched matte canvas that brings an abstract field of color into your room. Layers of cool aquas and teals melt into fresh lavenders and rich berry reds, suggesting a breeze over wildflowers or paint caught in motion. The matte finish softens glare and highlights texture, so walls read as calm and layered rather than flat. Lightweight yet sturdy thanks to a radiant pine frame, this piece arrives ready to hang with soft rubber dots and a built-in hanging system. It settles into bedrooms, living rooms, or creative nooks as a quietly energetic anchor — the kind of artwork that rewards a second look and becomes part of the daily view.Product features- Soft rubber dots on bottom back corners keep the canvas steady when hung- UL- Greenguard Gold inks with unique coating deliver high-quality, vibrant prints- Stretched on radiata pine from FSC- renewable forests for sustainable framing- Printed with non-toxic, non-flammable latex inks on a cotton-poly canvas composite- Comes in horizontal, vertical, and square orientations with 60 size options; back hanging includedCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [La Vierge consolatrice by William Adolphe Bouguereau Framed Matte Canvas Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/la-vierge-consolatrice-by-william-adolphe-bouguereau-framed-matte-canvas-wall-art): La Vierge consolatrice exemplifies William-Adolphe Bouguereau’s mastery of academic realism and devotional painting. A leading figure of 19th-century French academic art, Bouguereau was renowned for his flawless technique, idealised figures, and reverence for classical tradition. Painted during a period when religious imagery offered solace amid social change, this work presents the Virgin Mary as a tender, compassionate presence, embodying spiritual comfort and maternal grace. Bouguereau’s meticulous modelling of flesh, soft luminosity, and restrained palette elevate the sacred subject with emotional sincerity, reflecting his belief that beauty and technical perfection could inspire moral and spiritual reflection. A framed matte canvas that brings quiet reverence into any room. The rich, velvety matte surface tames glare and draws attention to the painting’s subtle details — the soft halo, the contemplative gaze, and the warm, patterned background. Mounted on a slender pine profile and finished with a deep black frame, this piece hangs with a grounded, museum-like presence. The colors remain vivid yet restrained thanks to advanced latex inks and a special coating that preserves texture without shine. Hang it above a reading chair, in a small chapel-like nook, or as the thoughtful focal point of a calm gallery wall.Product features- Greenguard Gold  inks for ultra-clean, high-quality color- Sustainable pine frame sourced from FSC- forests- Matte proprietary cotton/polyester canvas coating reduces glare- Durable, non-toxic latex inks for vivid, lasting colors- Includes sawtooth hardware; available in multiple sizes and frame colorsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [La Vierge consolatrice by William Adolphe Bouguereau Matte Stretched Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/religious-icon-canvas-print-madonna-with-halo-matte-stretched-wall-art): In La Vierge consolatrice, William-Adolphe Bouguereau portrays the Virgin Mary as a timeless symbol of compassion and solace. Trained at the École des Beaux-Arts and celebrated across Europe, Bouguereau combined classical ideals with profound emotional sensitivity. This painting reflects his lifelong devotion to religious themes, rendered with exceptional delicacy and realism. The Virgin’s serene expression and gentle presence convey comfort and maternal protection, inviting quiet contemplation. Created in an era of artistic upheaval, Bouguereau remained committed to beauty, harmony, and faith, producing works like this that continue to resonate for their emotional depth and spiritual warmth. A quietly powerful stretched canvas that brings sacred stillness into your space. Printed with archival latex inks on a cotton-poly canvas and mounted on a 1.25" pine profile, this matte canvas holds every subtle tone — the soft halo, the muted florals, the dignified gaze — with museum-like clarity. The lightweight frame hangs easily or sits flush against the wall with soft rubber dots to keep it steady. Sustainable materials and UL- Greenguard Gold inks mean you can display it with confidence in living rooms, home altars, or study nooks where calm and contemplation are welcome.Product features- Matte cotton-poly canvas printed with non-toxic latex inks- Stretched on 1.25" radiata pine frame from renewable forests- UL- Greenguard Gold inks and unique coating for vivid, archival imagery- Soft rubber dots on back corners and included hanging hardware for stable display- Available in multiple orientations and sizes; slight production tolerance +/- 1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Study Of A Woman For Offering To Love by William Adolphe Bouguereau Framed Matte Canvas Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/study-of-a-woman-for-offering-to-love-by-william-adolphe-bouguereau-framed-matte-canvas-print): Study of a Woman for “Offering to Love” reveals William-Adolphe Bouguereau’s meticulous academic process and devotion to idealised beauty. A leading figure of 19th-century French academic painting, Bouguereau was trained at the École des Beaux-Arts and celebrated for his flawless draftsmanship. This preparatory study demonstrates his careful observation of form, expression, and anatomy, laying the foundation for the finished allegorical work. Subtle modelling of flesh and refined contours reflect his classical influences, while the intimate scale offers insight into Bouguereau’s disciplined approach, where technical perfection served emotional clarity and timeless elegance. A framed matte canvas that brings quiet, museum-quality presence to any wall. The fine cotton-poly canvas captures soft skin tones and subtle background sketches with rich, archival latex inks for long-lasting clarity. Mounted on a slim pine frame with a tasteful multi-color finish, this piece hangs cleanly with included sawtooth hardware. It’s made from sustainably sourced materials and printed with Greenguard Gold– inks, so it looks beautiful and breathes easier in lived-in spaces. Display it in a hallway, reading nook, or above a mantel to introduce a calm, contemplative mood—like a whispered memory, steady and thoughtfully placed.Product features- Greenguard Gold  inks for archival, low-emission prints- Sustainable pine frame and FSC-sourced materials- Cotton–polyester canvas composite with proprietary matte coating- Vibrant, non-toxic latex inks for crisp, true-to-design colors- Sawtooth hanging hardware; multiple sizes and orientations availableCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Study Of A Woman For Offering To Love by William Adolphe Bouguereau Canvas Print Matte Stretched - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/study-of-a-woman-for-offering-to-love-by-william-adolphe-bouguereau-canvas-print-matte-stretched): In Study of a Woman for “Offering to Love”, William-Adolphe Bouguereau explores idealised femininity through the lens of academic classicism. Renowned for his allegorical and mythological subjects, Bouguereau used preparatory studies like this to refine gesture and mood before executing major compositions. The soft realism and poised expression exemplify his mastery of drawing and his belief in beauty as a universal language. Created during a period of artistic change, the study underscores Bouguereau’s steadfast commitment to tradition, revealing the intellectual and emotional groundwork behind one of his celebrated allegorical paintings. Soft, warm, and quietly elegant — this stretched matte canvas brings a classical portrait into your home with museum-like presence. The fine cotton-poly canvas and JONDO’s unique coating capture every soft brushstroke and skin tone with rich, lifelike depth while the matte finish removes glare so you can appreciate the sitter’s gentle profile from any angle. Mounted on a sustainably sourced radiata pine frame and fitted with soft rubber dots and built-in hardware, it arrives ready to hang and hold its place on your wall. It’s the kind of piece that settles into a calm corner, invites slow looks, and makes everyday rooms feel considered and collected.Product features- Matte cotton-poly canvas with glare-reducing finish- UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color- Stretched on renewable radiata pine frame (sustainable sourcing)- Soft rubber dots and included back hanging for stable, easy display- Available in multiple orientations and sizes; slight size tolerance ±1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Virgo Solitudinis by William Adolphe Bouguereau Framed Matte Canvas Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/virgo-solitudinis-by-william-adolphe-bouguereau-framed-matte-canvas-print): Painted by French academic master William-Adolphe Bouguereau (1825–1905), Virgo Solitudinis reflects the artist’s lifelong devotion to classical beauty and technical perfection. Trained at the École des Beaux-Arts in Paris and a winner of the prestigious Prix de Rome, Bouguereau became renowned for his idealised figures and flawless realism. This work presents the Virgin Mary in contemplative solitude, embodying purity, restraint, and spiritual introspection. Soft lighting, delicate flesh tones, and precise draftsmanship demonstrate Bouguereau’s academic discipline while conveying quiet emotional depth. The painting exemplifies his ability to merge religious reverence with human tenderness. A framed matte canvas print that brings quiet reverence to a room. The soft, painterly portrait sits on a deep-black pine frame that neatly floats the image from the wall, creating subtle depth and a museum-like presence. Colors stay rich and true thanks to advanced latex printing and a special canvas coating that keeps skin tones gentle and backgrounds luminous. Hang it in a meditation corner, entryway, or above a mantel to add a contemplative focal point that feels both vintage and freshly printed.The overall look is restrained and respectful — muted violets and warm flesh tones against a haloed backdrop — so it harmonizes with classic, minimalist, or spiritual interiors. Lightweight sawtooth hardware arrives installed for quick, square-orientation hanging. Each piece is printed and stretched on sustainably sourced pine and archival-grade canvas, so it looks polished while treading lightly on the environment.Product features- Archival matte coating with Greenguard Gold- inks for high-quality, low-VOC images- Sustainably sourced pine frame with multiple size and frame color options- Durable cotton-poly canvas composite printed with non-toxic latex inks- Vibrant, true-to-tone color reproduction using advanced printing techniques- Includes sawtooth hanging hardware; available in horizontal, vertical, and square orientationsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Virgo Solitudinis by William Adolphe Bouguereau Matte Canvas Print Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/virgo-solitudinis-by-william-adolphe-bouguereau-matte-canvas-print-wall-art): Virgo Solitudinis is a serene religious composition by William-Adolphe Bouguereau, one of the foremost painters of 19th-century French Academic art. Educated at the École des Beaux-Arts and celebrated throughout his lifetime, Bouguereau combined Renaissance influence with exceptional anatomical accuracy. In this painting, the Virgin Mary is portrayed alone, removed from narrative drama, inviting meditation and spiritual stillness. The smooth modelling of form, restrained palette, and balanced composition highlight Bouguereau’s mastery of classical technique. Revered for his precision and idealism, Bouguereau uses solitude here to elevate devotion, grace, and timeless beauty. A matte stretched canvas that brings a quiet, reverent presence to any room. The soft, non-reflective finish keeps focus on the artwork’s subtle color gradations and painted details. Stretched over a 1.25" pine frame with back-hanging hardware and soft rubber dots to protect walls, this canvas sits slightly proud from the wall to create a gallery-like look without heavy framing. Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks on a cotton/poly canvas blend, the piece offers vivid, stable color while meeting strict safety and low-emissions standards. Thoughtful sizing and orientation options let you choose a vertical, horizontal, or square composition to fit your wall and mood. Expect small manufacturing variances (±1/8") as part of the handcrafted finishing process.Product features- Matte, non-reflective finish for true-to-art color- Stretched on 1.25" radiata pine frame from renewable FSC sources- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks (non-toxic)- Soft rubber dots and included back-hanging hardware for secure, wall-safe display- Available in 60 sizes and vertical, horizontal, or square orientationsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Vivid 2 by Orit Fuchs Matte Canvas Framed Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/vivid-2-by-orit-fuchs-matte-canvas-framed-wall-art): Vivid 2 is a dynamic abstract work by contemporary artist Orit Fuchs, whose practice explores colour, emotion, and intuitive expression. Influenced by modern abstraction and colour-field traditions, Fuchs creates compositions that prioritise movement and feeling over representation. In this painting, bold layers of pigment interact with gestural marks, producing a sense of rhythm and spontaneous energy. The vibrant palette and textured surface invite viewers into an immersive visual experience. Vivid 2 reflects Fuchs’s commitment to emotional authenticity, using abstraction as a language to communicate intensity, balance, and inner vitality. A bold, framed matte canvas that brings pop-art edge to any wall. This multi-color piece features high-contrast, graphic illustration with sharp lines and vivid hues printed using UL- Greenguard Gold and non-toxic latex inks. The cotton-poly canvas composite has a proprietary coating for crisp detail, stretched over a sustainably sourced pine frame and finished with sawtooth hardware for easy hanging. It sits confidently in living rooms, studios, or office nooks — a conversation-starting accent that reads modern, playful, and artful.Product features- UL- Greenguard Gold printing with non-toxic latex inks- Cotton-poly canvas composite with proprietary coating for sharp, vibrant color- Stretched on sustainably sourced pine frame (FSC) with multiple sizes/colors- Matte finish, framed presentation with sawtooth hanging hardware included- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square orientationsCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Vivid 2 by Orit Fuchs Matte Stretched Canvas Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/vivid-2-by-orit-fuchs-matte-stretched-canvas-wall-art): Created by Orit Fuchs, a contemporary abstract artist known for her expressive use of colour, Vivid 2 exemplifies an intuitive and emotionally driven approach to painting. Fuchs draws on influences from modern abstraction, allowing colour relationships and painterly gestures to guide the composition. The work’s layered textures and saturated hues generate depth and movement, encouraging personal interpretation. Rather than fixed narrative, Vivid 2 offers an open visual dialogue, reflecting the artist’s belief in abstraction as a direct emotional experience. The painting stands as a celebration of spontaneity, energy, and expressive freedom. A vibrant stretched canvas print that brings pop-art attitude to any wall. Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks on a cotton-poly canvas, the artwork’s bold lines and glossy tones remain true and fade-resistant. The image is hand-stretched over a 1.25" pine frame sourced from FSC- renewable forests, with soft rubber dots on the back for secure, scratch-free display and included hanging hardware for easy installation. Lightweight yet sturdy, this canvas adds a playful, modern focal point to living rooms, studios, or boutique spaces — it’s designed to sit confidently above a shelf or anchor a gallery wall with instant personality.Product features- UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for vivid, non-toxic printing- Stretched over 1.25" radiata pine frame from renewable FSC forests- Durable cotton-poly canvas with unique JONDO coating for sharp color and detail- Soft rubber dots on back to prevent slipping and protect surfaces; back hanging included- Available in horizontal, vertical and square orientations across 60 sizes; slight size tolerance +/- 1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Kiku Masamune by Kitano Tsunetomi Japanese Geisha Wall Art Poster - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/kiku-masamune-by-kitano-tsunetomi-japanese-geisha-wall-art-poster): Kiku Masamune by Kitano Tsunetomi reflects the refined elegance that defines one of Japan’s foremost Nihonga painters. Active during the late Meiji to early Shōwa periods, Tsunetomi was celebrated for his bijin-ga, capturing women with lyrical line and emotional restraint. In this work, the chrysanthemum—Japan’s imperial flower—symbolises purity and longevity, while the poised female figure conveys quiet dignity. The composition balances classical Japanese aesthetics with subtle modern realism, demonstrating Tsunetomi’s mastery of traditional materials and his role in preserving cultural identity during a time of artistic change. A rolled art poster that brings quiet elegance and old-world charm to your walls. The print captures soft, painterly tones and delicate details—perfect for a cozy reading corner or a calm gallery wall. Choose from textured fine art, smooth semi-glossy, or understated matte paper to match your frame and lighting. Each print arrives rolled for safe shipping and ready to be mounted or framed to suit your space.This piece settles into rooms that favor thoughtful, collected decor. It invites slow moments: tea in the late afternoon, music turned low, time to read or reflect. The subdued palette and detailed brushwork complement vintage furnishings, minimalist frames, or layered gallery arrangements. Available in horizontal and vertical orientations and multiple sizes to fit intimate nooks or larger focal walls.Product features- Giclée printing for bright, long-lasting color with UV resistance- Three paper choices: Fine Art (textured archival), Semi-Glossy (satin photo finish), Matte (lightweight, low-reflective)- Paper weights range from 180–285 g/m² depending on paper and provider- Multiple sizes and horizontal/vertical orientations available- Shipped rolled for safe delivery; blank product sourced from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Club Hamigaki by Kitano Tsunetomi Vintage Japanese Geisha Poster – Rolled Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/club-hamigaki-by-kitano-tsunetomi-vintage-japanese-geisha-poster-rolled-art-print): Club Hamigaki by Kitano Tsunetomi captures the subtle modernity of early twentieth-century Japan through the lens of a master Nihonga painter. Active from the Meiji to Shōwa periods, Tsunetomi was renowned for elevating bijin-ga with refined line, soft colour, and psychological nuance. This work reflects changing urban culture, presenting a woman engaged in a private, contemporary ritual. While rooted in traditional Japanese aesthetics, the painting reveals Tsunetomi’s sensitivity to modern life, demonstrating how he bridged classical techniques with the emerging sophistication of Japan’s new social spaces. This rolled poster brings a quiet, nostalgic pulse to your walls. The vintage Japanese illustration—soft peach background, delicate kimono patterns, and graceful calligraphy—feels like a paused moment from an old print. Hung in a reading nook, studio, or hallway, it invites slow, attentive gazes and adds a cultured, meditative presence to the room. Choose fine art paper for a textured, archival look that reads like a traditional print, semi-glossy for vivid color and crisp detail, or matte for a softer, subdued finish. Available in multiple sizes and orientations so you can place it as a focal piece or part of a curated gallery.This poster suits collectors of Asian art, lovers of vintage ephemera, and anyone creating a calm, thoughtful interior. It layers well with woven textiles, low-light lamps, and shelves of well-thumbed books. Use it to mark a quiet moment—an evening of tea, a slow weekend morning, or a contemplative corner for sketching and journaling.Product features- Giclée print with bright, fade-resistant colors suitable for regular sunlight exposure- Three paper options: Fine Art (textured, archival), Semi-Glossy (satin finish, sharp color fidelity), Matte (lighter weight, low-glare)- Multiple sizes and both horizontal and vertical orientations available- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy 180–260 g/m²; Matte 189–200 g/m²- Sourced blanks from USA (JONDO) and Japan (Printify Choice); age-restricted to adultsCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Sakura Beer by Kitano Tsunetomi Japanese Geisha Art Rolled Poster — Vintage Ukiyo-e Style Wall Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/club-hamigaki-by-kitano-tsunetomi-japanese-geisha-art-rolled-poster-vintage-ukiyo-e-style-wall-print): Sakura Beer by Kitano Tsunetomi reflects the elegant modernity of one of Japan’s foremost Nihonga painters. Active from the Meiji to early Shōwa periods, Tsunetomi was celebrated for his refined bijin-ga, blending classical Japanese aesthetics with contemporary life. This work combines the symbolic beauty of cherry blossoms with a modern consumer motif, capturing Japan’s cultural transition in the early twentieth century. Through delicate line, controlled colour, and psychological subtlety, Tsunetomi elevates everyday imagery into a refined composition that bridges tradition and modernity. A rolled art poster that brings quiet, museum-like elegance to any wall. The print captures delicate, traditional Japanese portraiture with rich, archival giclée inks on your choice of textured fine art, satin semi-gloss, or understated matte paper. It arrives rolled for easy shipping and local framing—ready to become the calm centerpiece of a reading nook, hallway, or gallery wall. The muted golds and deep blacks hold their depth over time, while the textured fine art option adds a tactile, painterly presence. Choose orientation and size to suit your wall and framing style.Product features- Giclée archival print with bright, UV-resistant colors- Three paper options: Fine Art (textured), Semi-Glossy (satin photo), Matte (subtle, low glare)- Multiple sizes plus horizontal or vertical orientations- Paper weights from 180–285 g/m² depending on option for a premium feel- Shipped rolled for safe delivery; blanks sourced from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Sakura Masamune by Kitano Tsunetomgi Vintage Japanese Geisha Art Poster - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/sakura-masamune-by-kitano-tsunetomgi-vintage-japanese-geisha-art-poster): Sakura Masamune by Kitano Tsunetomi embodies the refined beauty that defines one of Japan’s most celebrated Nihonga painters. Active from the Meiji through early Shōwa periods, Tsunetomi was renowned for his bijin-ga, portraying women with lyrical line and emotional restraint. In this work, cherry blossoms symbolise renewal and the fleeting nature of life, framing the elegant female figure in a moment of quiet reflection. The painting balances classical Japanese aesthetics with subtle modern realism, illustrating Tsunetomi’s role in preserving tradition while responding to a changing cultural landscape. Bring a quiet moment of old-world Japan into your space with this rolled art poster. The soft, archival paper and giclée printing give the portrait a depth and warmth that feels lived-in, like a photograph pulled from a family album. Subtle texture from the fine art option echoes traditional watercolor and etching, while matte and semi-gloss choices let you choose a softer or crisper finish. It hangs or tucks into a frame with ease, ready to anchor a reading nook, entryway, or gallery wall. This piece sits naturally in rooms that favor calm palettes and thoughtful details—where guests notice the story in a face and the hand of the maker.Product features- Giclée printing for bright, fade-resistant color- Three paper options: Fine Art (textured archival), Matte (lightweight, subdued finish), Semi-Glossy (satin photo fidelity)- Multiple sizes and horizontal/vertical orientations available- Paper weights: Fine Art 285 g/m²; Semi-Glossy & Matte options vary by supplier- Rolled delivery for safe shipping — blank product sourced from USA and JapanCare instructions- If the print does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, dry cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Sakura Masamune by Kitano Tsunetomgi Japanese Geisha Portrait Framed Poster Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/sakura-masamune-by-kitano-tsunetomgi-japanese-geisha-portrait-framed-poster-wall-art): Created by Osaka-based master Kitano Tsunetomi, Sakura Masamune reflects his lifelong dedication to elevating traditional Japanese painting. Known for integrating Yamato-e traditions with a modern sensibility, Tsunetomi used delicate colour and precise brushwork to convey grace and inner calm. The sakura motif anchors the painting in Japanese symbolism, evoking impermanence and seasonal beauty. Produced during Japan’s transition into modernity, the work reveals Tsunetomi’s ability to transform familiar imagery into a sophisticated meditation on femininity and cultural identity. A simply framed paper poster that brings quiet elegance to any room. Printed on your choice of fine art or semi-gloss paper, the image sits on a white mat and is held in a matte black pinewood frame with brown paper backing. The plexiglass face is shatter-proof and keeps colors vivid while the pre-installed hanging hardware and rubber bumpers make it easy to hang straight and protect your walls. Available in horizontal or vertical layouts and ten sizes, this framed poster fits gallery walls, reading nooks, and hallway displays alike. Assembled in the USA from globally sourced parts, it’s a refined, ready-to-hang option for anyone who prefers understated, museum-like presentation.Product features- Two paper choices: fine art (310 gsm) or semi-gloss (260 gsm)- 100% pinewood matte black frame with brown paper backing- Shatter-proof plexiglass front for clear, vibrant color- Pre-installed top hanging hardware plus rubber bumpers for protection- Available in 10 sizes and both horizontal and vertical orientationsCare instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Sakura Beer by Kitano Tsunetomi Geisha Portrait Framed Paper Poster — Vintage Japanese Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/club-hamigaki-by-kitano-tsunetomi-geisha-portrait-framed-paper-poster-vintage-japanese-art-print): Sakura Beer by Kitano Tsunetomi reflects the elegant modernity of one of Japan’s foremost Nihonga painters. Active from the Meiji to early Shōwa periods, Tsunetomi was celebrated for his refined bijin-ga, blending classical Japanese aesthetics with contemporary life. This work combines the symbolic beauty of cherry blossoms with a modern consumer motif, capturing Japan’s cultural transition in the early twentieth century. Through delicate line, controlled colour, and psychological subtlety, Tsunetomi elevates everyday imagery into a refined composition that bridges tradition and modernity. A framed paper poster that brings calm, refined beauty to any wall. Rich, museum-quality printing captures the delicate details and warm tones of the artwork, mounted on your choice of textured fine art paper or bright semi-gloss photo paper. The print arrives set inside a matte black pinewood frame with a clean white mat, shatter-proof plexiglass, and pre-installed hanging hardware — ready to hang straight from the box. It suits quiet living rooms, reading nooks, or serene entryways and adds an understated, timeless accent to interiors that favor classic or East-Asian-inspired decor.Product features- Two paper choices: textured fine art (310 gsm) or bright semi-gloss photo (260 gsm).- Matte black 100% pinewood frame with brown paper backing and white mat.- Shatter-proof plexiglass front for safe, clear display.- Pre-installed hanging hardware and rubber bumpers for level, wall-friendly mounting.- Ten size options; horizontal and vertical layouts available; assembled in the USA.Care instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Club Hamigaki by Kitano Tsunetomi Framed Wall Art Poster - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/club-hamigaki-by-kitano-tsunetomi-framed-wall-art-poster): Club Hamigaki by Kitano Tsunetomi captures the subtle modernity of early twentieth-century Japan through the lens of a master Nihonga painter. Active from the Meiji to Shōwa periods, Tsunetomi was renowned for elevating bijin-ga with refined line, soft colour, and psychological nuance. This work reflects changing urban culture, presenting a woman engaged in a private, contemporary ritual. While rooted in traditional Japanese aesthetics, the painting reveals Tsunetomi’s sensitivity to modern life, demonstrating how he bridged classical techniques with the emerging sophistication of Japan’s new social spaces. A framed paper poster that brings quiet, vintage elegance to your walls. The piece is printed with vivid, saturated inks that hold fine detail and soft skin tones, then mounted inside a matte black pinewood frame with a warm brown paper backing. Choose fine art paper for a textured, painterly look or semi-gloss for a bright, satin photographic finish. Each frame arrives ready to hang with pre-installed hardware and rubber bumpers to protect surfaces and keep the artwork perfectly level. Lightweight, shatter-proof plexiglass protects the print while keeping the visual clarity crisp. Whether shown vertically or horizontally, the framed poster reads like a small window into another time—subtle, refined, and quietly striking.Product features- Two paper choices: textured fine art (310 gsm) or bright semi-gloss photo paper (260 gsm).- Matte black 100% pinewood frame with brown paper backing and shatter-proof plexiglass.- Pre-installed hanging hardware and rubber bumpers for an easy, straight installation.- Vibrant, high-fidelity color reproduction using modern printing techniques.- Available in 10 sizes with horizontal and vertical layout options; assembled in the USA.Care instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Kiku Masamune by Kitano Tsunetomi Framed Poster — Vintage Japanese Geisha Art Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/kiku-masamune-by-kitano-tsunetomi-framed-poster-vintage-japanese-geisha-art-print): Kiku Masamune by Kitano Tsunetomi reflects the refined elegance that defines one of Japan’s foremost Nihonga painters. Active during the late Meiji to early Shōwa periods, Tsunetomi was celebrated for his bijin-ga, capturing women with lyrical line and emotional restraint. In this work, the chrysanthemum—Japan’s imperial flower—symbolises purity and longevity, while the poised female figure conveys quiet dignity. The composition balances classical Japanese aesthetics with subtle modern realism, demonstrating Tsunetomi’s mastery of traditional materials and his role in preserving cultural identity during a time of artistic change. A quietly elegant framed paper poster that brings delicate, museum-like presence to a room. Printed on your choice of fine art or semi-gloss paper, the image sits on a wide white mat inside a matte black pinewood frame. The warm brown backing and shatter-proof plexiglass give it a refined, lived-in feel—ready to hang with pre-installed hardware and rubber bumpers that keep the frame level and your walls protected. Available in multiple sizes and orientations to fit gallery walls, bedrooms, or cozy reading nooks.Product features- Two paper choices: 310 gsm fine art or 260 gsm semi-gloss photo paper- 100% pinewood matte black frame with brown paper backing- Shatter-proof plexiglass cover for safe, clear display- Pre-installed hanging hardware and rubber bumpers for easy, protected mounting- Available in 10 sizes, horizontal and vertical orientationsCare instructions- Clean framed prints with a slightly wet cloth when necessary. - Maison Abstract

- [Bianca by Max Klinger Framed Matte Canvas Portrait Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/bianca-by-max-klinger-framed-matte-canvas-portrait-print): Bianca by Max Klinger reflects the psychological depth and symbolic intensity that define the German artist’s work. Created by one of the leading figures of late nineteenth-century Symbolism, the painting reveals Klinger’s fascination with inner emotion, mythology, and the subconscious. Known for bridging realism and imagination, Klinger imbues the female figure with quiet tension and introspection. Bianca demonstrates his mastery of form and atmosphere, presenting beauty not as idealised decoration but as a vessel for meaning. The work exemplifies Klinger's influence on modern art through its emotional complexity and symbolic restraint. A framed matte canvas that brings quiet, contemplative portraiture into your living space. The soft brushwork and muted color palette create an intimate, gallery-like presence—an artwork that settles into a room rather than shouting for attention. Hung in a hallway, study, or above a reading chair, the piece invites longer looks and gentle conversation. The slim pine frame and matte finish keep the focus on texture and tone, giving a timeless, lived-in look that complements vintage, eclectic, and Scandinavian interiors alike. Choose vertical or square orientation and a frame color to match your décor; sawtooth hardware is included for easy placement.Product features- Greenguard Gold- latex inks for safe, high-fidelity color- Cotton/polyester composite canvas with proprietary matte coating- Stretched on FSC- radial pine frame (sustainably sourced)- Multiple sizes and frame colors; horizontal, vertical, and square options- Sawtooth hanging hardware included for quick installationCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Bianca by Max Klinger Print Matte Stretched Canvas - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/bianca-by-max-klinger-print-matte-stretched-canvas): Painted by Max Klinger, a pioneering German Symbolist active at the turn of the twentieth century, Bianca embodies his interest in psychological narrative. Klinger, celebrated for both his graphic cycles and paintings, sought to elevate art beyond realism into the realm of ideas and emotion. The poised female figure suggests contemplation and inner life, while the restrained palette enhances the painting’s mood. Rooted in Symbolist thought, Bianca reflects Klinger's belief that art should explore the unseen forces shaping human experience. A soft, museum-like matte canvas that brings quiet portraiture into your home. The stretched cotton-poly blend holds delicate brushwork and muted color, letting skin tones and subtle backgrounds breathe without glare. Lightweight yet sturdy, the slim 1.25" profile sits close to the wall so the image feels intimate — as if the sitter were quietly watching over a living room, hallway, or bedroom. The neutral matte finish keeps reflections minimal and preserves the painting’s gentle texture. Ready to hang straight from the studio, this canvas fits vertical, horizontal, or square arrangements and blends with both contemporary and classic interiors.Product features- Matte, glare-resistant cotton-poly canvas with museum-quality image coating- Stretched on a 1.25" radial pine frame made from FSC- renewable forests- Printed with non-toxic UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for safe indoor display- Soft rubber dots on the back and included hanging hardware keep the canvas secure on the wall- Available in multiple orientations and sizes; slight size tolerance +/- 1/8" due to productionCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Portrait of a Woman by Winold Reiss Framed Matte Canvas Portrait Print - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/portrait-of-a-woman-by-winold-reiss-framed-matte-canvas-portrait-print): Portrait of a Woman reflects Winold Reiss’s lifelong commitment to dignified, empathetic portraiture. Born in Germany and later emigrating to the United States, Reiss blended European modernism with a deep respect for individual identity. Known for his portrayals of cultural diversity and inner character, he avoided idealisation in favour of honesty and psychological depth. In this work, delicate line, restrained colour, and subtle shading draw attention to the sitter’s calm presence and introspective gaze. The simplicity of the composition allows the subject’s humanity to take centre stage, exemplifying Reiss’s belief that portraiture should honour the individual spirit. A framed matte canvas print that brings quiet, classical presence to any room. The soft, painterly portrait invites lingering looks—muted tones and subtle brushwork create a contemplative mood that suits reading nooks, galleries, or peaceful corners of a home. The slim black frame and matte finish reduce glare and emphasize the drawing’s delicate lines, making the image feel like a discovered treasure rather than a loud statement. Hung vertically or placed on a small easel, this piece anchors spaces where calm and reflection matter.This canvas fits naturally into homes that favor thoughtful, restrained decor. It complements warm wood, linen textiles, and vintage finds, and sits comfortably beside bookshelves, bedside tables, or studio walls. Use it to mark quiet rituals—slow mornings with coffee, late-night sketching, or a cozy evening of music and reading—when the room needs an empathetic, human touch.Carefully printed with eco-conscious materials, the piece offers gallery-quality color and archival stability without toxic solvents. The pine frame and sawtooth hardware make hanging straightforward, while multiple sizes and orientations let you choose the scale that best suits your wall and sightlines.Product features- Matte finish with low-glare coating for subtle, museum-like presentation- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks — vibrant yet non-toxic- Cotton-polyester composite canvas with proprietary coating for sharp detail- Stretched on FSC- radial pine frame; sustainable sourcing- Multiple sizes and frame colors available; sawtooth hardware includedCare instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract

- [Portrait of a Woman by Winold Reiss Canvas Print – Matte Stretched Wall Art - Maison Abstract](https://maison-abstract.com/products/portrait-of-a-woman-by-winold-reiss-canvas-print-matte-stretched-wall-art): Winold Reiss, a German-born American artist, was renowned for his modern yet humanistic approach to portraiture. Portrait of a Woman showcases his mastery of line and tone, combining soft modelling with confident draftsmanship. Reiss’s work was shaped by his interest in cultural identity and personal dignity, themes that defined much of his career. Here, the muted palette and uncluttered background focus attention on the sitter’s expression, conveying quiet strength and emotional depth. The painting exemplifies Reiss’s ability to capture personality without embellishment, creating an intimate and timeless portrayal rooted in observation and respect. A quietly powerful stretched canvas that brings a contemplative, classical portrait into your everyday space. The matte surface softens light and reduces glare, letting the sitter’s calm gaze and delicate tonal shading become the room’s focal point. Lightweight but sturdy, the 1.25" depth gives a clean profile on the wall without a bulky frame. Hang it alone for a minimal, museum-like moment, or pair it with warm woods and linen textiles to deepen a calm, lived-in corner. The subtle texture of the cotton-poly canvas and neutral palette make it easy to place in hallways, reading nooks, or serene living rooms, where it invites longer looks and quiet conversation.Product features- Matte, museum-grade canvas printed with UL- Greenguard Gold inks- Stretched over a 1.25" radiata pine inner frame from FSC- renewable forests- Durable latex inks — non-toxic and non-flammable- Soft rubber dots on back corners and included back hanging hardware for stable mounting- Available in horizontal, vertical, and square options with 60 size choices (±1/8" tolerance)Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth. - Maison Abstract
